title: The Cost of Consensus: Isolated Self-Correction Prevails Over Unguided Homogeneous Multi-Agent Debate
comment: 19 pages, ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems
summary: Multi-agent debate, where teams of LLMs iteratively exchange rationales and vote on answers, is widely deployed under the assumption that peer review filters hallucinations. Yet the failure dynamics of homogeneous debate remain poorly understood, therefore we report findings from a controlled empirical study of teams of $N{=}10$ homogeneous agents (Qwen2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, Ministral-3-8B) across $R{=}3$ debate rounds on two high-difficulty benchmarks (GSM-Hard and MMLU-Hard). We compare peer debate against isolated self-correction and a stochastic noise control that injects rationales from unrelated problems. We decompose debate failure into three model-dependent pathways: sycophantic conformity, where agents uncritically adopt majority answers (modal adoption up to 85.5%); contextual fragility, where peer rationales destabilize previously correct reasoning (vulnerability rate up to 70.0%); and consensus collapse, where plurality voting discards correct answers already present in the generation pool (oracle gap up to 32.3 percentage points). Ablations over communication density ($K \in \{2,4,9\}$) and sampling temperature ($T \in \{0.4, 0.7\}$) show that conformity reaches high levels at minimal peer exposure ($K{=}2$) and intensifies with greater initial diversity. Across all configurations, debate consumes 2.1-3.4$\times$ more tokens (up to 28,631 tokens per problem) than self-correction for equal or lower accuracy. Our results indicate that, within the 7-8B parameter class, homogeneous teams without structured roles do not benefit from unguided peer exchange, and that isolated self-correction consistently offers a more favorable cost-accuracy tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验发现，在7-8B参数规模同质化LLM团队中，多智能体辩论存在三种失败路径（奉承性从众、上下文脆弱性和共识崩溃），且相比自我纠错消耗2.1-3.4倍token却未带来准确率提升，孤立自我纠错在成本-准确率权衡上更优。
AI.motivation: 同质化多智能体辩论作为幻觉过滤手段被广泛使用，但其失败机制尚不明确，因此需要系统研究其失效路径。
AI.method: 在GSM-Hard和MMLU-Hard两个高难度基准上，对N=10个同质化智能体（Qwen2.5-7B等）进行R=3轮辩论实验，对比自我纠错和随机噪声控制，通过消融实验分析通信密度和采样温度的影响。
AI.result: 发现三种失败路径：奉承性从众（模态采纳率高达85.5%）、上下文脆弱性（脆弱率高达70.0%）、共识崩溃（oracle差距达32.3个百分点）。辩论消耗2.1-3.4倍token（每问题最多28,631 tokens）但准确率未提升。
AI.conclusion: 在7-8B参数级别的同质化团队中，无指导的同行交换辩论无益处，孤立自我纠错在成本-准确率权衡上持续更优。

title: Breaking the Communication-Accuracy Trade-off: A Sparsified Information Diffusion Framework for Multi-Agent Collaborative Perception
summary: The growing relevance of multi-agent systems has drawn increasing focus on communication-efficient filters for collaborative perception to alleviate the system's communication burden. While the event-triggered (ET) mechanism can improve communication efficiency in collaborative state estimation, an inevitable trade-off exists between estimation accuracy and communication cost in ET filters. This paper proposes a fast and accurate ET diffusion-based filter for real-time multi-agent collaborative target tracking, aiming to reduce the system's data transmission without compromise in tracking performance. The proposed filter achieves improved tracking accuracy, reduced data transmission, and accelerated convergence using an error-minimized ET cubature information filter (CIF) for local estimation, and a correlation-aware diffusion strategy for global fusion. The experimental results confirm the scalability of the proposed EDC-CIF algorithm and demonstrate its efficacy in simultaneously reducing estimation error and computation time while significantly enhancing communication efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于事件触发和扩散策略的快速准确协同状态估计滤波器（EDC-CIF），能在降低通信负担的同时保持甚至提升多智能体目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统的协同感知面临通信效率与估计精度之间的权衡问题，现有事件触发滤波器难以同时兼顾高精度、低通信量和快速收敛。
AI.method: 采用误差最小化的事件触发容积信息滤波器（CIF）进行局部估计，结合相关性感知的扩散策略进行全局融合，实现EDC-CIF算法。
AI.result: 实验验证了EDC-CIF的可扩展性，在降低估计误差和计算时间的同时，显著提升了通信效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的EDC-CIF算法能够在不牺牲跟踪性能的前提下，有效减少多智能体协同目标跟踪中的数据传输量，实现精度、速度与通信效率的协同优化。

title: Separation Assurance between Heterogeneous Fleets of Small Unmanned Aerial Systems via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: In the envisioned future dense urban airspace, multiple companies will operate heterogeneous fleets of small unmanned aerial systems (sUASs), where each fleet includes several homogeneous aircraft with identical policies and configurations, e.g., equipage, sensing, and communication ranges, making tactical deconfliction highly complex for the aircraft. This paper aims to address two core questions: (1) Can tactical deconfliction policies converge or reach an equilibrium to ensure a conflict-free airspace when companies operate heterogeneous fleets of homogeneous aircraft? (2) If so, will the converged policies discriminate against companies operating sUASs with weaker configurations? We investigate a multi-agent reinforcement learning paradigm in which homogeneous aircraft within heterogeneous fleets operate concurrently to perform package delivery missions over Dallas, Texas, USA. An attention-enhanced Proximal Policy Optimization-based Advantage Actor-Critic (PPOA2C) framework is employed to resolve intra- and inter-fleet conflicts, with each fleet independently training its own policy while preserving privacy. Experimental results show that two fleets with distinct, shared PPOA2C policies can reach an equilibrium to maintain safe separation. While two PPOA2C policies outperform two strong rule-based baselines in terms of conflict resolution, a PPOA2C policy exhibits safer interaction with a rule-based policy, indicating adaptive capabilities of PPOA2C policies. Furthermore, we conducted extensive policy-configuration evaluations, which reveal that equilibria between similar policy types tend to favor fleets with stronger configurations. Even under similar configurations but different policy types, the equilibrium favors one of the heterogeneous policies, underscoring the need for fairness-aware conflict management in heterogeneous sUAS operations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究城市密集空域中异构无人机机群间的战术解冲突策略，采用基于注意力机制的PPOA2C多智能体强化学习框架，发现两个机群可收敛至均衡状态，但均衡往往偏向配置更强或策略更优的一方，凸显公平性管理的必要性。
AI.motivation: 未来城市密集空域中，多家公司将运营异构的小型无人机机群（sUAS），每个机群内包含多架同构飞机。战术解冲突高度复杂，本文旨在回答两个核心问题：(1) 异构机群的战术解冲突策略能否收敛至均衡状态以实现无冲突空域；(2) 若收敛，是否会对配置较弱的机群产生歧视。
AI.method: 采用多智能体强化学习范式，异构机群中的同构飞机在达拉斯市同时执行包裹配送任务。使用基于注意力机制的PPOA2C框架解决机群内和机群间的冲突，每个机群独立训练自己的策略，同时保护隐私。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，两个机群使用不同的PPOA2C策略可收敛至均衡状态并保持安全间隔；PPOA2C策略优于两种基于规则的强基线方法；PPOA2C策略与基于规则策略交互时表现更安全。广泛的策略-配置评估表明，相似策略类型间的均衡倾向于配置更强的机群；即使配置相似但策略类型不同，均衡也会偏向某一种异构策略。
AI.conclusion: 异构无人机机群可通过深度强化学习达到战术解冲突的均衡，但均衡存在不公平性，偏向配置更强或策略更优的一方，未来异构sUAS运营中需要公平性感知的冲突管理机制。

title: rAIson: Developing Reliable Decision-Making Agents
comment: Accepted as demonstration paper for publication at AAMAS 2026
summary: This paper presents the rAIson platform, a high-level technological environment for the development of automated, reliable and explainable decision-making agents. The research underlying the platform and its technological progress has now reached a mature stage that allows the platform to be used for the development of complex real-life applications without writing a single line of code.

AI.tldr: rAIson平台是一个无需编写代码即可开发自动化、可靠且可解释决策代理的高级技术环境，现已成熟可用于复杂现实应用开发。
AI.motivation: 构建一个高层次的、无需编程的技术环境，使得自动化、可靠且可解释的决策代理的开发更加便捷。
AI.method: 提出了rAIson平台，这是一个高层次的技术环境，支持零代码开发自动化、可靠且可解释的决策代理。
AI.result: 平台技术已成熟，可用于无需编写代码即可开发复杂的现实应用。
AI.conclusion: rAIson平台已达到成熟阶段，能够支持无需编程的复杂现实应用开发。

title: Agentopic: A Generative AI Agent Workflow for Explainable Topic Modeling
summary: Agentopic is a novel agent-based workflow for explainable topic modeling that leverages the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing topic modeling approaches such as Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and BERTopic often lack transparency on how topics are assigned or grouped. Agentopic addresses this by using multiple agents that collaboratively perform topic identification, validation, hierarchical grouping, and natural language explanation. This design enables users to trace the reasoning behind topic assignments, enhancing interpretability without sacrificing accuracy. When seeded with topics from the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) dataset, Agentopic achieves an F1-score of 0.95, matching GPT-4.1, improving on LDA (0.93), and close to BERTopic (0.98). We used Agentopic to augment the BBC dataset with generated explanations to improve the dataset's richness and context. The unseeded Agentopic generated 2045 semantically coherent topics organized across six hierarchical levels, vastly enriching the original five-category structure. By embedding explainability throughout the workflow, Agentopic offers an interpretable alternative to black-box models, making it particularly valuable for crucial applications like finance and healthcare.

AI.tldr: Agentopic是一种基于多智能体的可解释主题建模工作流，利用LLM的推理能力实现主题识别、验证、层次化分组和自然语言解释，在BBC数据集上达到0.95的F1分数，并能生成2045个跨6个层次的语义连贯主题，显著增强了可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有主题建模方法（如LDA和BERTopic）在主题分配或分组的透明性上存在不足，缺乏可解释性，难以追溯推理过程。
AI.method: 提出Agentopic框架，使用多个智能体协作完成主题识别、验证、层次化分组和自然语言解释，将可解释性嵌入整个工作流程。
AI.result: 在BBC数据集上，有种子引导时F1分数达0.95（接近BERTopic的0.98，优于LDA的0.93）；无种子引导时生成2045个语义连贯主题，横跨6个层次。
AI.conclusion: Agentopic提供了一种可解释的黑箱模型替代方案，尤其在金融和医疗等关键应用中具有重要价值。

title: 2026 Roadmap on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the Journal Machine Learning: Engineering
summary: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) is reshaping smart manufacturing by providing new capabilities for efficiency, adaptability, and autonomy across industrial value chains. However, the deployment of AI and ML in industrial settings still faces critical challenges, including the complexity of industrial big data, effective data management, integration with heterogeneous sensing and control systems, and the demand for trustworthy, explainable, and reliable operation in high-stakes industrial environments. In this roadmap, we present a comprehensive perspective on the foundations, applications, and emerging directions of AI and ML in smart manufacturing. It is structured in three parts. The first highlights the foundations and trends that frame the evolution of AI in smart manufacturing. The second focuses on key topics where AI is already enabling advances, including industrial big data analytics, advanced sensing and perception, autonomous systems, additive and laser-based manufacturing, digital twins, robotics, supply chain and logistics optimization, and sustainable manufacturing. The third section explores non-traditional ML approaches that are opening new frontiers, such as physics-informed AI, generative AI, semantic AI, advanced digital twins, explainable AI, RAMS, data-centric metrology, LLMs, and foundation models for highly connected and complex manufacturing systems. By identifying both opportunities and remaining barriers across these areas, this roadmap outlines the advances needed in methods, integration strategies, and industrial adoption. We hope this roadmap will serve as a guide for researchers, engineers, and practitioners to accelerate innovation, align academic and industrial priorities, and ensure that AI-driven smart manufacturing delivers reliable, sustainable, and scalable impact for the future of manufacturing ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地回顾了AI/ML在智能制造中的基础、应用与新兴方向，涵盖工业大数据、感知系统、数字孪生、机器人、供应链优化等关键领域，并探讨了物理信息AI、生成式AI、语义AI、可解释AI、大语言模型等前沿方法，指出了方法、集成策略和产业采纳方面所需的进步。
AI.motivation: 智能制造中AI/ML部署面临工业大数据复杂性、异构系统集成、高可靠性需求等关键挑战，亟需系统性梳理现状与未来方向以指导研究与实践。
AI.method: 本文采用路线图（roadmap）的形式，分三部分：一是智能制造的AI基础与趋势；二是AI已实现突破的关键主题（如大数据分析、感知、自主系统、数字孪生、机器人等）；三是非传统ML前沿（如物理信息AI、生成式AI、语义AI、可解释AI、LLMs、基础模型等）。
AI.result: 识别了各领域的机遇与剩余障碍，指出了在方法创新、集成策略和工业采纳方面所需的关键进步。
AI.conclusion: 该路线图旨在为研究人员、工程师和实践者提供指导，加速AI驱动智能制造的创新，协调学术与产业优先级，实现可靠、可持续、可扩展的制造生态系统影响。

title: Synthetic Designed Experiments for Diagnosing Vision Model Failure
summary: Current synthetic data pipelines for computer vision generate images without diagnosing what the downstream model actually needs. This open-loop paradigm treats synthetic data as cheap real data, randomly sampling the generator's output space and hoping to cover the model's failure modes. We argue this fundamentally misuses synthetic data's unique property: the controllable, independent variation of scene factors.Drawing on the statistical theory of Design of Experiments (DoE), we propose Synthetic Designed Experiments for Representational Sufficiency (SDRS). SDRS treats the downstream model as a black-box system and the synthetic generator as an experimental apparatus. Using fractional factorial designs, SDRS efficiently audits a model's factor-sensitivity profile via ANOVA decomposition. It classifies failures into two actionable types: Type I gaps (coverage failures on underrepresented factor levels) and Type II gaps (reliance on spurious nuisance dependencies). The audit then prescribes targeted synthetic data to address each gap type. We validate SDRS on three experiments: (1) a controlled diagnostic on dSprites with planted biases, where the audit correctly identifies both gap types and targeted data improves accuracy from 49.9% to 79.0%; (2) a dense segmentation task on procedural scenes, where detecting background-complexity shortcuts and applying targeted data improves mIoU from 0.948 to 0.998; and (3) an entanglement detection experiment showing that the ANOVA audit identifies cross-factor contamination in imperfect generators. Finally, we show that per-factor invariance penalties can transfer sensitivity between factors, identifying an open problem for representation-level correction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDRS框架，利用实验设计统计学理论，将合成数据生成器作为实验装置，通过ANOVA分解审计下游模型的因子敏感性，将失败分为两类（Type I覆盖不足和Type II虚假关联），并针对性生成数据。实验证明该方法能有效识别模型缺陷并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据管线是开环的，随机采样生成器输出空间，希望覆盖模型失败模式，但未能诊断下游模型真正需要什么，滥用了合成数据可独立控制场景因子的独特属性。
AI.method: 基于实验设计（DoE）统计理论，提出SDRS框架：将下游模型视为黑箱系统，合成生成器作为实验装置；采用分式析因设计，通过ANOVA分解审计模型的因子敏感性剖面；将失败分为Type I（覆盖不足）和Type II（虚假依赖）两类，并针对性生成合成数据。
AI.result: 在三个实验中验证：(1) dSprites诊断实验准确率从49.9%提升至79.0%；(2) 密集分割任务mIoU从0.948提升至0.998；(3) 纠缠检测实验证明ANOVA审计能识别生成器中的交叉因子污染。还发现因子间不变性惩罚会迁移敏感性，揭示表征级修正的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: SDRS将合成数据生成从开环随机采样转变为有目标驱动的闭环过程，能高效诊断并修复模型缺陷，但因子间敏感性迁移问题仍需进一步研究。

title: H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
summary: Representing and navigating hierarchy is a fundamental primitive of reasoning. Large language models have demonstrated proficiency in a wide variety of tasks requiring hierarchical reasoning, but there exists limited analysis on how the models geometrically represent the necessary latent constructions for such thinking. To this end, we develop \textit{H-probes}, a collection of linear probes that extract hierarchical structure, specifically depth and pairwise distance, from latent representations. In synthetic tree traversal tasks, the H-probes robustly find the subspaces containing hierarchical structure necessary to complete the tasks; furthermore, in comprehensive ablation experiments, we show that these hierarchy-containing subspaces are low-dimensional, causally important for high task performance, and generalize within- and out-of-domain. Furthermore, we find analogous, though weaker, hierarchical structure in real-world hierarchical contexts such as mathematical reasoning traces. These results demonstrate that models represent hierarchy not only at the level of syntax and concepts, but at deeper levels of abstraction -- including the reasoning process itself.

AI.tldr: 论文提出H-probes线性探针，从LLM潜在表示中提取层次结构（深度和成对距离），发现这些结构存在于低维子空间，对任务性能至关重要，并在数学推理等真实场景中也存在类似但较弱的层次结构。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在层次推理任务中表现出色，但对模型内部如何几何表示层次结构的理解有限，缺乏系统性的分析方法。
AI.method: 开发H-probes（一组线性探针）从潜在表示中提取层次深度和成对距离；在合成树遍历任务中进行全面消融实验，验证层次子空间的低维性、因果重要性及泛化能力。
AI.result: H-probes能稳健找到包含层次结构的子空间；该子空间低维、对任务性能因果重要、域内域外均能泛化；在数学推理等真实层次语境中也发现类似（但较弱）的层次结构。
AI.conclusion: 模型不仅在句法和概念层面表示层次结构，还在更深层次的抽象层面（包括推理过程本身）编码了层次信息。

title: Talk is Cheap, Communication is Hard: Dynamic Grounding Failures and Repair in Multi-Agent Negotiation
summary: Grounding is the collaborative process of establishing mutual belief sufficient for the current communicative purpose. While static grounding maps language to a shared, externally observable context, dynamic grounding is a joint activity where meaning is negotiated through interaction. Current multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) benchmarks focus on static, one-shot tasks, overlooking the ability to repair grounding breakdowns across turns. We introduce an iterated, multi-turn negotiation game in which two agents allocate shared resources toward private projects with verifiable jointly optimal outcomes. While individual agents can identify Pareto-optimal allocations in isolation, agent dyads consistently fail to reach them across open- and closed-source models. Our investigation reveals four failure modes: (1) coordination degrades when shared interaction history is absent; (2) yet accumulated context can itself become a liability through stubborn anchoring, where initial proposals are treated as axiomatic rather than negotiable; (3) a reliance on perfunctory fairness (equal resource splits) over reward-maximizing coordination; and (4) failures in referential binding, where agents lose track of commitments across turns. These results highlight dynamic grounding as a critical and understudied axis of multi-agent coordination. Our framework decomposes the coordination gap into measurable components: the oracle baseline establishes that the gap is not attributable to individual reasoning limitations; the no-talk baseline establishes that communication is necessary; and a full-transparency intervention establishes that information exchange alone is insufficient: the bottleneck lies in the interactive processes of joint plan formation, commitment, and execution that constitute dynamic grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多智能体LLM在动态协商任务中存在动态接地（dynamic grounding）失败问题，表现为四类故障模式，且信息交换本身不足以弥补协调差距，真正的瓶颈在于交互式联合计划形成、承诺与执行过程。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体基准仅关注静态、单轮任务，忽略了在多次交互中修复接地故障的能力。动态接地作为通过交互协商意义的联合活动，其重要性未被充分研究。
AI.method: 设计了一个多轮迭代协商游戏，两个智能体分配共享资源用于各自私有项目，存在可验证的联合最优结果。通过对比oracle基线、no-talk基线和full-transparency干预，分解协调差距的构成。
AI.result: 发现四种故障模式：(1)缺少共享交互历史时协调退化；(2)累积上下文导致固执锚定（将初始提议视为不可协商的）; (3)依赖敷衍公平（平均分配）而非奖励最大化；(4)指称绑定失败（跨轮次丢失承诺）。
AI.conclusion: 动态接地是多智能体协调中被忽视的关键维度。协调瓶颈不在于个体推理能力或信息交换不足，而在于交互过程中的联合计划形成、承诺与执行。

title: Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem
summary: The algebraic diversity framework replaces temporal averaging over multiple observations with algebraic group action on a single observation for second-order statistical estimation. The central open problem in this framework is $\textit{group selection}$: given an $M$-dimensional observation with unknown covariance structure, find the finite group whose spectral decomposition best matches the covariance. Naive enumeration of all subgroups of the symmetric group $S_M$ requires exponential time in $M$. We prove that this combinatorial problem reduces to a generalized eigenvalue problem derived from the double commutator of the covariance matrix, yielding a polynomial-time algorithm with complexity $O(d^2M^2 + d^3)$, where $d$ is the dimension of a generator basis. The minimum eigenvector of the double-commutator matrix directly constructs the optimal group generator in closed form, with no iterative optimization. The reduction is exact: the double-commutator minimum eigenvalue is zero if and only if the optimal generator lies in the span of the basis, and its magnitude provides a certifiable optimality gap when it does not. This problem does not appear in the standard catalogs of computational complexity (Garey and Johnson, 1979) and represents a new class linking group theory, matrix analysis, and statistical estimation. We establish connections to independent component analysis (JADE), structured matrix nearness problems, and simultaneous matrix diagonalization, and we show that the double-commutator formulation is the unique approach that is simultaneously polynomial-time, closed-form, and certifiable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将代数多样性框架中的群选择问题（组合优化）简化为广义特征值问题的方法，通过双交换子矩阵的最小特征向量直接构造最优群生成元，实现了多项式时间闭式求解，并具有可认证的最优性间隙。
AI.motivation: 代数多样性框架中群选择问题是核心开放问题：给定M维观测数据，寻找最优的有限群使得其谱分解最佳匹配协方差结构。暴力枚举S_M的所有子群需要指数时间，亟需高效算法。
AI.method: 将群选择问题转化为双交换子矩阵的广义特征值问题。通过构造协方差矩阵的双交换子，其最小特征向量直接给出最优群生成元的闭式解，算法复杂度为O(d²M² + d³)。
AI.result: 双交换子最小特征值为0时，最优生成元恰好在基张成的空间中；否则特征值大小提供可认证的最优性间隙。方法同时具有多项式时间、闭式解和可认证性三个理想性质。
AI.conclusion: 该问题是一类新的计算复杂性类别，连接了群论、矩阵分析和统计估计。工作与独立成分分析、结构化矩阵逼近、同步矩阵对角化等问题建立了联系。

title: AI Agents for Sustainable SMEs: A Green ESG Assessment Framework
summary: This study presents a novel, AI-driven framework for assessing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance in European small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). An initial phase established expert-validated ESG baseline scores from a subset of the Flash Eurobarometer FL549 survey data. In the second phase, a scalable AI agent system, built on the n8n automation platform, applied these baselines to perform automated ESG classification and generate contextual recommendations using large language models (LLMs). The results demonstrate the AI system's high consistency with human-derived outputs, thereby supporting more effective monitoring and intervention strategies aligned with the European Green Deal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的框架，用于评估欧洲中小企业的ESG表现。该框架首先通过专家验证建立ESG基线评分，随后利用n8n自动化平台和LLM构建AI代理系统，实现自动化的ESG分类和情境化建议。结果表明，AI系统与人工评估结果高度一致，能够支持更有效的ESG监测和干预策略。
AI.motivation: 欧洲中小企业缺乏高效、可扩展的ESG评估工具，现有方法依赖大量人工且难以推广应用，无法有效支持欧洲绿色协议。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段使用Flash Eurobarometer FL549调查数据，由专家验证建立ESG基线评分；第二阶段基于n8n自动化平台构建可扩展的AI代理系统，利用LLMs进行自动化ESG分类和情境化推荐。
AI.result: AI系统与人工评估结果高度一致，支持更有效的监测和干预策略。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的ESG评估框架可有效替代传统人工评估，为欧洲中小企业提供可扩展、可持续的ESG监测解决方案，有助于实现欧洲绿色协议目标。

title: Latent Space Probing for Adult Content Detection in Video Generative Models
comment: To be published in 2026 56th Annual IEEE International Conference on Dependable Systems and Networks Workshops (DSN-W)
summary: The rapid proliferation of AI-powered video generation systems has introduced significant challenges in content moderation, particularly with respect to adult and sexually explicit material. Existing detection methods operate on either prompts or decoded pixel-space outputs. Therefore, both approaches are blind to the rich internal representations formed during generation. In this paper, we propose a novel latent space probing framework that intercepts the denoised latent representations produced by the CogVideoX video diffusion model during inference and attaches lightweight classifiers to perform real-time adult content detection. To support this work, we construct a large-scale binary dataset of 11039 ten-second video clips (5086 violating, 5953 non-violating) sourced from adult websites and YouTube respectively. We introduce two lightweight probing classifier architectures. We train and evaluate it on the dataset. Our work demonstrates that latent-space signals encode strong discriminative features for harmful content detection, achieving 97.29% F1 on our held-out test set with an overhead in the 4-6ms range. Our results suggest that probing the latent space results in improvements in both detection performance as well as cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的潜空间探测框架，在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理过程中拦截去噪潜表示，附加轻量级分类器进行实时成人内容检测。构建了包含11039个十秒视频片段的数据集，两个探测分类器架构在测试集上达到97.29%的F1分数，开销仅4-6ms，证明了潜空间信号在有害内容检测中的高效性和低成本优势。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成视频的成人内容检测方法要么基于提示词，要么基于解码后的像素空间输出，两者都忽略了生成过程中形成的丰富内部表征，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理时，拦截去噪后的潜空间表征，附加轻量级分类器进行实时检测；构建了包含11039个十秒视频片段的大规模二分类数据集（5086个违规，5953个非违规）；设计了两种轻量级探测分类器架构。
AI.result: 在保留测试集上达到97.29%的F1分数，检测开销仅为4-6ms，在检测性能和成本两方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 潜空间信号编码了强大的有害内容判别特征，潜空间探测方法在检测性能和计算成本上都有显著提升，为AI生成视频的内容审核提供了新的高效解决方案。

title: DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA
summary: Diagram question answering (Diagram QA) requires reasoning-level attribution that links each question-answer pair to all visual regions needed to derive the answer, rather than only the region containing the final response. Creating such structured evidence across diagrams, charts, maps, circuits, and infographics is time-consuming, and existing annotation tools tightly couple their interfaces to dataset-specific formats. We present DIAGRAMS, a lightweight, schema-driven review framework that decouples interface logic from dataset-specific JSON structures through an internal meta-schema and dataset adapters. Given an image and QA pair with optional candidate regions, the system performs QA-conditioned evidence selection and proposes the regions required for reasoning. When QA pairs or candidate regions are missing, it generates them and supports human verification and refinement. Across six Diagram QA datasets, model-suggested evidence achieves 85.39% precision and 75.30% recall against reviewer-final selections (micro-averaged). These results indicate that the review-first framework reduces manual region creation while maintaining high agreement with final reasoning-level attributions. We release a public demo and installable package to support dataset auditing, grounded supervision creation, and grounded evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIAGRAMS，一个轻量级、模式驱动的审查框架，用于图表问答中的推理级归因标注。该框架通过内部元模式和数据集适配器解耦接口逻辑与数据集格式，可自动生成并支持人工验证推理所需的所有视觉区域。在六个数据集上达到85.39%精度和75.30%召回率，显著减少人工标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 图表问答需要推理级归因（将问答对链接到所有相关视觉区域），但现有标注工具将接口与特定数据集格式紧密耦合，导致创建这类结构化证据耗时且缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 提出DIAGRAMS框架，通过内部元模式（meta-schema）和数据集适配器（dataset adapters）解耦接口逻辑与数据集特定JSON结构。系统根据图像和QA对执行QA条件化的证据选择（QA-conditioned evidence selection），自动提议推理所需区域；缺失QA对或候选区域时自动生成并支持人工验证与优化。
AI.result: 在六个图表QA数据集上，模型建议的证据与评审最终选择相比，微平均精度达85.39%，召回率达75.30%。
AI.conclusion: 该审查优先框架在保持与最终推理级归因高度一致的同时，显著减少了人工区域创建的工作量。已发布公共演示和可安装包，支持数据集审计、有监督标注创建和基于归因的评估。

title: Koopman Representations for Early Outbreak Warning and Minimal Counterfactual Intervention in Multi-Agent Epidemic Simulations
summary: This paper presents a Koopman-based framework for early outbreak detection and intervention selection in a multi-agent epidemic simulation. Agents exhibit mobility patterns, heterogeneous susceptibility, immunity-dependent viral load progression, and local transmission through co-location. The goal of the simulation is to study near-critical epidemic regimes in which small changes in exposure or timing can alter the final outcome. Aggregate daily observables from early trajectory windows are encoded into a low-dimensional Koopman latent space whose approximately linear evolution supports short-horizon forecasting and outbreak risk estimation. These representations are combined with a random forest classifier trained to predict whether the final attack rate exceeds a major outbreak threshold. Experiments near the system tipping points show strong early warning performance, with Koopman-derived features contributing to class separation. Counterfactual analysis further shows that minimal interventions, such as keeping a single selected agent at home for one day, can reduce attack rates and, often, shift the trajectory below the outbreak threshold.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Koopman理论的框架，用于多智能体疫情模拟中的早期爆发检测与干预选择。通过将早期轨迹编码到低维Koopman潜空间，结合随机森林分类器预测最终感染率是否超过爆发阈值，并验证了最小干预措施（如让单个智能体居家一天）可有效降低感染率。
AI.motivation: 研究近临界疫情状态，即暴露或时间上的微小变化可能改变最终结果的情形，以实现早期预警和精准干预。
AI.method: 1）构建多智能体疫情模拟（包含移动模式、异质性易感性、免疫依赖的病毒载量演化、局部传播）；2）将早期日观测聚合数据编码到低维Koopman潜空间（近似线性演化支持短期预测）；3）结合随机森林分类器预测是否达到重大爆发阈值；4）基于反事实分析评估最小干预效果。
AI.result: 在系统临界点附近的实验中，表现出强早期预警性能，Koopman特征显著提升类别分离度；反事实分析表明，如让单个选定智能体居家一天等最小干预即可降低感染率并常使轨迹低于爆发阈值。
AI.conclusion: Koopman框架有效支持近临界疫情场景下的早期爆发检测与最小干预策略选择，为疫情精准防控提供了新思路。

title: Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods
summary: Choosing between classical and Bayesian sparse regression methods involves a real trade-off: penalized estimators like Lasso run in milliseconds but give no uncertainty estimates,while Horseshoe and Spike-and-Slab priors produce full posteriors but need MCMC chains that take minutes per fit.Surprisingly few studies compare these two families head-to-head under the conditions that actually make sparse regression hard -- correlated features, weak signals, and growing dimensionality. We benchmark six methods (OLS, Ridge,Lasso, Elastic Net, Horseshoe, Spike-and-Slab) on synthetic data with three covariance structures (rho up to 0.9), four SNR levels, and p in {20, 50, 100}, plus the Diabetes dataset,totalling over 2,600 experiments. The results are clear on some points and nuanced on others. Bayesian methods win on prediction error (MSE 72 vs. 108-267), and the Horseshoe delivers near-nominal 95% coverage (94.8%). But Spike-and-Slab,despite narrower intervals, under-covers at 91.9% -- its continuous relaxation likely plays a role. For variable selection, Lasso and Spike-and-Slab tie at F1 ~ 0.47, making Lasso the practical default when posteriors are not needed. Code and data are available at https://github.com/xiao98/sparse-bayesian-regression-bench.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模基准实验（2600+次实验），系统比较了经典稀疏回归方法（Lasso、Ridge、Elastic Net）与贝叶斯方法（Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）在相关特征、弱信号、高维度等困难条件下的性能表现。结果表明：贝叶斯方法在预测误差上优于经典方法（MSE 72 vs 108-267），Horseshoe提供接近名义水平的覆盖（94.8%），但Spike-and-Slab覆盖不足（91.9%）；在变量选择上，Lasso与Spike-and-Slab的F1分数相当（~0.47），Lasso因速度快成为不需要后验时的实用默认选择。
AI.motivation: 尽管经典惩罚估计（如Lasso）和贝叶斯稀疏回归（如Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）是两种主流方法，但很少有研究在真正使稀疏回归困难的条件（相关特征、弱信号、维度增长）下对它们进行系统性的头对头比较。
AI.method: 在合成数据上设置三种协方差结构（相关系数最高0.9）、四个信噪比水平、三种维度（p=20,50,100），加上Diabetes真实数据集，共进行2600+次实验，比较六种方法（OLS、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net、Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）。
AI.result: 贝叶斯方法在预测误差上显著优于经典方法（MSE 72 vs 108-267）；Horseshoe覆盖率为94.8%（接近名义95%），而Spike-and-Slab尽管区间更窄但覆盖率仅91.9%；变量选择方面，Lasso与Spike-and-Slab的F1分数相当（~0.47）。
AI.conclusion: 在困难条件下，贝叶斯方法（特别是Horseshoe）在预测和不确定性估计上占优，但Spike-and-Slab的连续松弛可能导致覆盖不足；当不需要后验分布时，Lasso因速度与变量选择性能的平衡成为实际默认选择。

title: Understanding Emergent Misalignment via Feature Superposition Geometry
summary: Emergent misalignment, where fine-tuning on narrow, non-harmful tasks induces harmful behaviors, poses a key challenge for AI safety in LLMs. Despite growing empirical evidence, its underlying mechanism remains unclear. To uncover the reason behind this phenomenon, we propose a geometric account based on the geometry of feature superposition. Because features are encoded in overlapping representations, fine-tuning that amplifies a target feature also unintentionally strengthens nearby harmful features in accordance with their similarity. We give a simple gradient-level derivation of this effect and empirically test it in multiple LLMs (Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3.1 8B, GPT-OSS 20B). Using sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we identify features tied to misalignment-inducing data and to harmful behaviors, and show that they are geometrically closer to each other than features derived from non-inducing data. This trend generalizes across domains (e.g., health, career, legal advice). Finally, we show that a geometry-aware approach, filtering training samples closest to toxic features, reduces misalignment by 34.5%, substantially outperforming random removal and achieving comparable or slightly lower misalignment than LLM-as-a-judge-based filtering. Our study links emergent misalignment to feature superposition, providing a basis for understanding and mitigating this phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文从特征叠加的几何视角解释了微调中出现的“突发性失调”（emergent misalignment）现象，指出由于特征在重叠表示中编码，微调目标特征时会无意中强化与其相似的有害特征。作者通过梯度推导和多个LLM实验验证了这一假设，并提出基于几何距离的过滤方法，可将失调减少34.5%。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有实证证据表明在狭窄、无危害的任务上微调会诱导出有害行为（即突发性失调），但其背后的机制尚不清楚。本文旨在揭示这一现象的深层原因。
AI.method: 提出基于特征叠加几何的机制解释：特征在重叠表示中编码，微调放大目标特征时，会按相似度无意中强化邻近的有害特征。通过梯度级推导进行理论说明，并在Gemma-2、LLaMA-3.1、GPT-OSS等多个模型上使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）识别特征并验证几何邻近性。最后提出基于几何距离的数据过滤方法。
AI.result: 1) 失调诱导数据对应的特征与有害行为特征在几何上更接近；2) 该趋势在健康、职业、法律等多个领域泛化；3) 基于几何感知的过滤方法（去除最接近有毒特征的训练样本）将失调减少34.5%，显著优于随机移除，效果与基于LLM评判的过滤方法相当或略优。
AI.conclusion: 突发性失调与特征叠加的几何结构存在内在联系，这一发现为理解和缓解该现象提供了理论基础和实用方法。

title: Visual Chart Representations for Cryptocurrency Regime Prediction: A Systematic Deep Learning Study
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables. Stevens Institute of Technology course project, Fall 2025
summary: Technical traders have long relied on visual analysis of candlestick charts to identify market patterns and predict price movements. While deep learning has achieved remarkable success in image classification, its application to financial chart images remains underexplored. This paper presents a systematic study comparing different visual representations for cryptocurrency regime prediction. We evaluate three image encoding methods (raw candlestick charts, Gramian Angular Fields, and multi-channel GAF), five chart component configurations, four neural network architectures (CNN, ResNet18, EfficientNet-B0, and Vision Transformer), and the impact of ImageNet transfer learning. Through eight controlled experiments on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and S&P 500 data spanning 2018-2024, we identify optimal configurations for visual regime classification. Our results show that a simple 4-layer CNN on raw candlestick charts achieves 0.892 AUC-ROC, outperforming larger pretrained models. Surprisingly, simpler representations (price-only charts, 128x128 resolution) consistently outperform more complex alternatives. We provide interpretability analysis using GradCAM and demonstrate that transfer learning improves performance by 4-16% despite the domain gap between natural images and financial charts.

AI.tldr: 系统比较了加密货币K线图的不同视觉表征方法，发现简单4层CNN配合原始K线图（0.892 AUC-ROC）优于大型预训练模型，低价图表和低分辨率效果更好，迁移学习带来4-16%提升。
AI.motivation: 技术交易者长期依赖K线图的视觉分析，但深度学习在金融图表图像上的应用研究不足，缺乏对视觉表征方式的系统比较。
AI.method: 设计了八组对照实验，比较三种图像编码方法（原始K线图、GAF、多通道GAF）、五种图表组件配置、四种网络架构（CNN、ResNet18、EfficientNet-B0、Vision Transformer），并评估了ImageNet迁移学习的影响。
AI.result: 简单4层CNN在原始K线图上达到0.892 AUC-ROC，超越更大预训练模型；简单表征（纯价格图、128x128分辨率）持续优于复杂方案；迁移学习带来4-16%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 在金融图表视觉分析中，"简单即有效"，复杂的视觉表征和大型网络并非必要，迁移学习虽有域差异但仍有益。

title: Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives
summary: Finetuning can significantly modify the behavior of large language models, including introducing harmful or unsafe behaviors. To study these risks, researchers develop model organisms: models finetuned to exhibit specific known behaviors for controlled experimentation. Identifying these behaviors remains challenging. We show that a simple perplexity-based method can surface finetuning objectives from model organisms by leveraging their tendency to overgeneralize their finetuned behaviors beyond the intended context. First, we generate diverse completions from the finetuned model using short random prefills drawn from general corpora. Second, we rank completions by decreasing perplexity gap between reference and finetuned models. The top-ranked completions often reveal the finetuning objectives, without requiring model internals or prior assumptions about the behavior. We evaluate this on a diverse set of model organisms (N=76, 0.5 to 70B parameters), including backdoored models, models finetuned to internalize false facts via synthetic document finetuning, adversarially trained models with hidden concerning behaviors, and models exhibiting emergent misalignment. For the vast majority of model organisms tested, the method surfaces completions revealing finetuning objectives within the top-ranked results, with models trained via synthetic document finetuning or to produce exact phrases being particularly susceptible. We further show that the technique can be effective even without access to the exact pre-finetuning checkpoint: trusted reference models from different families can serve as effective substitutes. As the method requires only next-token probabilities from the finetuned model, it is compatible with API-gated models that expose token logprobs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于困惑度（perplexity）的简单方法，通过比较微调模型与参考模型在生成文本上的困惑度差距，来揭示大语言模型微调后的隐藏行为（如后门、虚假事实等），无需访问模型内部或预设行为假设，且适用于API受限的模型。
AI.motivation: 微调可能引入有害或危险行为，研究者需要"模型生物体"来研究这些风险，但如何识别这些微调行为仍然困难。现有方法往往需要模型内部信息或对行为有先验假设，缺乏简单通用的检测手段。
AI.method: 1. 使用通用语料中的短随机前缀（prefills）让微调模型生成多样化的补全文本。2. 计算微调模型与参考模型之间的困惑度差距（perplexity gap），并按此差距降序排列补全文本。困惑度差距最大的补全文本往往能揭示微调目标。
AI.result: 在76个模型生物体（0.5B到70B参数）上测试，包括后门模型、合成文档微调模型、对抗训练模型以及涌现失调模型。大多数情况下，该方法能在排名靠前的结果中揭示微调目标。其中，合成文档微调模型和精确短语训练的模型尤其容易被检测。即使没有精确的微调前检查点，使用不同系列的信任参考模型也能有效替代。
AI.conclusion: 该方法仅需微调模型的next-token概率，与API网关模型兼容（只要暴露token logprobs），是一种简单、高效、无需模型内部信息的微调行为检测手段。

title: MAGIC: Multi-Step Advantage-Gated Causal Influence for Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: A key challenge in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) lies in designing learning signals that effectively promote coordination among agents. Designing such signals necessitates the ability to quantify the true, long-term causal influence between agents. To address this, we introduce Multi-step Advantage-Gated Interventional Causal MARL (MAGIC), a framework that extracts multi-step causal influences between agents and selectively converts them into intrinsic rewards. MAGIC uses causal intervention with conditional mutual information to quantify long-horizon agent influence, and introduces an advantage-based gating mechanism to ensure exploration is directed toward beneficial, goal-aligned behaviors. Experiments across multiple standard MARL benchmarks and task families, including MPE and SMAC/SMACv2, demonstrate that MAGIC outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin, achieving an improvement of at least 10.1% in the main evaluation metric.

AI.tldr: MAGIC框架通过多步因果干预和优势门控机制，将智能体间的长期因果影响转化为内在奖励，在MPE和SMAC等MARL基准测试中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习中缺乏有效量化智能体间长期因果影响的信号设计方法，难以促进智能体间的协作。
AI.method: 提出MAGIC框架：1）利用条件互信息进行因果干预，量化多步智能体影响；2）引入基于优势的门控机制，引导探索朝向有益、与目标一致的行为。
AI.result: 在MPE和SMAC/SMACv2等多个标准MARL基准测试中，MAGIC在主要评估指标上至少提升10.1%，显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC通过因果干预和优势门控有效提取长期因果影响并指导协作探索，为MARL中协调信号的设计提供了新思路。

title: From Euler to Dormand-Prince: ODE Solvers for Flow Matching Generative Models
summary: Sampling from Flow Matching generative models requires solving an ordinary differential equation (ODE) whose computational cost is dominated by neural network forward passes. We derive four classical ODE solvers -- Euler, Explicit Midpoint, Classical Runge-Kutta (RK4), and Dormand-Prince 5(4) -- from first principles via Taylor expansion, implement them from scratch in PyTorch, and systematically benchmark their efficiency on Conditional Flow Matching tasks ranging from 2D toy distributions to MNIST digits. On the quantitative side, we use sliced Wasserstein distance to construct NFE-quality Pareto frontiers,finding that RK4 at 80 function evaluations achieves sample quality comparable to Euler at 200. Beyond reproducing known convergence rates, we report two empirical observations: (1) the Jacobian eigenvalue spectrum of the learned velocity field stiffens sharply near t=1, explaining why the adaptive Dormand-Prince solver automatically concentrates its step budget at the end of the trajectory; (2) the quality gap between low-order and high-order solvers widens for undertrained and smaller models, indicating that solver choice matters most when the model is imperfect. Code and all experiment scripts are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文从第一性原理推导了四种经典ODE求解器（Euler、Explicit Midpoint、RK4、Dormand-Prince 5(4)）并在PyTorch中实现，系统评估了它们在条件流匹配任务上的效率。发现RK4在80次函数评估时可达Euler在200次时的样本质量，并揭示了速度场Jacobian特征值谱在t=1附近急剧变硬，以及求解器选择对欠训练和较小模型影响更大。
AI.motivation: 流匹配生成模型的采样成本主要由神经网络前向传播决定，因此需要系统研究不同ODE求解器的效率与质量权衡，以降低采样成本。
AI.method: 从泰勒展开出发推导Euler、Explicit Midpoint、RK4和Dormand-Prince 5(4)四种求解器，在PyTorch中实现，并在2D toy分布和MNIST等条件流匹配任务上使用切片Wasserstein距离构建NFE-质量Pareto前沿进行系统评估。
AI.result: (1) RK4在80次函数评估时达到Euler在200次时的样本质量；(2) 速度场的Jacobian特征值谱在t=1附近急剧变硬，自适应Dormand-Prince求解器因此自动将步长预算集中在轨迹末端；(3) 低阶与高阶求解器之间的质量差距在欠训练和较小模型中更大。
AI.conclusion: 高阶求解器在有限计算预算下显著优于低阶求解器，且对模型质量不完美的情况尤为重要；Jacobian谱分析为自适应步长策略提供了理论依据。

title: ClinicBot: A Guideline-Grounded Clinical Chatbot with Prioritized Evidence RAG and Verifiable Citations
summary: Clinical diagnosis requires answers that are accurate, verifiable, and explicitly grounded in official guidelines. While large language models excel at natural language processing, their tendency to hallucinate undermines their utility in high-stakes medical contexts where precision is essential. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat all evidence equally, producing noisy context and generic answers misaligned with clinical practice. We present ClinicBot, an AI system that translates guideline recommendations into trustworthy clinical support through three key advances: (1) structured extraction of clinical guidelines into semantic units (recommendations, tables, definitions, narrative) with explicit provenance, (2) evidence prioritization that ranks content by clinical significance and guideline structure rather than textual similarity, and (3) a web-based interface that presents concise, actionable answers with verifiable evidence. We will demonstrate ClinicBot using diabetes questions from real patients and an additional diabetes risk assessment tool that is faithful to the American Diabetes Association (ADA) Standards of Care in Diabetes (2025). The demonstration will illustrate how semantic knowledge extraction and hierarchical evidence ranking can reliably operate in a multi-agent setting to process complex clinical guidelines at scale.

AI.tldr: ClinicBot是一个基于RAG的AI系统，通过结构化提取临床指南语义单元、按临床重要性排序证据、提供可验证答案，解决了LLM在医疗诊断中的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗场景中存在幻觉问题，而现有RAG系统不加区分地对待所有证据，产生的上下文嘈杂且答案与临床实践不符，无法满足医疗诊断对准确性、可验证性和指南依据的要求。
AI.method: (1) 将临床指南结构化提取为推荐、表格、定义、叙述等语义单元并保留出处；(2) 按临床意义和指南结构而非文本相似度对证据排序；(3) 构建Web界面呈现简洁可操作的答案并提供可验证证据。
AI.result: 将使用真实患者的糖尿病问题以及基于ADA 2025糖尿病护理标准的风险评估工具进行演示，展示语义知识提取和分层证据排序在多智能体环境中处理大规模复杂临床指南的能力。
AI.conclusion: ClinicBot通过结构化知识提取和分层证据排序，能够在多智能体环境中可靠地处理大规模临床指南，为临床决策提供可信赖的支持。

title: Single Image Defogging Using a Fourth-Order Telegraph PDE Guided by Physical Haze Modeling
summary: In real-world scenarios, image defogging is an inverse problem due to unknown scene depth, atmospheric scattering, and the common absence of ground truth . To resolve the issue, we propose a hybrid defogging model that integrates a fourth-order nonlinear PDE with a physical haze formation model. We used Dark Channel Prior to estimate atmospheric parameters and to generate a guidance image, while the final restoration is performed via a fourth-order PDE-based evolution. A fourth-order PDE of the type telegraph is then evolved, incorporating an edge-adaptive diffusion coefficient and a fidelity term weighted by the transmission map. Fourth-order diffusion effectively suppresses haze while preserving structural details, and the hyperbolic formulation improves numerical stability and convergence behavior. We use relative error norm criteria for the convergence of our PDE. The proposed method is compared with Dark Channel prior, modified Dark Channel prior, and variational-based single-image defogging techniques. When we have ground truth available, we use MSE and SSIM for quantitative evaluation, whereas no-reference metrics, including FADE, Contrast Restoration Index, Average Gradient, and Entropy, are applied to real-world foggy images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid PDE-based method provides comparable visual quality and maintains structural details.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合四阶非线性PDE与物理雾霾形成模型的混合去雾方法，利用暗通道先验估计大气参数和生成引导图像，通过四阶电报型PDE进化实现图像恢复，在保持结构细节的同时有效抑制雾霾。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中图像去雾是一个逆问题，存在场景深度未知、大气散射以及缺乏真实参考图像的挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾去雾效果和结构细节保持。
AI.method: 1) 使用暗通道先验估计大气参数并生成引导图像；2) 构建四阶非线性PDE（电报型），结合边缘自适应扩散系数和由透射图加权的保真项；3) 采用相对误差范数准则作为PDE收敛条件；4) 最终通过四阶PDE进化实现图像恢复。
AI.result: 与暗通道先验、改进暗通道先验和基于变分的单图像去雾方法相比，该方法在视觉质量上表现相当，并能更好地保持结构细节。有真实参考时使用MSE和SSIM评估，无参考时使用FADE、对比度恢复指数、平均梯度和熵等指标。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合PDE去雾方法能有效抑制雾霾并保持结构细节，四阶扩散和双曲型公式提高了数值稳定性和收敛性，在定量和定性评估中均表现良好。

title: Can AI Debias the News? LLM Interventions Improve Cross-Partisan Receptivity but LLMs Overestimate Their Own Effectiveness
summary: Partisan news media erode cross-partisan trust, but large language models (LLMs) offer a potential means of debiasing such content at scale. Across two pre-registered experiments, we tested whether LLM-generated debiasing of liberal news headlines could improve conservative readers' trust-relevant judgments. Study 1 found that subtle lexical debiasing (replacing emotive words with more moderate synonyms) had no effect on any outcome. Study 2 found that a more substantive reframing intervention significantly increased conservatives' perceived trustworthiness, completeness, and willingness to engage with liberal news headlines, without producing a backfire effect among a sample of liberals. In Study 1, the intervention produced robust effects among LLM-simulated silicon participants, whereas it had no impact on human readers. In Study 2, the intervention's effects among silicon participants aligned directionally with human responses but were significantly larger in magnitude for some outcomes. Moderation analyses revealed that the model's implicit theory of who responds to debiasing diverged from the psychological profile that actually predicted human responsiveness. These findings demonstrate that LLM-based debiasing can improve cross-partisan receptivity when targeting ideological framing rather than surface-level language, but that current models lack both the quantitative accuracy and qualitative psychological fidelity to evaluate their own interventions without human oversight.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型可以通过重构意识形态框架（而非仅替换情感词汇）来减少党派新闻偏见，提升跨党派信任，但当前模型无法准确评估自身干预效果，需人类监督。
AI.motivation: 党派新闻媒体削弱了跨党派信任，研究者希望探索LLM是否能大规模去偏新闻内容，以改善不同政治立场读者对对立媒体内容的信任判断。
AI.method: 进行两项预注册实验：研究1对自由派新闻标题进行词汇层面去偏（替换情绪化词语为温和同义词）；研究2进行更实质性的框架重构干预。同时使用人类被试和LLM模拟的硅基参与者进行对比。
AI.result: 研究1：词汇去偏对人类无显著效果，但对硅基参与者效果显著。研究2：框架重构显著提高了保守派对自由派新闻标题的可信度、完整性和参与意愿，且未在自由派中产生反弹效应；硅基参与者效果与人类方向一致但部分指标效应量更大。调节分析显示模型对谁会对去偏做出反应的隐含理论偏离了实际人类心理特征。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的去偏能够改善跨党派接受度，但须针对意识形态框架而非表层语言；当前模型缺乏定量准确性和定性心理保真度，无法在没有人类监督的情况下评估自身干预效果。

title: Quality-Aware Exploration Budget Allocation for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) requires agents to discover joint strategies in a combinatorially large state-action space, yet effective coordination configurations are exceedingly rare. Intrinsic motivation, which augments task rewards with novelty bonuses, is a popular approach for driving exploration, but its effectiveness hinges on the exploration intensity $β$, where too large a value overwhelms the task signal and causes coordination collapse, while too small a value prevents discovery of rare strategies. We address two complementary challenges: adapting $β$ globally over training, and allocating the exploration budget across agents whose intrinsic reward signals vary in reliability. Our framework combines a return-conditioned sigmoid schedule (RCB) for global intensity control with a per-agent Reward Signal Quality (RSQ) metric that concentrates the exploration budget on agents with reliable signals. The core insight is that agents receiving noisy intrinsic rewards should explore less aggressively, and this allocation can be determined automatically from signal-to-noise statistics. Successor Distance (SD), a quasimetric intrinsic reward, naturally produces distinguishable per-agent signal quality, completing the framework with convergence and ordering preservation guarantees. On seven cooperative benchmarks (MPE, SMAX, MABrax), our method achieves top-tier returns across all environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应探索强度调控框架，结合全局β调度（RCB）和基于信号质量的智能体预算分配（RSQ），在合作MARL中高效发现稀有联合策略，并在多个基准中达到顶尖性能。
AI.motivation: 合作MARL中有效协调配置极为稀少，内在动机的探索强度β难以平衡——过大导致协调崩溃，过小无法发现稀有策略。现有方法缺乏对β的全局自适应调节以及跨智能体的探索预算合理分配。
AI.method: 提出RCB（基于回报条件的Sigmoid调度）全局调控探索强度β，以及RSQ（奖励信号质量指标）按智能体信号可靠性分配探索预算。核心基于Successor Distance（SD）准度量内在奖励，实现智能体信号质量的自动区分。
AI.result: 在MPE、SMAX、MABrax等七个合作基准上，方法在所有环境中均达到顶尖回报性能。
AI.conclusion: 论文证明：接收噪声内在奖励的智能体应减少探索，且这种分配可从信噪比统计中自动确定。SD提供了可区分的信号质量，并具有收敛性和序保持保证。

title: Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions
summary: Entropic regularized optimal transport (OT) via the Sinkhorn algorithm has become a fundamental tool in machine learning, yet existing implementations either suffer from numerical instability for small regularization parameters or incur significant overhead from deep learning frameworks. We present FastSinkhorn, a lightweight, native CUDA implementation of the log-domain Sinkhorn algorithm that combines warp-level shuffle reductions with shared-memory tiling to achieve high GPU utilization without sacrificing numerical stability. Our solver operates entirely in the log-domain, enabling robust computation for regularization parameters as small as epsilon = 10^{-4} where standard-domain methods fail. On dense OT problems with n = m = 8192, our implementation achieves 12x speedup over the widely-used POT library and 5.9x speedup over GPU-accelerated PyTorch baselines, while consuming only 256 MB of GPU memory. We validate our solver on image color transfer, 3D point cloud matching, and convergence analysis, demonstrating that native CUDA kernels with careful numerical treatment provide a practical and efficient foundation for large-scale optimal transport computation.

AI.tldr: FastSinkhorn是一个轻量级、原生CUDA实现的log-domain Sinkhorn算法，通过warp-level shuffle归约和共享内存分片实现高GPU利用率与数值稳定性，在密集OT问题上相比POT库实现12倍加速，仅需256MB显存。
AI.motivation: 现有熵正则化最优传输实现存在两个主要问题：1) 小正则化参数下数值不稳定；2) 深度学习框架带来的显著额外开销。需要一种既稳定又高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 采用原生CUDA实现log-domain Sinkhorn算法，结合warp-level shuffle归约操作和共享内存分片技术，完全在对数域中计算，支持epsilon=10^{-4}的小正则化参数。
AI.result: 在n=m=8192的密集OT问题上：相比POT库实现12倍加速，相比GPU加速的PyTorch基线实现5.9倍加速，仅消耗256MB GPU内存。
AI.conclusion: 原生CUDA核函数配合精细的数值处理，为大规模最优传输计算提供了实用且高效的基础方案，在图像颜色迁移、3D点云匹配等任务中验证了有效性。

title: Accelerating battery research with an AI interface between FINALES and Kadi4Mat
comment: Main manuscript: 21 pages, 9 figures. Supporting material: 3 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to "Batteries & Supercaps", currently under revision
summary: The time-consuming formation process critically impacts the longevity of sodium-ion coin cells and End Of Life (EOL) performance. This study aims to optimize formation protocols for duration efficiency, targeting high-performance outcomes while minimizing the number of experiments to reduce resource consumption and accelerate discovery. Specifically, we consider two potentially competing objectives: minimizing formation time and maximizing EOL performance. Beyond this application focus, we also present a methodological contribution: a framework designed to enable interoperability between the FINALES and Kadi RDM ecosystems, which we employ to tackle our optimization problem. In this setup, the FINALES framework orchestrates experiment planning and execution on the POLiS MAP, while an active-learning agent implemented within Kadi4Mat guides experiment selection, using multi-objective batched Bayesian optimization to efficiently explore the parameter space. This interoperability enhancement enables coordinated, distributed collaboration across automated systems and human-operated workflows, bridging multiple research centers. Using this approach, we iteratively explore the trade-off between formation time and EOL performance and identify candidate solutions approximating the Pareto front. The resulting workflow demonstrates the capability of interoperable infrastructures to facilitate data-driven optimization in battery research, and establishes a transferable framework applicable to diverse materials science and engineering optimization tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过集成FINALES和Kadi RDM两个数据生态系统，采用多目标批量贝叶斯优化方法，在减少实验次数的同时，探索钠离子电池化成时间与寿命终止性能之间的权衡，找到帕累托最优解。
AI.motivation: 钠离子电池化成过程耗时长，严重影响电池寿命和性能。传统优化方法实验次数多、资源消耗大，亟需高效的协议优化方案。
AI.method: 提出FINALES与Kadi RDM互操作框架：FINALES负责实验规划与执行（POLiS MAP），Kadi4Mat内的主动学习代理使用多目标批量贝叶斯优化指导实验选择，迭代探索帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 成功识别出逼近帕累托前沿的候选解决方案，展示了互操作基础设施在数据驱动优化中的能力。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个可迁移的跨中心协作框架，不仅优化了电池化成协议，也为材料科学与工程领域的多目标优化任务提供了通用方法。

title: Adversarial Flow Matching for Imperceptible Attacks on End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving (AD) is evolving towards end-to-end (E2E) frameworks through two primary paradigms: monolithic models exemplified by Vision-Language-Action (VLA), and specialized modular architectures. Despite their divergent designs, both paradigms increasingly rely on Transformer backbones for complex reasoning, potentially causing a shared vulnerability: visually imperceptible perturbations can manipulate E2E AD models into hazardous maneuvers by targeting the Transformer module. Most existing adversarial attack approaches against AD systems operate under white-box or black-box settings; yet, they typically necessitate full model transparency, or suffer from either prohibitive query latency or limited attack transferability. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Flow Matching (AFM), a novel gray-box attack framework that exploits Transformer structural vulnerabilities in E2E AD models. AFM enables efficient one-step generation of adversarial examples via a neural average velocity field. Additionally, the proposed technique yields effective and visually imperceptible attacks by synergistically perturbing the generative latent space and the neural average velocity field. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AFM achieves a superior trade-off between attack effectiveness and imperceptibility: it substantially degrades the performance of both VLA and modular AD agents across various scenarios compared to baselines, while maintaining state-of-the-art visual imperceptibility. Furthermore, adversarial examples generated by AFM exhibit robust cross-model transferability, indicating that AFM closely approximates a black-box attack setting while requiring only the prior knowledge that the target AD model incorporates a Transformer-based module.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为对抗流匹配（AFM）的新型灰盒攻击框架，通过利用E2E自动驾驶模型中Transformer模块的结构脆弱性，实现高效、视觉隐蔽且具有跨模型迁移性的对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型（包括VLA和模块化架构）普遍依赖Transformer骨干进行复杂推理，导致共享的脆弱性：视觉上不可察觉的扰动可通过攻击Transformer模块操纵模型执行危险操作。现有攻击方法在白盒/黑盒设置下存在模型透明度要求高、查询延迟大或迁移性差等问题。
AI.method: 提出AFM框架，通过神经平均速度场实现单步生成对抗样本；通过联合扰动生成潜空间和神经平均速度场来实现有效且视觉隐蔽的攻击。
AI.result: AFM在攻击有效性和不可察觉性之间取得了优越平衡：在多种场景下显著降低VLA和模块化AD智能体的性能，同时保持最先进的视觉不可察觉性；生成的对抗样本具有鲁棒的跨模型迁移性。
AI.conclusion: AFM仅需目标AD模型包含Transformer模块的先验知识，即可近似达到黑盒攻击的效果，揭示了E2E自动驾驶模型在面对结构级对抗攻击时的脆弱性。

title: CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
summary: Medical large language model (LLM) evaluations rely on simplified, exam-style benchmarks that rarely reflect the ambiguity of real-world medical inquiries. We introduce the CLinical Evaluation of Ambiguity and Reliability (CLEAR) framework, which assesses how decision-space presentation, ambiguity, and uncertainty affect LLMs' reasoning on medical benchmarks. CLEAR systematically perturbs (1) the number of plausible answer options, (2) the presence of a ground truth or abstention option, and (3) the semantic framing of answer options. Applying CLEAR on three benchmarks evaluated across 17 LLMs reveals three notable limitations of existing evaluation methods. First, increasing the number of plausible answers degrades a model's ability to identify the correct answer and abstain against incorrect ones. Second, this lack of caution intensifies as the framing of abstention shifts from assertive rejection like "None of the Above" to uncertainty admission like "I don't know" (IDK). Notably, just including IDK in the answer space increases incorrect answer selections. Lastly, we formalize the performance gap between identifying the correct answer and abstaining from incorrect ones as the humility deficit, which worsens with model scale. Our findings reveal limitations in standard medical benchmarks and underscore that scaling alone does not resolve LLM reliability issues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CLEAR框架，通过系统性扰动决策空间呈现、模糊性和不确定性来评估医学大语言模型的推理能力。在17个LLM上的实验揭示了三个关键发现：(1)增加合理答案数量会降低模型识别正确答案和弃权的能力；(2)弃权选项的语义框架从"以上都不是"变为"我不知道"时，模型会更不谨慎；(3)模型越大，"谦逊赤字"（正确识别与正确弃权之间的差距）越严重。研究表明仅靠模型规模扩展无法解决LLM的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学大语言模型评估过度依赖简化、考试风格的基准测试，无法反映真实医疗咨询中的模糊性和不确定性，因此需要一种更贴近临床现实的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出CLEAR框架，通过三个维度的系统扰动进行评估：(1)可行答案选项的数量；(2)是否存在真实答案或弃权选项；(3)答案选项的语义框架。在17个LLM上对三个医学基准进行测试。
AI.result: (1)增加可行答案数量会降低模型识别正确答案和弃权的能力；(2)当弃权选项从"以上都不是"变为"我不知道"时，模型错误选择答案的行为增加；(3)提出"谦逊赤字"概念，发现模型规模越大，该赤字越严重。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了标准医学基准的局限性，表明仅靠扩大模型规模无法解决LLM的可靠性问题，需要在评估和训练中纳入对模糊性和不确定性的处理。

title: Coopetition-Gym v1: A Formally Grounded Platform for Mixed-Motive Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning under Strategic Coopetition
comment: 82 pages, 14 figures, 9 tables, 51 references. AI-track technical report companion to the four-paper foundational series; should be read with arXiv:2510.18802, arXiv:2510.24909, arXiv:2601.16237, and arXiv:2604.01240. Reproducibility package and source code: https://github.com/vikpant/strategic-coopetition. Datasets released under CC-BY-4.0 at https://huggingface.co/vikpant
summary:
We present Coopetition-Gym v1, a benchmark platform for mixed-motive multi-agent reinforcement learning under strategic coopetition. The platform comprises twenty environments organized into four mechanism classes that correspond to four foundational technical reports: interdependence and complementarity (arXiv:2510.18802), trust and reputation dynamics (arXiv:2510.24909), collective action and loyalty (arXiv:2601.16237), and sequential interaction and reciprocity (arXiv:2604.01240). Each environment carries a closed-form payoff structure and a calibrated interdependence matrix derived from the corresponding report.
  Every environment exposes a parameterized reward layer configurable across three structurally distinct modes (private, integrated, cooperative). This separation of payoff from reward enables reward-type ablation, the platform's principal methodological apparatus. Four of the twenty environments are calibrated against historically documented coopetitive relationships and reproduce their outcomes at 98.3, 81.7, 86.7, and 87.3 percent on the validation rubric (Samsung-Sony LCD, Renault-Nissan Alliance, Apache HTTP Server, Apple iOS App Store).
  The platform exposes Gymnasium, PettingZoo Parallel, and PettingZoo AEC interfaces and ships 126 reference algorithms: 16 learning algorithms, 7 game-theoretic oracles, 2 heuristic baselines, and 101 constant-action policies. A reference experimental study trained the 16 learning algorithms on every environment under every reward configuration with seven random seeds, producing a 25,708-run training corpus and a 1,116-run behavioral audit corpus, both released under CC-BY-4.0 with Croissant 1.0 metadata. Coopetition-Gym v1 is the first platform to combine continuous-action mixed-motive environments, parameterized reward mutuality, calibrated interdependence coefficients, game-theoretic oracle baselines, and validated case studies.

AI.tldr: Coopetition-Gym v1是一个面向混合动机多智能体强化学习的基准平台，包含20个环境、4种机制类别、126个参考算法，并发布了25,708次训练和1,116次行为审计的语料库。该平台首次将连续动作混合动机环境、参数化互惠奖励、校准的相互依赖系数、博弈论oracle基线及验证案例研究整合在一起。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习基准大多聚焦于纯合作或纯竞争场景，缺乏对"竞合"（既合作又竞争）混合动机问题的系统性支持。作者旨在填补这一空白，提供一个可复现、可消融的标准化评估平台。
AI.method: 平台设计了20个环境，分属四个机制类别（相互依赖与互补、信任与声誉、集体行动与忠诚、序贯交互与互惠）。每个环境具有闭式收益结构和校准的相互依赖矩阵。奖励层分为三种模式（私有、集成、协作），支持奖励类型消融实验。提供Gymnasium、PettingZoo两种接口，并包含16种学习算法、7种博弈论oracle、2种启发式基线和101种恒定动作策略。
AI.result: 四个历史案例（三星-索尼LCD联盟、雷诺-日产联盟、Apache HTTP服务器、苹果iOS App Store）的校准准确率分别为98.3%、81.7%、86.7%和87.3%。参考实验生成了25,708次训练和1,116次行为审计的数据集，全部以CC-BY-4.0协议发布。
AI.conclusion: Coopetition-Gym v1是首个整合连续动作混合动机环境、参数化奖励互惠性、校准相互依赖系数、博弈论oracle基线和验证案例研究的平台，为竞合场景下的多智能体强化学习研究提供了标准化基准。

title: GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) read an image and produce text in a single forward pass, whereas radiologists typically inspect an image several times and consult the literature before writing a report. We introduce GAZE (Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation), a framework that lets a medical VLM work in this iterative way by calling viewer-level tools (zoom, windowing, contrast, edge detection) and two retrieval tools backed by the U.S. National Library of Medicine (PubMed for medical literature, Open-i for radiological images), with structured outputs validated against a schema and full tool-call traces recorded for auditability. On NOVA, a benchmark of 906 brain MRI cases covering 281 rare neurological conditions, GAZE reaches 58.2 mean average precision (mAP) at intersection-over-union (IoU) 0.3 for lesion localisation and 34.9% Top-1 diagnostic accuracy under a joint protocol that scores captioning, diagnosis, and localisation from the image alone, without task-specific fine-tuning. Before any tool is used, structured prompting and schema-validated outputs already improve over the published Gemini 2.0 Flash baseline (20.2 to 29.4 mAP@0.3), so framework design is itself an experimental variable. Tool use helps rare pathologies disproportionately: the fraction of cases with IoU > 0.3 rises from 17% to 58% for diagnoses with three or fewer examples versus 25% to 68% for common conditions ($\geq$10 cases), with gains tracking engagement (Gemini 3 Flash: Cohen's d = 0.79, 11.8 tool calls per case; Gemini 2.0 Flash: tools used in 8.2% of cases, no significant benefit). Retrieval ablations additionally reveal a model-dependent trade-off in which gains in diagnosis can coincide with losses in localisation, reinforcing the case for joint evaluation of diagnosis, localisation, and captioning in medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: GAZE框架让医学视觉语言模型像放射科医生一样迭代工作：调用查看器工具（缩放、窗宽窗位、对比度、边缘检测）和检索工具（PubMed、Open-i），在无需任务微调的情况下，在906例脑MRI罕见病数据集上达到58.2 mAP@0.3的病灶定位和34.9%的Top-1诊断准确率。工具使用对罕见病理帮助更大，且检索存在模型依赖的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM一次性读图生成文本，而放射科医生会反复查看图像并查阅文献，两者工作方式存在根本差异。
AI.method: 提出GAZE框架，使医学VLM通过调用四种查看器工具（缩放、窗宽窗位、对比度、边缘检测）和两种检索工具（PubMed医学文献、Open-i放射影像）进行迭代推理，输出经schema验证的结构化结果，并记录完整的工具调用轨迹以供审计。
AI.result: 在NOVA基准（906例脑MRI，281种罕见病）上，GAZE达到58.2 mAP@0.3的病灶定位和34.9% Top-1诊断准确率。框架设计本身即为实验变量——结构化提示和schema验证将基线从20.2提升至29.4 mAP@0.3。工具使用对罕见病帮助更大（IoU>0.3比例从17%升至58% vs 常见病25%升至68%），但存在模型依赖的权衡。
AI.conclusion: GAZE证明了迭代式工具调用在医学VLM中的有效性，并揭示了检索工具带来的诊断-定位权衡，强调了在医学VLM评估中联合考察诊断、定位和字幕生成的必要性。

title: Effect-Transparent Governance for AI Workflow Architectures: Semantic Preservation, Expressive Minimality, and Decidability Boundaries
summary: We present a machine-checked formalization of structurally governed AI workflow architectures and prove that effect-level governance can be imposed without reducing internal computational expressivity. Using Interaction Trees in Rocq 8.19, we define a governance operator G that mediates all effectful directives, including memory access, external calls, and oracle (LLM) queries. Our development compiles with 0 admitted lemmas and consists of 36 modules, ~12,000 lines of Rocq, and 454 theorems. We establishseven properties: (P1) governed Turing completeness, (P2) governed oracle expressivity, (P3) a decidability boundary in which governance predicates are total and closed under Boolean composition while semantic program properties remain non-trivial and undecidable by governance, (P4) goal preservation for permitted executions, (P5) expressive minimality of primitive capabilities (compute, memory, reasoning, external call, observability), (P6) subsumption asymmetry showing structural governance strictly subsumes content-level filtering, and (P7) semantic transparency: on all executions where governance permits, the governed interpretation is observationally equivalent (modulo governance-only events) to the ungoverned interpretation. Together, these results show that governance and computational expressivity are orthogonal dimensions: governance constrains the effect boundary of programs while remaining semantically transparent to internal computation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Rocq形式化证明，结构化的AI工作流治理可以在不牺牲计算表达能力的前提下实现，治理与计算表达力是正交维度。
AI.motivation: 如何在AI工作流架构中施加效果级别的治理（governance），同时保持内部计算的完全表达能力，是一个尚未被形式化验证的问题。
AI.method: 使用Interaction Trees在Rocq 8.19中定义治理算子G，对内存访问、外部调用、LLM查询等所有效果指令进行中介，构建了36个模块、约12,000行代码、454个定理的形式化系统。
AI.result: 建立了七条核心性质：图灵完备性被治理保留、oracle表达能力被治理保留、治理谓词的可判定性边界、允许执行的目标保持、原始能力的最小表达性、结构治理严格优于内容过滤、以及治理的语义透明性。
AI.conclusion: 治理与计算表达力是正交的——治理约束程序的效果边界，但对内部计算保持语义透明，二者可以兼得。

title: Intervention-Based Self-Supervised Learning: A Causal Probe Paradigm for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables convenient non-contact physiological measurement. Existing Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods commonly fall into a correlation trap: they tend to learn the most dominant periodic signals in the data, such as high-energy motion or illumination noise, rather than the faint, true rPPG signal, leading to poor model generalization. To address this, we propose a new SSL paradigm, Physiological Causal Probing (PCP), which treats the latent rPPG signal as the underlying physical source and the resulting pixel chrominance variations as its visual manifestation. Its core idea is to shift from passive correlation learning to active, precise intervention: it intervenes on the video based on a proposed rPPG hypothesis, and verifies whether the post-intervention changes match physical expectations. We propose the Interv-rPPG framework to implement PCP: an rPPG extractor named PhysMambaFormer hypothesizes the rPPG signal, while a Controllable Physiological Signal Editor conducts precise chrominance-domain interventions on videos based on this hypothesis. Interv-rPPG validates the physical realism of the hypothesis through `Falsifiability via Nulling' and `Axiomatic Equivariance'. Our editor achieves precise editing of the rPPG signal by intervening in the low-frequency chrominance components of the video. Our method improves both in-domain and cross-domain performance on challenging datasets such as VIPL-HR and MMPD. Furthermore, it surpasses the supervised baseline in complex cross-dataset settings, while remaining competitive on clean datasets where the intervention mechanism may introduce slight residual chrominance noise. Extensive experiments, including diagnostic analysis of nuisance sensitivity, demonstrate that the PCP paradigm effectively resists motion and illumination artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Physiological Causal Probing (PCP)的自监督学习新范式，通过因果干预机制解决现有rPPG方法容易陷入"相关陷阱"（学习到运动或光照噪声而非真实rPPG信号）的问题。基于PCP实现的Interv-rPPG框架包含PhysMambaFormer信号提取器和可控生理信号编辑器，通过"可证伪性归零"和"公理等变性"验证信号的真实性，在复杂跨数据集场景下甚至超越有监督基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督rPPG方法容易陷入相关陷阱，即倾向于学习数据中最强的周期信号（如高能量运动或光照噪声），而非微弱的真实rPPG信号，导致模型泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出PCP范式，将rPPG信号视为潜在物理源，像素色度变化视为视觉表现。核心是从被动相关性学习转向主动精确干预：基于rPPG假设对视频进行干预，验证干预后的变化是否符合物理预期。Interv-rPPG框架包含PhysMambaFormer（假设rPPG信号）和可控生理信号编辑器（对视频低频谱色度分量进行精确干预），通过"可证伪性归零"和"公理等变性"验证假设。
AI.result: 在VIPL-HR和MMPD等挑战性数据集上，域内和跨域性能均有提升；在复杂跨数据集设置中超越有监督基线；在干净数据集上因干预机制可能引入轻微色度残留噪声，但仍具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: PCP范式通过因果干预有效抵抗运动伪影和光照干扰，是解决rPPG自监督学习中相关陷阱的有效方案。

title: Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect
summary: We introduce Xiaohongshu Social Comparison Reader Elicitation (XHS-SCoRE), a reader-grounded benchmark for detecting if a text-only Xiaohongshu (RedNote) post elicits UPWARD, DOWNWARD, or NEUTRAL/no clear social comparison from a first-person reader perspective. The task targets a socially meaningful relational signal that is behaviorally real yet not reducible to sentiment. Across prompted LLM classifiers and supervised Chinese encoder baselines, we find a consistent mismatch between generation fluency and reliable detection ability: the signal is textually learnable in-domain, but not robustly accessible to prompt-based classification. Prompted LLM classifiers exhibit stable, interpretable failure modes, especially neutralization of comparison-triggering posts and model-specific directional skew. A controlled pilot further shows that LLM-generated Xiaohongshu-style posts can shift perceived standing and comparison-related affect even when prompt-based detection of the same construct remains fragile. XHS-SCoRE contributes both a benchmark for reader-grounded comparison detection and a diagnostic framework for studying when socially meaningful relational cues remain only partially visible to prompt-based inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了XHS-SCoRE基准，用于检测小红书帖子是否引发向上、向下或无社会比较。研究发现，虽然文本信号在域内可学习，但提示式LLM分类器存在稳定失败模式（倾向中性化和方向性偏差），且LLM生成的内容能影响读者感知，即使模型自身检测能力不足。
AI.motivation: 社会比较是社交媒体中行为真实存在但难以通过情感分析捕捉的信号，现有方法缺乏从读者视角出发的检测基准。作者希望通过构建一个以读者为中心的比较检测基准，揭示生成式LLM在检测此类社会性信号时的能力边界。
AI.method: 构建XHS-SCoRE基准，从第一人称读者视角标注小红书帖子的社会比较类型（向上、向下、中性/无）。使用提示式LLM分类器和监督式中文编码器基线进行对比实验，并设计受控实验评估LLM生成内容对读者感知的影响。
AI.result: 社会比较信号在域内可学习，但提示式LLM分类器检测能力不稳定，存在稳定失败模式：倾向将触发比较的帖子判定为中性，且不同模型存在特定方向性偏差。LLM生成的内容能改变读者感知的立场和比较相关情感，即使提示式检测本身仍脆弱。
AI.conclusion: XHS-SCoRE为读者视角的社会比较检测提供了基准，同时揭示了当社会性关系线索对提示式推理仅部分可见时的诊断框架，表明生成流畅性与可靠检测能力之间存在不一致。

title: SOTOPIA-TOM: Evaluating Information Management in Multi-Agent Interaction with Theory of Mind
summary: As LLM-based agents are increasingly interacting in multi-party settings, they need to properly handle information asymmetry, i.e., knowing when and to whom to disclose information is appropriate. Yet, existing benchmarks fail to measure this ability in realistic multi-party settings. Thus, we introduce SOTOPIA-TOM, a multi-dimensional benchmarking framework to evaluate LLM agents' ability to successfully navigate information asymmetric and privacy sensitive multi-party interactions. We create an interaction environment which enables both public (broadcast) and private (direct message) communication, and craft 160 human-reviewed scenarios across eight industry sectors, each involving 3 to 5 agents with partitioned private knowledge and channel-dependent sharing policies. To measure interaction abilities, we create a multi-dimensional evaluation framework to assess how well agents share useful information, seek missing details, coordinate efficiently, and protect privacy, which we also combine into a composite INFOMGMT metric. Results show that, across 6 LLM backbones and prompting strategies (vanilla, CoT-privacy, and ToM-based interventions), even the largest high-reasoning model (GPT-5) reaches only a 62% INFOMGMT score, which indicates persistent deficiencies in information seeking and privacy-aware decision-making. Additionally, ToM-based interventions more consistently improve the overall coordination-privacy balance (for example, relative to the vanilla baseline, ToM-Coach reduces critical privacy violations on GPT-4o from 9.9% to 2.2% while increasing the composite InfoMgmt score more than 2.5x from 15% to 40%). Overall, SOTOPIA-TOM exposes persistent limitations of current LLM agents in complex, information-asymmetric coordination and provides an extensible testbed for developing more privacy-aware, theory-of-mind capable multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOTOPIA-TOM基准框架，用于评估LLM智能体在多智能体、信息不对称场景下的隐私感知和信息协调能力。实验表明，即使最先进的GPT-5也只达到62%的INFOMGMT得分，而ToM干预策略能显著提升隐私-协调平衡（如GPT-4o的隐私违规从9.9%降至2.2%，InfoMgmt得分从15%提升至40%）。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法衡量LLM智能体在真实多智能体场景中处理信息不对称（即何时向谁披露信息）的能力，亟需一个能够评估隐私敏感多边交互的标准化框架。
AI.method: 构建SOTOPIA-TOM：1）设计支持广播和私信两种通信模式的多智能体交互环境；2）创建160个跨8个行业的人工审核场景（每个场景3-5个智能体，带有分区的私有知识和渠道相关共享策略）；3）提出多维评估框架，涵盖信息分享、信息寻求、协调效率和隐私保护，并聚合为INFOMGMT复合指标。
AI.result: 在6个LLM基座和多种提示策略下，GPT-5仅达62%的INFOMGMT得分。ToM-Coach干预使GPT-4o关键隐私违规从9.9%降至2.2%，InfoMgmt得分从15%提升至40%。
AI.conclusion: SOTOPIA-TOM揭示了当前LLM智能体在复杂信息不对称协调中的持续局限性，并为开发更隐私感知、具备心智理论能力的多智能体系统提供了可扩展测试平台。

title: StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Code and model weights will be released upon acceptance
summary: AI-generated content (AIGC) detectors are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as academic integrity screening, yet their reliability rests on a fundamental paradox: as language models are trained on human-written corpora, the statistical boundary between AI and human writing will inevitably dissolve as models improve. Commercial incentives have further distorted this landscape -- detection services and "de-AIification" tools often operate within the same supply chain, replacing evaluation of content quality with judgment of content origin. We present StyleShield, the first flow matching framework for conditional text style transfer, operating directly in continuous token embedding space via a DiT backbone with zero-initialized cross-attention adapters conditioned on frozen Qwen-7B representations. At inference, we adapt the SDEdit paradigm from image synthesis to text embeddings, with a single parameter gamma providing smooth continuous control over the evasion-preservation trade-off. On a multi-domain Chinese benchmark, StyleShield achieves 94.6% evasion against the training detector and >=99% against three unseen detectors, maintaining 0.928 semantic similarity. We further introduce RateAudit, a document-level scheduling algorithm that demonstrates detection-rate verdicts can be set to arbitrary values, directly questioning the reliability of score-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了AIGC检测的悖论：随着语言模型进步，AI与人类写作的统计边界必然消失。作者提出StyleShield框架——首个基于流匹配的条件文本风格迁移方法，通过连续token嵌入空间和DiT骨干网络实现，能有效绕过检测器。同时提出RateAudit算法，证明基于检测率的判定可被任意操控，质疑了评分检测的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有AIGC检测器存在根本性悖论：语言模型基于人类语料训练，随模型能力提升，AI与人类写作的统计边界必然趋于消失。同时，检测服务与"去AI化"工具常处于同一商业供应链中，将"内容质量"评估置换为"内容来源"判断，亟需质疑检测范式的可靠性。
AI.method: StyleShield是基于流匹配的条件文本风格迁移框架，采用DiT骨干网络，在连续token嵌入空间中操作，通过零初始化交叉注意力适配器，以冻结的Qwen-7B表示为条件。推理阶段借鉴图像合成的SDEdit范式，用单一参数gamma平滑控制规避与保留的权衡。另提出RateAudit文档级调度算法。
AI.result: 在多领域中文基准上，StyleShield对训练检测器实现94.6%的规避率，对三个未见检测器实现>=99%规避率，同时保持0.928的语义相似度。RateAudit算法证明检测率判定可被设为任意值。
AI.conclusion: AIGC检测存在根本性悖论，无法从根本上可靠区分AI生成与人类写作内容。StyleShield的高规避率和RateAudit对判定结果的操控能力，直接对评分检测范式的可靠性提出质疑，呼吁重新审视检测机制。

title: Algebraic Semantics of Governed Execution: Monoidal Categories, Effect Algebras, and Coterminous Boundaries
comment: 26 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Companion proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live
summary: We present an algebraic semantics for governed execution in which governance is axiomatized, compositional, and coterminous with expressibility. The framework, mechanized in 32 Rocq modules (~12,000 lines, 454 theorems, 0 admitted), is built on interaction trees and parameterized coinduction. A three-axiom GovernanceAlgebra record (safety, transparency, properness) induces a symmetric monoidal category with verified pentagon, triangle, and hexagon coherence, where every tensor composition preserves governance. An algebraic effect system constrains the handler algebra so that only governance-preserving handlers can be constructed in the safe fragment; programs in the empty capability set provably emit only observability directives. Capability-indexed composition bundles programs with machine-checked capability bounds, and a dual guarantee theorem establishes that within_caps and gov_safe hold simultaneously under all composition operators. The capstone result is the coterminous boundary: within our formal model, every program expressible via the four primitive morphism constructors is governed under interpretation, and every governed program is the image of such a program. Turing completeness is preserved inside governance; unmediated I/O is excluded from the governed fragment. Governance denial is modeled as safe coinductive divergence. The governance algebra is parametric: any system instantiating the three axioms inherits all derived properties, including convergence, compositional closure, and goal preservation. Extracted OCaml runs as a NIF in the BEAM runtime, with property-based testing (70,000+ random inputs, zero disagreements) confirming behavioral equivalence between the specification and the runtime interpreter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个代数语义框架，用三条公理（安全性、透明性、正当性）形式化"受治理执行"，在交互树和参数化余归纳上构建了对称幺半范畴，证明所有张量复合保持治理。通过代数效应系统约束处理代数，实现能力索引的组合与双重保证定理，并证明了治理与可表达性的共端边界。在BEAM运行时上提取OCaml代码，通过70,000+随机输入验证了规范与运行时的行为等价性。
AI.motivation: 现有形式化方法中，治理（governance）通常作为外部约束而非内建于语义中，缺乏一个既能公理化治理、又能与表达能力共端的代数框架。本文旨在建立一种治理与可表达性"共端"（coterminous）的形式语义，使得任何可表达的程序都在治理之下，反之亦然。
AI.method: 以交互树（Interaction Trees）和参数化余归纳为基础，定义GovernanceAlgebra记录（三条公理：安全性、透明性、正当性），诱导出对称幺半范畴，验证五边形、三角形、六边形协调性。引入代数效应系统约束处理代数，确保只有治理保持的处理器可在安全片段中构造。通过能力索引组合（Capability-indexed composition）和双重保证定理证明within_caps与gov_safe同时成立。最终通过共端边界定理建立可表达性与治理的双向蕴含。
AI.result: 在32个Rocq模块（约12,000行代码，454个定理，0 admitted）中机械化实现。证明了张量复合保持治理、能力索引组合的双重保证定理、以及治理与可表达性的共端边界。Turing完备性在治理内保持，未中介的I/O被排除在治理片段之外。参数化治理代数：任何实例化三条公理的系统继承所有导出性质。OCaml提取在BEAM运行时中运行，70,000+随机输入的属性测试零分歧。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功建立了治理作为代数结构的形式语义，证明了治理与可表达性的共端关系，提供了一个参数化、可组合、机械化验证的治理框架，可用于约束程序行为的同时保持表达能力。

title: Towards High Fidelity Face Swapping: A Comprehensive Survey and New Benchmark
summary: Face swapping has witnessed significant progress in recent years, largely driven by advances in deep generative models such as GANs and diffusion models.Despite these advances, existing methods remain fragmented across different paradigms, and their evaluation is highly inconsistent due to the lack of standardized datasets and protocols. Moreover, prior surveys primarily focus on broader deepfake generation or detection, leaving face swapping insufficiently studied as a standalone problem. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey and benchmark for face swapping. We provide a structured review of existing methods, organizing them into five major paradigms and systematically analyzing their design principles, strengths, and limitations. To enable fair and controlled evaluation, we introduce CASIA FaceSwapping, a high-quality benchmark with balanced demographic distributions and explicit attribute variations, and establish standardized protocols to assess the robustness of different face swapping methods. Extensive experiments on representative approaches yield new insights into the performance characteristics and limitations of current techniques. Overall, our work provides a unified perspective and a principled evaluation framework to facilitate the development of more robust and controllable face swapping methods. More results can be found at https://github.com/CASIA-NLPRAI/face-swapping-survey.

AI.tldr: 本文对换脸技术进行了全面综述与基准评测，将现有方法归纳为五大范式，并构建了CASIA FaceSwapping基准数据集与标准化评估协议，通过大量实验揭示了当前技术的性能特征与局限。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸方法分散在不同范式下且缺乏统一评估标准，相关综述多聚焦于广义深度伪造而忽视了换脸作为独立问题的研究，因此亟需系统性梳理与公平评测框架。
AI.method: 1) 将现有方法分为五大范式进行结构化综述；2) 构建CASIA FaceSwapping基准数据集，包含均衡的人口统计分布和明确的属性变化；3) 建立标准化评估协议；4) 对代表性方法进行大规模对比实验。
AI.result: 通过系统性实验揭示了不同换脸方法的性能特征、优势与局限性，提供了新的洞察。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了统一的视角和原则性的评估框架，有助于推动更鲁棒、更可控的换脸方法发展。

title: A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2505.20841
summary: As large language models grow increasingly capable, concerns about their safe deployment have intensified. While numerous alignment strategies aim to restrict harmful behavior, these defenses can still be circumvented through carefully designed adversarial prompts. In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework that formalizes a game between an attacker and a defender. Within this framework, we design a theoretical best-response attack strategy and show that it is closely related to many existing adversarial prompting methods. We further analyze the resulting game, characterize its equilibria, and reveal inherent advantages for the attacker. Drawing on our theoretical analysis, we also derive a provably optimal defense strategy. Empirically, we evaluate a practical instantiation of the theoretically optimal attack and observe stronger performance relative to existing adversarial prompting approaches in diverse settings encompassing different LLMs and benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个攻击者与防御者之间的博弈理论框架，形式化了LLM安全对齐问题，推导了最优攻击策略（与现有对抗提示方法紧密相关）和可证明最优的防御策略，并通过实验验证了理论最优攻击的优越性能。
