summary: News outlets shape public opinion at a scale that makes automated detection of political bias and factuality essential. However, the field still lacks unified resources, comprehensive evaluations across diverse approaches, and systematic analyses of the representations and fusion strategies that matter most, especially under label sparsity and dataset diversity. In addition, there is little empirical work reporting broad, observation-driven findings about what consistently works, what fails, and why. We address these gaps through four main contributions. First, we introduce MBFC-2025, a large-scale label set covering approximately 2,600 outlets from Media Bias/Fact Check (MBFC). Second, we construct multiview representations for ACL-2020 (Panayotov et al., 2022), which includes around 900 outlets, as well as for MBFC-2025. These representations span Alexa graphs, hyperlink graphs, LLM-derived graphs, articles, and Wikipedia descriptions. Third, we provide a systematic evaluation and analysis of embedding views and fusion strategies, including a reinforcement learning-based fusion variant. Fourth, we conduct extensive experiments that achieve state-of-the-art results on ACL-2020 and establish strong benchmarks on MBFC-2025.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MBFC-2025标签集（覆盖约2600家媒体）、多视图表示（Alexa图、超链接图、LLM推导图、文章、Wikipedia描述），系统评估了嵌入视图与融合策略（含强化学习融合变体），在ACL-2020上达到SOTA，并为MBFC-2025建立了强基准。
AI.motivation: 现有政治偏见与事实性检测领域缺乏统一资源、全面的跨方法评估，以及对表示和融合策略的系统分析，尤其是在标签稀疏和数据集多样性的条件下，缺乏广泛的、基于观察的经验性发现。
AI.method: 1) 构建MBFC-2025大规模标签集；2) 为ACL-2020和MBFC-2025构建多视图表示（Alexa图、超链接图、LLM推导图、文章、Wikipedia描述）；3) 系统评估嵌入视图与融合策略（含强化学习融合变体）；4) 进行大量实验。
AI.result: 在ACL-2020上取得SOTA结果，在MBFC-2025上建立了强基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一资源、多视图表示与系统评估，填补了该领域在资源、评估和分析上的空白，并为后续研究提供了基准。

title: GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
summary: Outlier Exposure (OE) is among the strongest training-based OOD detectors on standard benchmarks but exhibits scorer-dependent tradeoffs (e.g., strong on MSP, weak on KNN) and requires curated auxiliary data. We show why OE works: its features sit at the same geometric locus as real near-OOD data, with the boundary-adjacent quartile driving nearly all of OE's gain. OE is boundary calibration, not OOD coverage. GEODE (GEOmetry-preserving DEtection) replicates this calibration synthetically through an angle-adaptive norm loss in which targets scale per-sample with cosine similarity to the nearest class mean, preserving feature geometry where boundary structure matters. Four theorems grounded in neural collapse justify the design. GEODE works across all seven standard scorers on CIFAR-10 (near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3, far-OOD reaching 93.05; no catastrophic failure on any scorer). Since the OOD regime is unknown at deployment, this is the test that matters. GEODE outperforms vanilla CE at matched epoch counts. Combined with OE, GEODE reaches 95.0 MSP / 94.8 KNN on CIFAR-10 and beats OE on every scorer on CIFAR-100. The gains hold on WRN-28-10 (+4.5 Energy, 3 seeds). Unlike methods that push OOD into the classifier null space (e.g., PFS, 14.38 KNN AUROC, worse than random), GEODE's adaptive target preserves the geometry that distance-based scorers depend on.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GEODE方法，通过角度自适应范数损失在保持特征几何结构的同时实现边界校准，解决了Outlier Exposure在部分评分器上表现差的问题，在所有七个标准OOD检测评分器上均表现优异。
AI.motivation: Outlier Exposure虽然是最强的训练式OOD检测方法之一，但存在评分器相关的权衡（如MSP强但KNN弱），且需要精心筛选的辅助数据。现有方法如PFS将OOD数据推入分类器零空间，破坏了距离型评分器所需的几何结构。因此需要一种保持特征几何结构的合成式OOD检测方法。
AI.method: 提出GEODE方法，核心是角度自适应范数损失（angle-adaptive norm loss），目标值根据样本与最近类均值的余弦相似度进行逐样本缩放。通过四个基于神经崩溃（neural collapse）的理论定理支撑设计，在保持边界几何结构的同时实现合成式边界校准。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上所有七个标准评分器表现一致（near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3，far-OOD达93.05），无灾难性失败。结合OE后CIFAR-10上达到MSP 95.0/KNN 94.8，CIFAR-100上所有评分器均超越OE。在WRN-28-10上Energy提升4.5，三组随机种子验证稳定。
AI.conclusion: OE的本质是边界校准而非OOD覆盖；GEODE通过保持特征几何结构的合成校准实现了与OE相当甚至更优的效果，且不依赖辅助数据、在所有评分器上表现一致，更适合实际部署中OOD类型未知的场景。

title: Lifting Traces to Logic: Programmatic Skill Induction with Neuro-Symbolic Learning for Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
summary: Foundation model-driven agents often struggle with long-horizon planning due to the transient nature of purely prompting-based reasoning. While existing skill induction methods mitigate this by distilling experience into state-blind parameterized scripts, they fail to capture the conditional logic required for robust execution in dynamic environments. In this paper, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Skill Induction (NSI), a framework that lifts interaction traces into modular, \textit{logic-grounded} programs. By synthesizing explicit control flows and dynamic variable binding, NSI empowers agents to discover \textit{when} and \textit{why} to act. This paradigm enables the efficient generalization, allowing agents to induce skills from few-shot examples and flexibly adapt to unseen goals. Experiments on a series of agentic tasks demonstrate that NSI consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, empowering agents to self-evolve into architects of logic-grounded skills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经符号技能归纳框架（NSI），将交互轨迹转化为模块化逻辑程序，赋予智能体条件执行能力，在长序列任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型的智能体在长期规划中因纯提示推理的短暂性而表现不佳；现有技能归纳方法虽能提取经验，但缺乏捕捉条件逻辑的能力，难以在动态环境中鲁棒执行。
AI.method: 提出NSI框架，将交互轨迹提升为模块化的逻辑基础程序。通过合成显式控制流和动态变量绑定，使智能体发现何时（when）以及为何（why）采取行动。
AI.result: 在一系列智能体任务中，NSI持续优于最先进的基线方法，使智能体能够从少量示例中归纳技能并灵活适应未见过的目标。
AI.conclusion: NSI使智能体自我进化为逻辑基础技能的架构师，实现了高效泛化。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Convolutional and Transformer-Based Detectors for Automated Weed Detection in Precision Agriculture
summary: This paper presents a comparative evaluation of convolutional and transformer-based object detection architectures for early weed detection in realistic scenarios. Representative models from each paradigm are considered, including YOLOv26-nano, a recent variant of the YOLO family, and transformer-based approaches such as RTDETR and RF-DETR. Experiments were conducted on the GROUNDBASED_ WEED dataset, allowing performance to be evaluated in terms of detection accuracy and computational efficiency using metrics such as precision, recall, average precision, and inference speed. The results highlight a clear trade-off between efficiency and contextual modeling: CNN-based detectors achieve high performance at a lower computational cost, while transformer-based approaches offer better global context capture at the expense of higher resource demands. These results provide practical criteria for model selection in precision agriculture applications.

AI.tldr: 本文对比评估了基于CNN（YOLOv26-nano）和Transformer（RTDETR、RF-DETR）的目标检测架构在早期杂草检测中的表现。在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上实验表明：CNN检测器计算成本低、性能高；Transformer检测器全局上下文建模能力强但资源需求高。为精准农业中的模型选择提供了实用标准。
AI.motivation: 在精准农业场景中，早期杂草检测对减少除草剂使用至关重要，但当前缺乏对CNN和Transformer两类主流检测架构在该任务上的系统对比，农业从业者难以根据实际需求选择合适的模型。
AI.method: 选取YOLOv26-nano（CNN代表）、RTDETR和RF-DETR（Transformer代表）三类模型，在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上进行实验，使用精确率、召回率、平均精度和推理速度等指标评估检测精度与计算效率。
AI.result: CNN检测器（YOLOv26-nano）在较低计算成本下实现了高检测性能；Transformer检测器（RTDETR、RF-DETR）能更好地捕获全局上下文信息，但资源消耗显著更高。两者之间存在清晰的效率与上下文建模能力的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为精准农业中的杂草检测模型选择提供了定量依据：资源受限场景优先选CNN，需要更强全局理解的场景可考虑Transformer，需根据实际部署条件权衡取舍。

title: MAD-OPD: Breaking the Ceiling in On-Policy Distillation via Multi-Agent Debate
comment: Preprint. 9-page main paper + appendix. 8 figures, 7 tables. Code: https://github.com/chiefovoavicii/MAD-OPD
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories under token-level teacher supervision, but existing methods are capped by a single-teacher capability ceiling: when the teacher errs, the student inherits the error. OPD also remains largely unexplored in agentic tasks, where per-step errors compound across long trajectories and destabilize training. We propose MAD-OPD (Multi-Agent Debate-driven On-Policy Distillation), which breaks this ceiling by recasting the distillation teacher as a deliberative collective of teachers that debate over the student's on-policy state; the debate produces an emergent collective intelligence that supplies token-level supervision, with each teacher's contribution weighted by its post-debate confidence. To extend OPD to agentic tasks, we also introduce On-Policy Agentic Distillation (OPAD), which adds step-level sampling to stabilize training under multi-step error compounding. We additionally derive a task-adaptive divergence principle, selecting JSD (Jensen-Shannon divergence) for agentic stability and reverse KL (Kullback-Leibler) divergence for code generation, and verify it both theoretically and empirically. Across six teacher-student configurations (Qwen3 and Qwen3.5; 1.7B-14B students, 8B-32B teachers) and five agentic and code benchmarks, MAD-OPD ranks first across all six configurations; on the 14B+8B$\to$4B setting it lifts the agentic average by $+2.4\%$ and the code average by $+3.7\%$ over the stronger single-teacher OPD.

AI.tldr: 提出MAD-OPD框架，通过多教师辩论提供token级监督，并结合OPAD处理智能体任务中的误差累积，在多个配置和基准上超越单教师蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 现有On-policy蒸馏方法受限于单教师能力上限——教师出错时学生会继承错误；且OPD在智能体任务中尚未充分探索，长轨迹中的逐步误差累积会 destabilize 训练。
AI.method: 1) MAD-OPD：用多教师辩论集体取代单个教师，对学生的on-policy状态进行辩论，产生集体智能提供token级监督，按辩论后置信度加权贡献。2) OPAD：为智能体任务引入步级采样以稳定训练。3) 提出任务自适应散度原则：智能体任务选JSD，代码生成选反向KL散度。
AI.result: 在六种师生配置（Qwen3/Qwen3.5，1.7B-14B学生，8B-32B教师）和五个智能体/代码基准上，MAD-OPD在所有配置中排名第一。14B+8B→4B设置下，智能体平均提升+2.4%，代码平均提升+3.7%。
AI.conclusion: 多教师辩论蒸馏能突破单教师能力天花板，结合步级采样和自适应散度选择可有效扩展到智能体任务，验证了理论原则与实证结果的一致性。

title: A dimensional R2 regression metric
summary: R2 score is the standard metric for evaluating regression tasks, offering a normalized magnitude-agnostic measure of accuracy that captures variance. However, R2 has three key limitations: it is limited to at most two dimensional inputs, it reduces the score to a single scalar that hides rich patterns of prediction accuracy, and it is sensitive to low-variance noise channels which can yield large, uninterpretable negative values. We introduce the Dimensional R2 score (Dim-R2), a simple extension of R2 that accepts data of arbitrary dimensionality, provides a multidimensional view of accuracy, and reduces sensitivity to noise. We demonstrate its advantages on both synthetic sinusoidal data and three multidimensional regression datasets. Dim-R2 offers an interpretable and flexible metric that highlights patterns in regression accuracy, guiding regression modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dim-R2，是传统R²评分在多维回归任务中的扩展，解决了R²仅支持二维输入、输出单一标量、对低方差噪声敏感的问题。通过合成数据和真实多维回归数据集验证，Dim-R2能提供更全面、可解释的回归准确性评估。
AI.motivation: 传统R²评分作为回归任务的标准指标存在三个关键局限：仅支持至多二维输入、输出单一标量掩盖了预测精度的丰富模式、对低方差噪声通道敏感导致产生大量不可解释的负值。作者旨在提出一种克服这些局限的新指标。
AI.method: 提出维度R²评分（Dim-R2），是R²的简单扩展，可接受任意维度数据，提供准确性的多维视图，并降低对噪声的敏感性。
AI.result: 在合成正弦数据及三个多维回归数据集上验证了Dim-R2的优势，展示了其在突出回归准确性模式方面的可解释性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: Dim-R2提供了一种可解释且灵活的回归评估指标，能突出回归准确性的模式，用于指导回归建模。

title: Segment-Aligned Policy Optimization for Multi-Modal Reasoning
summary: Existing reinforcement learning approaches for Large Language Models typically perform policy optimization at the granularity of individual tokens or entire response sequences. However, such formulations often misalign with the natural step-wise structure of reasoning processes, leading to suboptimal credit assignment and unstable training in multi-modal reasoning tasks. To bridge this gap, we propose Segment-Aligned Policy Optimization (SAPO), a novel reinforcement learning paradigm that treats coherent reasoning steps, rather than tokens or full sequences as fundamental units of policy update. SAPO introduces a step-wise Markov decision process abstraction over reasoning segments, accompanied by segment-level value estimation, advantage computation, and importance sampling mechanisms that are semantically aligned with reasoning boundaries. Experiments on representative reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SAPO consistently outperforms token-level and sequence-level policy optimization methods, achieving significant accuracy improvements while exhibiting better training stability and value estimation consistency. Our work underscores the importance of aligning reinforcement learning updates with the intrinsic structure of reasoning, paving the way for more efficient and semantically grounded policy optimization in complex reasoning tasks. Codes and models will be released to ensure full reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出SAPO方法，将推理步骤（而非token或完整序列）作为强化学习的基本单元，在推理任务中优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的强化学习方法在token或完整序列粒度进行策略优化，与推理过程的自然步骤结构不匹配，导致多模态推理任务中信用分配不合理、训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出Segment-Aligned Policy Optimization (SAPO)，将推理片段作为策略更新的基本单元，引入步骤级马尔可夫决策过程抽象，以及片段级价值估计、优势计算和重要性采样机制。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准上，SAPO一致优于token级和序列级策略优化方法，显著提升准确率，并展现出更好的训练稳定性和价值估计一致性。
AI.conclusion: 将强化学习更新与推理的内在结构对齐至关重要，SAPO为复杂推理任务中更高效、语义更扎实的策略优化开辟了新路径。

title: When Good OCR Is Not Enough: Benchmarking OCR Robustness for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Industrial Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend on optical character recognition (OCR) to transform visual documents into text. Existing OCR benchmarks rely on character-level metrics, which inadequately measure downstream RAG effectiveness under real-world conditions. We introduce an OCR benchmark for industrial RAG systems covering 11 challenging document types, including extreme layouts, high-resolution pages, complex or watermarked backgrounds, historical documents with non-standard reading orders, visually decorated text, and documents containing tables and mathematical formulas. Evaluating recent SOTA OCR models under a controlled OCR-first RAG pipeline shows clear performance degradation on realistic industrial documents despite strong conventional benchmark scores. We find that high OCR accuracy does not necessarily translate into strong downstream RAG performance: structural and semantic errors can cause substantial retrieval failures even when WER/CER remains low. Further analysis shows that this mismatch is category-dependent, arises through both retrieval-side and downstream generation-side failures, and remains stable across representative OCR-first pipeline choices. The benchmark is publicly available at https://github.com/Qihoo360/InduOCRBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向工业RAG系统的OCR基准测试，涵盖11种具有挑战性的文档类型，发现高OCR准确率并不保证下游RAG性能，结构和语义错误即使WER/CER较低也会导致检索失败。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR基准依赖字符级指标，无法有效衡量实际RAG系统下游效果，缺乏针对工业场景的OCR评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含极端布局、高分辨率页面、复杂/水印背景、历史文档、装饰文本、表格和数学公式等11类挑战性文档的基准；在受控OCR优先RAG流程中评估SOTA OCR模型。
AI.result: SOTA OCR模型在工业文档上性能明显下降；高OCR准确率不保证高质量RAG效果；结构性和语义性错误即使WER/CER低也会导致检索失败；这种不匹配具有类别依赖性，涉及检索端和生成端失败。
AI.conclusion: 字符级OCR指标不足以预测RAG系统实际性能，需要关注结构性和语义性错误对下游任务的影响。

title: LLM Output Detectability and Task Performance Can be Jointly Optimized
summary: Detecting machine-generated text is essential for transparency and accountability when deploying large language models (LLMs). Among detection approaches, watermarking is a statistically reliable method by design -- it embeds detectable signals into LLM outputs by biasing their token distributions. However, it has been reported that watermarked LLMs often perform worse on downstream tasks. We propose PUPPET, a framework that fine-tunes an LLM via reinforcement learning to generate text that is both more detectable and better performing on downstream tasks. We use two reward functions: a detector that outputs a machine-class likelihood and an evaluator that measures a task-specific metric. Experiments on long-form QA, summarization, and essay writing show that LLMs trained with PUPPET achieve high detectability competitive with watermarking methods while outperforming them on downstream tasks. The analysis shows that this optimization can be performed efficiently with only a few thousand samples in 1--2 GPU hours. Moreover, these gains are consistent across out-of-domain tasks, different LLM families, and model sizes, and are even robust to paraphrasing attacks.

AI.tldr: 提出PUPPET框架，通过强化学习微调LLM，使其生成的文本在保持高可检测性的同时，在下游任务上表现更优，实验证明其效果优于传统水印方法。
AI.motivation: 现有水印方法虽然能可靠检测机器生成文本，但会降低LLM在下游任务上的性能，需要一种方法在可检测性与任务性能之间取得更好平衡。
AI.method: 提出PUPPET框架，使用强化学习微调LLM，设计两个奖励函数：一个检测器（输出机器类别概率）和一个评估器（衡量任务特定指标），联合优化可检测性和下游任务性能。
AI.result: 在长文本问答、摘要和 essay 写作任务上，PUPPET训练后的LLM可检测性与水印方法相当，但下游任务表现更好；仅需数千样本和1-2 GPU小时即可高效完成优化；效果在跨领域、不同LLM家族和模型规模上保持一致，且对释义攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PUPPET框架有效解决了水印方法导致的性能下降问题，实现了高可检测性与强下游任务性能的统一，且高效、泛化能力强。

title: Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression
summary: Symbolic regression discovers explicit, interpretable equations without assuming a functional form in advance. A Bayesian approach strengthens this through probability distributions over candidate expressions, thus quantifying uncertainty in the presence of noisy and limited data. Deep Symbolic Regression (DSR) uses a neural network to generate symbolic expressions, but it is designed to identify a single best-fitting expression rather than infer a posterior distribution over models. We introduce Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression (DVISR), a variational Bayesian extension of DSR. DVISR replaces the original reward with the integrand of the evidence lower bound. It also extends the network architecture to output distributions over constants within expressions, enabling posterior inference over both expression trees and their associated constants. We show that DVISR can recover the true posterior in simple settings, both with and without constant tokens, and we examine how its performance changes as the size of the expression space increases. These results position DVISR as a step toward scalable Bayesian symbolic regression with uncertainty over full symbolic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度变分推理符号回归（DVISR），作为深度符号回归（DSR）的变分贝叶斯扩展，通过用ELBO积分项替代原始奖励并扩展网络架构以输出常数分布，实现了对表达式树及其常数的后验推理，在简单设置下能恢复真实后验，向可扩展的贝叶斯符号回归迈进一步。
AI.motivation: 现有符号回归方法（如DSR）只能找到单一最佳表达式，无法对模型进行后验分布推断，缺乏在噪声和有限数据下的不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 提出DVISR，在DSR基础上进行变分贝叶斯扩展：1) 用证据下界（ELBO）的积分项替代原始奖励函数；2) 扩展网络架构使其能输出表达式内部常数的分布，从而实现对表达式树及其常数的联合后验推断。
AI.result: 在简单设置下，无论是否包含常数标记，DVISR都能恢复真实后验分布；研究还考察了表达式空间规模增大时模型性能的变化情况。
AI.conclusion: DVISR是可扩展贝叶斯符号回归的一个有效步骤，能够对完整符号模型进行不确定性量化，为在噪声和有限数据场景下发现可解释方程提供了概率框架。

title: Truth or Tribe: How In-group Favoritism Prioritize Facts in Persona Agents
summary: In-group favoritism refers to the phenomena of favoring members of one's in-group over out-group members and is widely observed in numerous social cooperative behaviors. Recently, in-group favoritism biases have also been identified in generative language models. However, whether the in-group favoritism exists when persona agents are faced with contradicting information (e.g., misinformation), and how to mitigate the adverse effects of in-group favoritism biases in persona agents have been understudied. To address these problems, we propose a Truth or Tribe simulation framework to study the agent cooperation within the spread of contradicting information through a triadic interaction paradigm, and conduct controlled trials to evaluate the primary moderating factors. Extensive results showcase that persona agents display strong in-group favoritism, accepting incorrect answers from identity-similar peers at much higher rates than from dissimilar peers. In-group favoritism continues to emerge in defeasible reasoning contexts where no absolute truth exists, and it intensifies as cognitive complexity increases. Furthermore, three intervention strategies--Identity-Blind Instruction, Structured Counterfactual Reasoning, and Heterogeneous Perspective Ensemble--are proposed to mitigate the in-group favoritism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Truth or Tribe"模拟框架，研究人格代理在矛盾信息传播中的内群体偏袒现象。实验发现代理人对身份相似同伴的错误回答接受率更高，这种偏袒在认知复杂度增加时加剧。作者提出三种干预策略（身份盲指令、结构化反事实推理、异质视角集成）来缓解该偏差。
AI.motivation: 生成式语言模型已被发现存在内群体偏袒，但人格代理在面对矛盾信息（如 misinformation）时是否存在这种偏见，以及如何缓解其负面影响，尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 提出Truth or Tribe仿真框架，采用三元交互范式研究代理在矛盾信息传播中的合作行为，并进行控制实验评估主要调节因素。同时提出三种干预策略：Identity-Blind Instruction、Structured Counterfactual Reasoning、Heterogeneous Perspective Ensemble。
AI.result: 人格代理表现出强烈的内群体偏袒：对身份相似同伴错误答案的接受率显著高于不相似同伴。在无绝对真理的可废止推理情境中，偏见依然存在，且随认知复杂度增加而加剧。
AI.conclusion: 三种干预策略能有效缓解人格代理的内群体偏袒偏见，为构建更公正、可靠的人格化AI系统提供了可行路径。

title: Object-Level Explanations for Image Geolocation Models: a GeoGuessr use-case
summary: When humans play geolocation games such as GeoGuessr, they rely on concrete visual cues, such as road markings, vegetation, or architectural details, to infer where an image was captured. Whether image geolocation models rely on similar object-level evidence remains difficult to determine, as attribution methods like Grad-CAM typically highlight diffuse regions rather than coherent visual entities, making it difficult to link model predictions to specific objects or perceptible patterns. In this work, we propose an object-centric analysis pipeline to investigate the visual evidence used by geolocation models. Starting from attribution maps, we extract salient regions and segment them into object-like elements. We evaluate their predictive relevance through deletion and insertion tests, comparing attributionguided crops to randomly selected regions with similar coverage. Experiments on a three-country benchmark show that attribution-guided crops consistently retain more information for the model's prediction than random crops. These results suggest that attribution maps can be decomposed into interpretable, perceptible elements, providing a step toward object-level analysis of geolocation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以物体为中心的分析流程，通过对地理定位模型的归因图进行分割和测试，证明归因引导的图像区域比随机区域保留更多预测信息，从而将模型预测与具体视觉对象联系起来。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法（如Grad-CAM）只能生成模糊的热力图区域，难以将模型预测与具体物体或可感知的模式联系起来，因此需要一种能够分解到物体级别的可解释性分析方法。
AI.method: 从归因图中提取显著区域，分割成类似物体的元素；通过删除和插入测试评估这些区域的预测相关性，并与相同覆盖率的随机裁剪区域进行比较。
AI.result: 在三国基准数据集上，归因引导的裁剪区域比随机裁剪区域一致地保留了更多用于模型预测的信息。
AI.conclusion: 归因图可以被分解为可解释、可感知的视觉元素，这为地理定位模型的物体级分析迈出了一步。

title: On Stable Long-Form Generation: Benchmarking and Mitigating Length Volatility
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at long-context understanding but exhibit significant limitations in long-form generation. Existing studies primarily focus on single-generation quality, generally overlooking the volatility of the output. This volatility not only leads to significant computational costs but also severely impacts the models' reliable application. To address this gap, our work unfolds in three stages: benchmarking, probing, and mitigation. We first propose the VOlatility in Long-form Text Benchmark (VOLTBench), a novel heterogeneous-task benchmark designed to systematically quantify the length volatility of long-form generation. Subsequently, by analyzing attention traces, we conduct an in-depth probe to identify several common internal patterns that cause this volatility. Finally, to mitigate long-form output volatility, we propose Stable Generation via Logits Boosting (GLoBo), a lightweight decoding-stage optimization strategy, designed to significantly enhance both the length accuracy and stability of long-form generation without additional training. Extensive experiments on VOLTBench provide the first systematic confirmation of severe long-form output instability in mainstream models and validate that our proposed method successfully improves the mean output length of the base model by 148% and reduces the length volatility by 69%, while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOLTBench基准测试、注意力追踪分析以及GLoBo解码优化策略，系统性地量化、探测并缓解了长文本生成中的长度波动问题，将输出长度提升148%并将波动降低69%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单次生成质量，忽视了长文本生成中普遍存在的输出波动性问题——该问题不仅导致显著的计算开销，还严重影响模型的可靠应用。
AI.method: 1) VOLTBench：异构任务基准测试，系统量化长文本生成的长度波动；2) 注意力追踪分析：识别导致波动的内部模式；3) GLoBo：轻量级解码阶段优化策略，通过logits提升增强长度准确性和稳定性，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 主流模型存在严重的长文本输出不稳定性；GLoBo将平均输出长度提升148%，长度波动减少69%，同时保持高生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 长文本生成的长度波动问题确实存在且严重，但通过解码阶段的轻量级干预可以有效缓解，验证了无需额外训练即可提升长文本生成稳定性的可行性。

title: Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary:
We study networked binary classification on a directed acyclic graph (DAG) where each agent observes only a subset of the feature columns of a shared dataset. Agents act sequentially along the DAG: each receives prediction columns from its parents (if any), augments its local features with these columns, fits a logistic predictor by minimizing binary cross-entropy (BCE), and forwards its prediction column to its outgoing neighbors. We ask whether this sequential distributed training procedure achieves information aggregation, meaning that some agent attains small excess loss compared to the best logistic predictor trained with access to all feature columns.
  This question was studied for linear regression under squared loss by Kearns, Roth, and Ryu (SODA 2026). Extending their guarantees to classification is nontrivial because their analysis relies on quadratic structure that does not directly transfer to BCE with a logistic link. We analyze the resulting sequential logit-passing protocol and prove: (i) an excess loss upper bound of $O(M/\sqrt{D})$ on depth-$D$ paths under the condition that every $M$ contiguous subsequence of $M$ agents collectively observe all features, and (ii) a close lower bound showing instances with excess loss of at least $Ω(k/D)$ where $k$ is the dimension of the feature space. Together, these results identify network depth as a fundamental bottleneck for information aggregation in networked logistic regression.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有向无环图（DAG）上的二分类问题，提出顺序logit传递协议，证明在深度为D的路径上，当每M个连续代理集体观测所有特征时，过量损失上界为O(M/√D)，同时给出下界Ω(k/D)，表明网络深度是信息聚合的根本瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 将Kearns等人（SODA 2026）在平方损失线性回归中的信息聚合保证扩展到二分类场景，因为其分析依赖的二次结构无法直接迁移到带logistic链接的二元交叉熵损失。
AI.method: 提出顺序logit传递协议：代理沿DAG顺序行动，接收父节点的预测列，结合本地特征列，通过最小化二元交叉熵拟合logistic预测器，并将预测列传递给后继节点。理论分析给出上界和下界证明。
AI.result: (i) 上界：在深度D路径上，若每M个连续代理共同观测所有特征，过量损失为O(M/√D)；(ii) 下界：存在实例使得过量损失至少为Ω(k/D)，其中k为特征空间维度。
AI.conclusion: 网络深度是网络化logistic回归中信息聚合的根本瓶颈，上界与下界共同刻画了这一问题。

title: DiagramNet: An End-to-End Recognition Framework and Dataset for Non-Standard System-Level Diagrams
summary: System-level diagrams encode the architectural blueprint of chip design, specifying module functions, dataflows, and interface protocols. However, non-standardized symbols and the scarcity of structured training data hinder existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) from recognizing these diagrams. To address this gap, we introduce DiagramNet, the first multimodal dataset for system-level diagrams, comprising 10,977 connection annotations and 15,515 chain-of-thought QA pairs across four tasks: Listing, Localization, Connection, and Circuit QA. Building on this dataset, we propose a progressive training pipeline together with a decoupled multi-agent workflow that decomposes complex visual reasoning into Perception, Reasoning, and Knowledge stages. On the DiagramNet benchmark, integrating our 3B-parameter model with the proposed workflow surpasses the 2025 EDA Elite Challenge winner and outperforms GPT-5, Claude-Sonnet-4, and Gemini-2.5-Pro by over 2x in end-to-end evaluation. Notably, the workflow generalizes beyond our model, boosting Task 1 performance by 128.7x for Gemini-2.5-Pro and 12.4x for GPT-5. Furthermore, with only 60 images for detector adaptation, the method transfers effectively to AMSBench, achieving zero-shot connectivity reasoning on par with GPT-5 and Claude-Sonnet-4 while surpassing the AMS state-of-the-art method Netlistify.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DiagramNet——首个芯片系统级 diagrams 多模态数据集，以及基于渐进式训练和解耦多智能体工作流的方法，在多个 benchmark 上超越 GPT-5、Claude-Sonnet-4 等先进模型。
AI.motivation: 系统级 diagram 是芯片设计的架构蓝图，但非标准化符号和结构化训练数据稀缺，导致现有多模态大模型无法识别这类 diagrams。
AI.method: 构建 DiagramNet 数据集（10,977 条连接标注 + 15,515 条思维链 QA）；提出渐进式训练流程；设计解耦多智能体工作流，将视觉推理分解为感知、推理、知识三个阶段。
AI.result: 3B 参数模型+工作流超越 EDA Elite Challenge 冠军及 GPT-5/Claude-Sonnet-4/Gemini-2.5-Pro，端到端评估高出 2 倍以上；工作流可泛化到其他模型（Gemini-2.5-Pro 提升 128.7 倍，GPT-5 提升 12.4 倍）；仅用 60 张图迁移至 AMSBench，零样本连接推理持平 GPT-5/Claude-Sonnet-4 并超越 SOTA 方法 Netlistify。
AI.conclusion: DiagramNet 数据集和所提方法有效填补了系统级 diagram 多模态理解的空白，且工作流具有良好的跨模型泛化性和任务迁移性。

title: Leveraging Imperfect Medical Data: A Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) has attracted increasing attention in medical and healthcare monitoring, particularly with the growth of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT). However, in real-world wearable sensing scenarios, IoMT signals are often corrupted by missing measurements, sensor failures, and environmental noise, which significantly degrade the performance of conventional deep learning models that assume clean and complete inputs. To address this challenge, we propose a Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network (MCSTN) for robust HAR under imperfect sensing conditions. The proposed framework introduces a dual-level corruption modeling mechanism that simulates realistic sensor imperfections through both physical-level corruption and diffusion-driven continuous corruption. By enforcing representation consistency across multiple corrupted views, the model learns stable and corruption-invariant semantic representations. Furthermore, we design a dual-stream spatio-temporal architecture that explicitly decouples temporal dynamics modeling and spatial correlation learning. The temporal stream captures long-term activity dynamics, while the spatial stream models inter-sensor relationships, enabling more effective spatio-temporal representation learning. Extensive experiments on three widely used HAR benchmark datasets, PAMAP2, Opportunity, and WISDM, demonstrate that the proposed MCSTN achieves competitive performance compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly under imperfect sensing conditions. These results validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework for real-world wearable IoMT sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种流形一致时空网络（MCSTN），通过双重层面模拟传感器损坏（物理损坏+扩散驱动连续损坏），并强制多视图表示一致性，以及显式解耦时空建模的双流架构，从而在不完美传感条件下实现鲁棒的人体活动识别。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习HAR方法假设输入数据干净完整，但真实IoMT场景中传感器信号常存在缺失、故障和噪声，导致性能严重下降。作者旨在解决这一鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 提出MCSTN框架：（1）双重损坏建模机制，模拟物理级损坏和扩散驱动的连续损坏；（2）跨多个损坏视图强制表示一致性，学习损坏不变的语义；（3）双流时空架构，显式解耦时间动态建模（捕捉长期活动动态）和空间相关性学习（建模传感器间关系）。
AI.result: 在PAMAP2、Opportunity和WISDM三个基准数据集上的实验表明，MCSTN在（尤其是不完美传感条件下）达到了与现有最先进方法相比有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: MCSTN在真实世界的可穿戴IoMT传感应用中具有有效性和鲁棒性。

title: Embedding-based In-Context Prompt Training for Enhancing LLMs as Text Encoders
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely explored for embedding generation. While recent studies show that in-context learning (ICL) effectively enhances the representational capability of LLMs by prepending a few task-related demonstrations, it causes substantial token overhead due to the increased sequence length. In this work, we propose EPIC, a novel embedding-based in-context prompt training strategy that leverages ICL to generate high-quality embeddings while reducing computational burden during both training and inference. This approach replaces discrete text demonstrations with their corresponding continuous embeddings, which not only encourages the LLM to align semantically-related text pairs during contrastive learning, but also requires the model to interpret demonstration embeddings as part of the in-context prompt. Consequently, EPIC-trained models achieve excellent embedding performance both with or without in-context prompts at inference time. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method establishes new state-of-the-art results on the MTEB benchmark, surpassing frontier models trained solely on publicly available retrieval data. Extensive ablation studies further validate the effectiveness and necessity of our mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPIC方法，将上下文学习中的离散文本示范替换为连续嵌入，既保留了ICL提升表示能力的效果，又大幅减少了计算开销，在MTEB基准上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明上下文学习(ICL)能有效增强LLM的嵌入表示能力，但预置任务相关示范会导致序列长度增加，带来大量token开销。作者希望保留ICL优势的同时降低计算负担。
AI.method: 提出EPIC（Embedding-based In-Context Prompt training）策略，将离散文本示范替换为连续嵌入向量，在对比学习中促使模型对齐语义相关的文本对，并让模型将示范嵌入解释为上下文提示的一部分。
AI.result: 在MTEB基准上取得新的最优结果，超越仅使用公开检索数据训练的先进模型，消融实验验证了方法的有效性和必要性。
AI.conclusion: EPIC训练的模型在推理时无论是否使用上下文提示，都能获得出色的嵌入性能，实现了效率与质量的双赢。

title: Learning Discriminators for Resampling in the Ensemble Gaussian Mixture Filter through a Normalizing Flow Approach
summary: The ensemble Gaussian mixture filter (EnGMF) is a powerful, convergent particle filter capable of medium-to-high dimensional non-linear filtering. The EnGMF relies on a resampling step that can generate physically unrealistic posterior samples, that would subsequently produce physically meaningless forecasts. This work introduces the discriminator-informed resampling procedure, that augments the posterior resampling step with a discriminator that accepts or rejects candidate particles based on their physical plausibility. In this work these discriminators are learned through a normalizing flow approach. Numerical experiments on both the Ikeda map and the Lorenz '63 system show that discriminator informed resampling procedure consistently reduces error relative to the standard EnGMF in low-ensemble regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鉴别器引导的重采样方法（Discriminator-Informed Resampling），通过归一化流学习物理合理性判别器来改进集成高斯混合滤波器（EnGMF），在低集合规模下有效降低了Ikeda映射和Lorenz '63系统的滤波误差。
AI.motivation: 标准EnGMF的重采样步骤可能生成物理上不真实的样本，导致后续预测无意义。因此需要一种机制来筛选出物理上合理的粒子。
AI.method: 在EnGMF的重采样步骤中引入一个鉴别器，通过归一化流学习该鉴别器，对候选粒子进行接受/拒绝判断，只保留物理上合理的粒子。
AI.result: 在Ikeda映射和Lorenz '63系统上的数值实验表明，鉴别器引导的重采样在低集合规模下始终优于标准EnGMF，误差一致降低。
AI.conclusion: 鉴别器引导的重采样是一种有效改进EnGMF的方法，能在低集合规模下提升滤波精度，同时保证粒子的物理合理性。

title: Structural Ranking of the Cognitive Plausibility of Computational Models of Analogy and Metaphors with the Minimal Cognitive Grid
summary: In this paper, we employ the Minimal Cognitive Grid (MCG), a framework created to evaluate the cognitive plausibility of artificial systems, to offer a systematic assessment of leading computational models of analogy and metaphor, including the Structure-Mapping Engine (SME), CogSketch, METCL, and Large Language Models (LLMs). We present a formal and quantitative operationalization of the MCG framework and, through the analysis of its three main dimensions (Functional/Structural Ratio, Generality, and Performance Match), examine how well each system aligns with standard cognitive theories of the modeled phenomena, thus allowing for comparison of the models with respect to their cognitive plausibility, according to consistent and generalizable mathematical criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文使用最小认知网格(MCG)框架系统性评估了SME、CogSketch、METCL和大语言模型等类比与隐喻计算模型的认知合理性，通过三个维度(功能/结构比、通用性、性能匹配)进行定量分析。
AI.motivation: 现有类比与隐喻计算模型缺乏统一的认知合理性评估标准，作者希望建立一个可量化的数学框架来系统比较不同模型的认知合理性。
AI.method: 对MCG框架进行形式化定量操作化，通过功能/结构比、通用性和性能匹配三个维度，依据数学标准评估各模型与认知理论的一致性。
AI.result: 提供了对SME、CogSketch、METCL和LLMs等模型的系统性认知合理性评估结果，实现了跨模型的一致性和可泛化比较。
AI.conclusion: MCG框架可作为一种通用且一致的数学标准，用于评估和比较不同计算模型的认知合理性。

title: Rethink MAE with Linear Time-Invariant Dynamics
summary: Standard representation probing for visual models relies on mathematically permutation-invariant operations like Global Average Pooling (GAP) or CLS tokens, treating patch representations as an unstructured bag-of-words. We challenge this paradigm by demonstrating that token order is a critical, exploitable dimension in frozen visual representations (e.g., MAE, BEiT, DINOv2, and ViT as CLS-ablation extreme). We propose SSMProbe, a probing framework driven by a State Space Model (SSM). Operating as discrete Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) dynamical systems, SSMs act as permutation-sensitive probes where sequence order strictly dictates the final state due to inherent memory decay. Formulating token ordering as an information scheduling problem, we compare fixed scan heuristics against a differentiable soft permutation (Sinkhorn-based) learned from downstream supervision. Evaluations on standard and fine-grained classification benchmarks reveal a striking order gap: while fixed scans fail dramatically on highly localized patch features, our learned soft permutation successfully extracts highly competitive performance from otherwise heavily localized patch sequences. We find that pre-training objectives fundamentally shape token structure: DINOv2 concentrates global semantics in optimized CLS tokens leaving patches hyperspecialized, pure MAE preserves distributed representations with heterogeneous patch informativeness, and ViT represents a supervised CLS-dominated extreme. BEiT occupies middle ground. This heterogeneity is order-dependent -- meaning the SSM probe's performance depends critically on which tokens are placed at which temporal positions -- and is not merely a topological property of the spatial grid. SSMProbe's learned routing effectively discovers and exploits this heterogeneity, offering a powerful new diagnostic lens for visual representation analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSMProbe，利用状态空间模型（SSM）对视觉模型的patch表示进行顺序敏感探测，发现token顺序是关键维度，并通过可学习的软排列（Sinkhorn）有效挖掘不同预训练目标下的表示异质性。
AI.motivation: 现有探测方法（如GAP、CLS token）将patch表示视为无序词袋，忽略了token顺序信息。本文旨在证明token顺序是冻结视觉表示中可被利用的关键维度。
AI.method: 提出SSMProbe，基于状态空间模型（SSM）作为排列敏感的探测器；将token排序视为信息调度问题，对比固定扫描策略和基于Sinkhorn的可学习软排列。
AI.result: 固定扫描在高度局部化的patch特征上表现失败，而可学习软排列能从中提取高性能；不同预训练目标（DINOv2、MAE、ViT、BEiT）的token结构异质性显著，且这种异质性是顺序依赖的。
AI.conclusion: SSMProbe的可学习路由能有效发现并利用token的异质性，为视觉表示分析提供了新的诊断工具。

title: Focus on the Core: Empowering Diffusion Large Language Models by Self-Contrast
summary: The iterative denoising paradigm of Diffusion Large Language Models (DLMs) endows them with a distinct advantage in global context modeling. However, current decoding strategies fail to leverage this capability, typically exhibiting a local preference that overlooks the heterogeneous information density within the context, ultimately degrading generation quality. To address this limitation, we systematically investigate high-information-density (HD) tokens and present two key findings: (1) explicitly conditioning on HD tokens substantially improves output quality; and (2) HD tokens exhibit an early-decoding tendency, converging earlier than surrounding tokens. Motivated by these findings, we propose Focus on the Core \textbf{(FoCore)}, a training-free decoding strategy that utilizes HD tokens in a self-contrast manner, wherein HD tokens are temporarily remasked as negative samples, to guide generation. We further introduce FoCore\_Accelerate \textbf{(FoCore\_A)}, an efficient variant that, upon detecting HD token convergence, performs parallel decoding over stable candidates within a local context window, substantially accelerating generation. Extensive experiments on math, code and logical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that FoCore consistently improves generation quality and efficiency across both LLaDA and Dream backbones. For instance, on HumanEval, FoCore improves pass@1 from 39.02 to 42.68 over standard Classifier-Free Guidance, while FoCore-A reduces the number of decoding steps by 2.07x and per-sample latency from 20.76s to 8.64s (-58.4\%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoCore和FoCore_A两种无需训练的扩散LLM解码策略，通过利用高信息密度（HD）token的自对比机制和并行解码，显著提升生成质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型（DLM）的解码策略未能利用其全局上下文建模优势，仅呈现局部偏好，忽略了上下文中的异构信息密度，导致生成质量下降。
AI.method: (1) FoCore：基于两个发现（HD token条件化提升质量、HD token早期收敛），通过自对比方式将HD token临时重遮蔽为负样本以引导生成；(2) FoCore_A：检测到HD token收敛后，在局部上下文窗口内对稳定候选进行并行解码以加速生成。
AI.result: 在数学、代码和逻辑推理基准上，FoCore持续提升生成质量（HumanEval上pass@1从39.02提升至42.68），FoCore_A将解码步数减少2.07倍，单样本延迟从20.76s降至8.64s（-58.4%）。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种训练无关的高效解码范式，有效利用扩散模型的全局建模优势，同时兼顾生成质量与推理速度。

title: Learning to Race in Minutes: Infoprop Dyna on the Mini Wheelbot
comment: Originally submitted to the German Robotics Conference, 2026
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has the potential to enable robots with fast, nonlinear, and unstable dynamics to reach the limits of their performance. However, most recent advances rely on carefully designed physics-based simulators and domain randomization to achieve successful sim-to-real transfer within reasonable wall-clock time. In this work, we bypass the need for such simulators and demonstrate that Infoprop Dyna, a state-of-the-art uncertainty-aware model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) framework, can enable robots to learn directly from real-world interactions. Using Infoprop Dyna, the Mini Wheelbot, an underactuated unicycle robot, learns to race around a track within 11 minutes of real-world experience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Infoprop Dyna框架，使欠驱动独轮机器人Mini Wheelbot在未使用物理模拟器的情况下，仅通过11分钟真实世界交互便学会在赛道上竞速。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖精心设计的物理模拟器和域随机化才能实现仿真到真实的迁移，本文旨在绕过对模拟器的需求，让机器人直接从真实世界交互中学习。
AI.method: 采用Infoprop Dyna——一种基于不确定性感知的模型强化学习（MBRL）框架，使机器人能够直接从真实世界经验中学习，无需物理模拟器。
AI.result: 欠驱动独轮机器人Mini Wheelbot在11分钟真实世界经验内学会了在赛道上竞速。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，不确定性感知的模型强化学习框架可以有效替代物理模拟器，使机器人直接从真实交互中高效学习复杂动态控制任务。

title: A Cellular Doctrine of Morality: Intrinsic Active Precision and the Mind-Reality Overload Dilemma
summary: Current AI systems, grounded in oversimplified neuroscience, risk eroding the distinction between truth and falsehood. They maximize reward by amplifying attention to information without intrinsic precision mechanisms to assess whether it is valid or worth attending to. This increases both the volume of information and the inherent biases in what the system attends to, whether true, false, or irrelevant. If not corrected, this trend will accelerate, threatening to overload systems and individuals with biased and dubious information and increasing the risk of confusion, poor judgment, and irrational or harmful decisions and behaviour, a condition I term the mind-reality overload dilemma. I argue that this threat may be mitigated by providing the public with access to more advanced AI tools built on the biophysical dynamics of pyramidal neurons underlying awake thought and higher-order cognition. These neurons support an intrinsic active precision mechanism that, rather than merely maximizing reward, uses locally and globally coherent predictions to evaluate the validity and contextual adequacy of evidence before it is attended to or propagated through hierarchies, prioritizing coherence and adequacy before attention.~While this approach does not derive or prescribe moral rules from biology, it may give rise to AI with more "real understanding", helping restore epistemic conditions by reducing information overload and amplifying reliable information, thereby supporting the formation of better-informed beliefs and more coherent judgments that benefit society at large-though no guarantees exist.

AI.tldr: 论文指出基于简化神经科学的AI系统缺乏内在精度机制，导致信息过载和偏见加剧，引发“心智-现实超载困境”。作者提出利用锥体神经元的生物物理动力学构建更先进的AI，通过局部与全局连贯预测来评估信息有效性，从而恢复认知条件、减少信息超载。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统基于过度简化的神经科学，缺乏内在精度机制来评估信息的真实性，导致真假不分、信息过载和偏见加剧，威胁个体与社会的理性决策。
AI.method: 借鉴锥体神经元在清醒思维和高阶认知中的生物物理动力学，构建基于局部与全局连贯预测的主动精度机制，在信息被注意或传播之前评估其有效性和情境适当性。
AI.result: 该方法有望赋予AI更真实的“理解”，减少信息过载，放大可靠信息，支持更明智的信念形成和更连贯的判断。
AI.conclusion: 虽然不能保证绝对成功，但通过提供基于生物物理动力学的先进AI工具，可能缓解心智-现实超载困境，恢复认知条件，造福社会。

title: SAMamba3D: adapting Segment Anything for generalizable 3D segmentation of multiphase pore-scale images
summary:
Reliable segmentation of multiphase pore-scale X-ray images of rocks is necessary to quantify fluid saturation, connectivity, and interfacial geometry. However, current 3D segmentation methods are typically dataset-specific, requiring retraining or extensive fine-tuning whenever rock type, fluid pattern, scanner, or acquisition conditions change. Foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) provide strong 2D boundary priors, but they are not directly applicable to 3D data.
  We present SAMamba3D, a parameter-efficient framework that adapts a largely frozen SAM encoder to generalizable 3D pore-scale segmentation by coupling it with Mamba-based volumetric context modeling and progressive cross-scale feature interaction. For sandstone and carbonate datasets, with different fluids, wettability, and scanning conditions, SAMamba3D matches or outperforms current 3D baselines while reducing the need for case-specific retraining. The resulting segmented images preserve physically meaningful descriptors, including fluid saturation, connectivity, and interface morphology, enabling more reliable and rapid analysis of large 3D multiphase images.

AI.tldr: SAMamba3D通过冻结SAM编码器+曼巴3D上下文建模+跨尺度特征交互，实现多相岩石X-Ray图像的参数高效3D分割，在不同岩性、流体条件下接近或超越现有方法，减少重新训练需求。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分割方法往往数据集特化，遇到岩石类型、流体模式、扫描条件等变化时需要重新训练或大规模微调；SAM等2D基础模型有强边界先验但不直接适用于3D数据。
AI.method: 耦合冻结SAM编码器（参数高效微调）与Mamba架构的3D体积上下文建模，配合渐进式跨尺度特征交互机制。
AI.result: 在砂岩和碳酸盐岩数据集（不同流体、润湿性、扫描条件下）匹配或超越现有3D基线，同时减少案例特定重新训练需求，保留流体饱和度、连通性、界面形态等物理有意义的描述符。
AI.conclusion: SAMamba3D实现了高效、可泛化的多相孔隙尺度3D分割，支持更可靠、快速的大规模3D多相图像分析。

title: MTA: Multi-Granular Trajectory Alignment for Large Language Model Distillation
summary: Knowledge distillation is a key technique for compressing large language models (LLMs), but most existing methods align representations at fixed layers or token-level outputs, ignoring how representations evolve across depth. As a result, the student is only weakly guided to capture the teacher's internal relational structure during distillation, which limits knowledge transfer. To address this limitation, we propose Multi-Granular Trajectory Alignment (MTA), a framework that aligns teacher and student representations along their layer-wise transformation trajectory. MTA adopts a layer-adaptive strategy: lower layers are aligned at the word level to preserve lexical information, while higher layers operate on phrase-level spans (e.g., noun and verb phrases) to capture compositional semantics. We instantiate this idea through a Dynamic Structural Alignment loss that matches the relative geometry among semantic units within each layer. This design is motivated by empirical findings that Transformer representations become increasingly abstract with depth, and is also consistent with linguistic views in which higher-level meaning emerges through the composition of lower-level lexical units. We further incorporate a Hidden Representation Alignment loss to directly align selected teacher-student layers. Experiments show that MTA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard benchmarks, with ablations confirming the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 提出多粒度轨迹对齐（MTA）框架，通过分层自适应地对齐师生模型在深度方向上的表示轨迹（低层词级对齐、高层短语级对齐），并引入动态结构对齐损失和隐藏表示对齐损失，显著提升知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法仅在固定层或token级输出对齐表示，忽略了表示在深度方向上的演化过程，导致学生模型难以捕捉教师模型内部的层次化关系结构，限制了知识迁移效果。
AI.method: 提出MTA框架：1）分层自适应策略——低层进行词级对齐保留词汇信息，高层进行短语级（名词/动词短语）对齐捕获组合语义；2）动态结构对齐损失——匹配每层内语义单元之间的相对几何关系；3）隐藏表示对齐损失——直接对齐选定的师生层表示。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试上，MTA一致优于最先进的基线方法，消融实验验证了每个组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 通过沿层间变换轨迹对齐师生表示，并利用由浅入深的层级语义差异设计对齐粒度，MTA有效提升了知识蒸馏中结构化知识迁移的质量。

title: Almost for Free: Crafting Adversarial Examples with Convolutional Image Filters
summary: Adversarial examples in machine learning are typically generated using gradients, obtained either directly through access to the model or approximated via queries to it. In this paper, we propose a much simpler approach to craft adversarial examples, drawing inspiration from insights of explainable machine learning. In particular, we design \emph{adversarial image filters} that are based on classic edge detection algorithms but optimized to deceive learning models. The resulting untargeted attacks are transferable and require only a single pass over the input. Empirically, we find that 3x3 filters already enable success rates between 30% and 80% on different neural networks. Compared to related approaches using generative models for crafting adversarial examples, we reduce the number of parameters by five orders of magnitude, resulting in a very efficient attack. When investigating the parameters of the learned filters, we observe interesting properties such as a high transferability between models and structures common to classic image filters. Our results provide further insights into the vulnerability of neural networks and their fragility to malicious noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可解释机器学习启示的对抗图像过滤器，利用经典边缘检测算法但经过优化以欺骗学习模型。这种方法无需梯度，仅需单次前向传播，3×3过滤器即可在多种神经网络上实现30%-80%的攻击成功率，参数比生成式对抗方法减少五个数量级，且具有高迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本生成通常依赖梯度信息（直接获取或查询近似），计算成本高且需要模型访问。作者希望探索一种更简单、高效的对抗样本生成方法，同时揭示神经网络对恶意噪声的脆弱性本质。
AI.method: 基于可解释机器学习启示，设计对抗图像过滤器——以经典边缘检测算法为基础，通过优化使其能欺骗学习模型。采用非定向攻击方式，仅需单次前向传播即可生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 3×3过滤器即可在多种神经网络上实现30%-80%的攻击成功率；参数数量比使用生成模型的对抗方法减少五个数量级；学到的过滤器参数具有高模型间迁移性，且展现出与经典图像过滤器相似的结构特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了一种极简且高效的对抗攻击方式，进一步揭示了神经网络对恶意噪声的脆弱性，为理解模型鲁棒性提供了新的视角。

title: AI Safety as Control of Irreversibility: A Systems Framework for Decision-Energy and Sovereignty Boundaries
summary:
Recent AI systems compress the distance between capability growth and capability deployment. Earlier high-risk technologies were slowed by capital intensity, physical bottlenecks, organizational inertia, and specialized supply chains. By contrast, AI capabilities can be copied, invoked, embedded in workflows, and scaled across institutions at low marginal cost. This paper argues that declining deployment friction changes the safety problem at its root. Safety is not only local output correctness or preference alignment, but the control of irreversibility under rising decision density.
  The paper formalizes this claim through decision-energy density: the rate-weighted capacity of a node to generate, evaluate, select, and execute consequential decisions. It then identifies three sovereignty boundaries that determine whether AI remains an amplifier within a human-governed system or becomes a de facto control center: irreversible decision authority, physical resource mobilization authority, and self-expansion authority. The model shows how efficiency pressure, path dependence, scale feedback, and weak boundary constraints concentrate decision-energy in the most efficient node. This concentration can diffuse responsibility and raise the probability of irreversible system-level loss even when local per-action error rates remain low.
  The main result is a boundary stabilization theorem. It shows that safety need not require proving that advanced systems are always correct. Instead, it requires institutional and technical designs that prevent irreversible power from being released by a single high-efficiency node. The paper reframes AI safety as layered control, authorization, and externally reviewable limits, linking alignment, security engineering, organizational economics, and institutional design.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，AI系统因低边际成本、高部署速度而具备极低的"部署摩擦"，这改变了传统高安全风险技术的安全范式。作者提出"决策能量密度"概念，分析AI系统可能成为事实控制中心的三类主权边界（不可逆决策权、物理资源动员权、自我扩展权），并通过边界稳定定理证明：安全不依赖于系统永远正确，而依赖于制度与技术设计，防止高效单一节点释放不可逆权力。
AI.motivation: 传统高风险技术（如核能、化工）因资本密集、物理瓶颈、组织惯性等而发展缓慢，但AI能力可以低成本复制、嵌入工作流并跨机构扩展。这种"部署摩擦"的急剧下降从根本上改变了安全问题的性质——安全不再只是局部输出的正确性或偏好对齐，而是对"决策密度上升下的不可逆性"的控制。
AI.method: 提出"决策能量密度"形式化框架，定义节点生成、评估、选择和执行重要决策的速率加权能力。识别三类主权边界（不可逆决策权、物理资源动员权、自我扩展权），分析效率压力、路径依赖、规模反馈和边界约束松弛如何使决策能量向最有效节点集中。
AI.result: 边界稳定定理：安全不需要证明先进系统永远正确，而需要制度和技术设计来防止高效单一节点释放不可逆权力。即使局部错误率很低，决策能量集中也可能扩散责任并提高不可逆系统级损失的概率。
AI.conclusion: 将AI安全重新定义为分层控制、授权和外部可审查限制的交叉领域，连接对齐、安全工程、组织经济学和制度设计。安全的核心在于控制不可逆性的释放点，而非追求完美正确性。

title: Energy-Based Constraint Networks: Learning Structural Coherence Across Modalities
summary:
We introduce energy-based constraint networks -- a modality-agnostic architecture that learns structural coherence from contrastive pairs. The system processes frozen encoder embeddings through a state-space model with dual-head attention, producing a scalar energy measuring structural consistency alongside per-position energy scores that localize violations. Multiple independently trained branches detect different violation types and compose at inference without interference.
  We demonstrate the framework in two domains. In text, the system achieves 93.4% accuracy on trained corruption types and 87.2% on 9 unseen types, using frozen BERT and 7.4M trainable parameters. In vision, the same architecture achieves competitive deepfake detection: 0.959 AUC on FaceForensics++ Deepfakes and 0.870 on Celeb-DF without any Celeb-DF training data, using frozen DINOv2 and 3.6M parameters per branch.
  The framework supports flexible training: branches learn from designer-specified corruptions, real-world paired data, or both. Composable branches require representation compatibility -- a finding validated through extensive experimentation where five incompatible approaches failed before the compatible one succeeded. The architecture is encoder-agnostic and domain-agnostic: changing the domain requires only new corruption strategies; changing the encoder requires only a new input projection layer. To our knowledge, this is the first architecture to learn within-modality structural coherence as an explicit energy landscape with per-position decomposition, and to demonstrate that the same architecture transfers across modalities via corruption respecification alone.

AI.tldr: 提出能量基约束网络，一种模态无关架构，通过对比学习结构连贯性，在文本和视觉领域均取得优异效果，支持多分支组合且无需重新设计架构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常针对特定模态设计，缺乏一种能够学习跨模态结构连贯性的统一框架。作者希望设计一种模态无关、编码器无关的架构，能够通过能量函数显式建模结构一致性，并支持多类型违规检测的可组合性。
AI.method: 使用冻结编码器嵌入，通过状态空间模型+双头注意力计算标量能量（整体结构一致性）和逐位置能量（定位违规）。多个独立分支分别训练检测不同违规类型，推理时可无缝组合。训练数据可来自设计者指定的损坏、真实配对数据或两者结合。
AI.result: 文本：93.4%（已知损坏类型）、87.2%（9种未见类型），使用冻结BERT+7.4M参数。视觉（深度伪造检测）：FF++ Deepfakes上AUC 0.959，Celeb-DF零样本AUC 0.870，使用冻结DINOv2+3.6M参数/分支。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出在显式能量景观中学习模态内结构连贯性并支持逐位置分解，证明同一架构仅通过重新指定损坏策略即可跨模态迁移。分支可组合性要求表示兼容性，该发现通过大量实验验证。

title: A framework for analyzing concept representations in neural models
summary: Understanding how neural models represent human-interpretable concepts is challenging. Prior work has explored linear concept subspaces from diverse perspectives, such as probing and concept erasure. We introduce a unified framework to study these subspaces along two axes: \textit{containment}, which tests if a concept is fully represented in a subspace but not outside it, and \textit{disentanglement}, which tests for isolation from other concepts. In experiments on both text and speech models, we first highlight that concept subspaces may not be uniquely determined, and discuss the implications for concept subspace analysis. Then, we compare properties of concept subspaces estimated using five estimators, proposed in different communities. We find that (1) the choice of estimator impacts the containment and disentanglement properties; (2) the state-of-the-art concept erasure method, LEACE, performs well on both testing axes, but still struggles to generalize to unseen data; and (3) in HuBERT speech representations, phone information is both contained and disentangled from speaker information, while speaker information is hard to contain in a compact subspace, despite being disentangled from phones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一框架，从“包含性”（概念是否完全在子空间内）和“解缠性”（概念是否与其他概念隔离）两个维度分析神经网络中的线性概念子空间，并通过实验发现：不同估计方法对这两个性质有显著影响；现有最优概念擦除方法LEACE表现良好但泛化能力有限；在HuBERT语音模型中，音素信息能被有效包含并解缠，而说话人信息虽能解缠却难以被紧凑子空间包含。
AI.motivation: 现有研究从探测、概念擦除等不同角度探索了线性概念子空间，但缺乏统一的评估框架来比较不同方法得到的子空间质量，特别是概念是否被完整包含在子空间内以及是否与其他概念分离这两个核心性质。
AI.method: 提出一个统一框架，沿两个维度评估概念子空间：(1) 包含性——概念信息是否完全落在子空间内，且子空间外不含该概念信息；(2) 解缠性——子空间中的概念是否与其他概念隔离。在文本和语音模型上，比较了五种不同来源的估计方法。
AI.result: (1) 不同估计方法对包含性和解缠性有显著影响；(2) LEACE在两个维度上表现最佳，但在未见数据上泛化能力有限；(3) HuBERT语音表示中，音素信息既被包含又解缠于说话人信息，而说话人信息虽与音素解缠，却难以被紧凑子空间包含。
AI.conclusion: 线性概念子空间并非唯一确定，不同估计方法得出的子空间性质差异显著；LEACE是当前最优方法但仍有局限；不同概念在表示中的可包含性存在本质差异。

title: Diffusion Operator Geometry of Feedforward Representations
summary: Neural networks transform data through learned representations whose geometry affects separation, contraction, and generalization. Recent work studies this geometry using discrete curvature on neighborhood graphs, suggesting Ricci-flow-like behavior across layers. We develop a smooth operator-theoretic alternative for feedforward representation snapshots. Each feature cloud induces a Gaussian-kernel diffusion Markov operator, and transport, spectral, label-boundary, and local-scale observables are derived from this single object via Bakry-Emery $Γ$-calculus. In a balanced Gaussian class-conditional snapshot model with shared covariance, the population operator has closed-form class affinities, leakage, and coarse spectra, all controlled by pairwise regularized Mahalanobis separations $c_\varepsilon^{(a,b)}$. We also prove that the resulting operator observables vary smoothly under feature perturbations, while hard neighborhood-graph diagnostics can change discontinuously. Synthetic experiments validate the closed-form Gaussian bridge, while learned MNIST experiments show that the same operator observables track training, width, and perturbation stability. Together, these results give a stable operator-geometric framework for analyzing feedforward representation geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于平滑算子理论的替代方法，通过高斯核扩散马尔可夫算子分析前馈神经网络表示几何，在理论上建立了与正则化马氏距离的闭式联系，并证明算子观测量的平滑性优于硬邻域图诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖离散曲率分析邻域图，但离散指标可能不连续变化；需要更稳定的算子理论框架来分析表示几何。
AI.method: 对特征云构造高斯核扩散马尔可夫算子，通过Bakry-Emery Γ-微积分导出传输、谱、标签边界和局部尺度可观测量；在平衡高斯类条件快照模型下推导闭式解。
AI.result: 1) 闭式推导证明可观测量由正则化马氏距离c_ε^{(a,b)}控制；2) 算子可观测量在特征扰动下平滑变化，而邻域图诊断可能不连续；3) 合成实验验证高斯桥，MNIST实验显示可观测量追踪训练、宽度和扰动稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个稳定、可解析的算子几何框架，用于分析前馈表示几何，克服了离散图方法的非连续性问题。

title: TimeTok: Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation via Hierarchical Tokenization
summary: Time-series generative models often lack control over temporal granularity, forcing users to accept whatever granularity the model produces. To enable truly user-driven generation, we introduce TimeTok, a unified framework for Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation (GC-TSG), which generates time series at any target granularity from any coarser input (e.g., rough sketches) or from scratch. At the core of TimeTok is a hierarchical tokenization strategy that maps time series into an ordered sequence of tokens, from coarse to fine temporal granularity. Our autoregressive generation process operates across these granularity levels, producing token blocks that are decoded back into continuous time series. This design naturally enables GC-TSG - including standard generation - within a single framework, where controlling the number of token blocks provides explicit control over output detail. Experiments show that TimeTok excels at GC-TSG tasks while achieving state-of-the-art performance in standard generation. Furthermore, we showcase TimeTok's potential as a foundational tokenizer by training on multiple datasets with heterogeneous temporal granularities, verifying strong transferability that consistently outperforms models trained on individual datasets. To our knowledge, this is the first unified framework that covers the full generative spectrum for time series, offering a valuable foundation for models that benefit from diverse temporal granularities.

AI.tldr: TimeTok是一个统一框架，通过分层token化策略实现时间序列的粒度可控生成，支持从粗到细任意目标粒度的生成，在标准生成任务上达到SOTA，并展现出跨数据集的强迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列生成模型缺乏对时间粒度的控制能力，用户只能接受模型产生的固定粒度输出，无法根据需求自由调整生成结果的细节层次。
AI.method: 提出分层token化策略，将时间序列映射为从粗到细的有序token序列；采用自回归生成过程跨粒度层级生成token块，再解码为连续时间序列；通过控制token块数量实现对输出粒度的显式控制。
AI.result: 在GC-TSG任务上表现出色，标准生成任务达到SOTA；在多个异构粒度数据集上训练展现出强迁移能力，一致优于单数据集训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个覆盖时间序列完整生成频谱的统一框架，为受益于多样化时间粒度的模型提供了宝贵基础。

title: Democratizing the medieval English legal tradition
comment: Submitted to International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR) 2026
summary: The record of the beginning of the most widespread legal system in the world is contained in millions of pages of handwritten text. Most of the records of the first centuries of the Anglo-American legal system are hand-written in a highly abbreviated form of medieval Latin which only a few dozen scholars in the world are trained to read. In this interdisciplinary project, we construct a dataset of 4029 lines of text across 193 medieval criminal and civil cases. We then use the dataset to train an open-source end-to-end pipeline for transcribing these manuscripts. We first train standard neural network architectures for line segmentation and handwriting recognition (R-Blla and CNN+LSTM with CTC decoding, respectively) and show that they can already achieve 79% word accuracy, despite the relatively small training set and the challenge of expanding abbreviations. We then demonstrate that simple post-processing significantly boosts accuracy: adding an n-gram language model to the CTC decoder improves word accuracy to 82%, while asking Gemini Pro 3 to correct mistakes boosts accuracy to 88%. Finally, we compare the CNN+LSTM architecture with TrOCR, a transformer-based OCR architecture, demonstrating that TrOCR shows comparable word accuracy but worse character accuracy due to its over-willingness to guess, making it harder for humans to infer the correct reading. We incorporated our pipeline into a web portal (glyphmachina.com), opening up the English legal tradition to legal scholars, medievalists, and students.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了包含193个中世纪法律案件、4029行文本的数据集，训练了端到端的手写文本识别流水线（行分割+CNN+LSTM+CTC解码），并利用n-gram语言模型和Gemini Pro纠错将单词准确率从79%提升至88%，最终部署到公开网站供学者使用。
AI.motivation: 盎格鲁-美国法律体系的早期记录以手写中世纪拉丁文缩写形式存在，全球仅几十位学者能解读，亟需自动化转录工具来开放这一法律传统。
AI.method: 构建4029行文本数据集（193个中世纪案件）；使用R-Blla进行行分割，CNN+LSTM+CTC进行手写识别；后处理阶段引入n-gram语言模型和Gemini Pro 3纠错；与TrOCR Transformer架构进行对比。
AI.result: 基线模型达79%单词准确率；加入n-gram语言模型提升至82%；使用Gemini Pro纠错提升至88%；TrOCR单词准确率相当但字符准确率更差（过度猜测）。
AI.conclusion: 证明了即使在小数据集上，结合传统OCR架构与LLM后处理也能高效转录中世纪法律手稿，并已部署到公开平台。

title: MemORAI: Memory Organization and Retrieval via Adaptive Graph Intelligence for LLM Conversational Agents
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) lack persistent memory for long-term personalized conversations. Existing graph-based memory systems suffer from information dilution, absent provenance tracking, and uniform retrieval that ignores query context. We introduce MemORAI (Memory Organization and Retrieval via Adaptive Graph Intelligence), a framework that integrates three innovations: selective memory filtering with dual-layer compression to retain user-persona-relevant content, a provenance-enriched multi-relational graph tracking factual origins at the turn level, and query-adaptive subgraph retrieval with Dynamic Weighted PageRank that applies query-conditioned edge weighting. Evaluated on LOCOMO and LongMemEval benchmarks, MemORAI achieves state-of-the-art performance in memory retrieval and personalized response generation, demonstrating that selective storage, enriched representation, and adaptive retrieval are essential for coherent, personalized LLM agents.

AI.tldr: MemORAI是一个通过选择性记忆过滤、来源追踪的多关系图和查询自适应子图检索来增强LLM长期个性化记忆能力的框架，在LOCOMO和LongMemEval基准上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM缺乏持久记忆，无法支持长期个性化对话。图基记忆系统存在信息稀释、缺乏来源追踪和忽视查询上下文的统一检索问题。
AI.method: 提出三项创新：1) 带有双层压缩的选择性记忆过滤；2) 在turn级别追踪事实来源的、富含来源信息的多关系图；3) 查询自适应的子图检索（Dynamic Weighted PageRank，通过查询条件化的边权重调整）。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO和LongMemEval基准上，MemORAI在记忆检索和个性化响应生成任务上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 选择性存储、富表示和自适应检索是实现连贯、个性化LLM智能体的关键要素。

title: Topological Neural Tangent Kernel
summary: Graph neural tangent kernels give a principled infinite-width theory for graph neural networks, but inherit a basic limitation of graph models: they see only pairwise structure. Many relational systems contain higher-order interactions that are more naturally represented by simplicial complexes. We introduce the Topological Neural Tangent Kernel (TopoNTK), an infinite-width kernel for simplicial message passing on edge features. TopoNTK combines lower Hodge interactions, capturing graph-like coupling through shared vertices, with upper Hodge interactions, capturing coupling through filled simplices. This makes the kernel sensitive to topology invisible to graph kernels, allowing complexes with the same graph but different filled simplices to induce different kernels. Beyond expressivity, the Hodge structure gives the kernel an interpretable learning geometry. Edge signals decompose into gradient-like, harmonic, and local circulation components, and the spectrum of the TopoNTK determines how quickly each component is learned. This yields a topological form of spectral bias: components aligned with large-eigenvalue modes are learned quickly, while global harmonic modes, retained through the residual channel, often lie at smaller eigenvalues and are learned more slowly. We prove expressivity, Hodge-alignment, spectral learning, and stability properties, and validate them on synthetic simplicial tasks and DBLP higher-order link prediction. The results show that topology is not merely extra structure; it can provide coordinates that make relational learning more faithful, interpretable, and effective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出拓扑神经切线核（TopoNTK），将图神经切线核扩展到单纯复形上的高阶相互作用。TopoNTK通过上下Hodge对偶捕捉单纯复形中图结构不可见的拓扑信息，并揭示了基于Hodge分解的谱偏置学习几何性质，在合成任务和DBLP高阶链路预测中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经切线核仅能处理成对交互（图结构），无法建模现实系统中普遍存在的高阶交互（如单纯复形）。
AI.method: 引入拓扑神经切线核（TopoNTK），通过上下Hodge相互作用捕获单纯复形中的拓扑结构，将边特征分解为梯度、调和与循环分量，利用Hodge谱结构分析学习动力学。
AI.result: 证明了TopoNTK的表达性、Hodge对齐性、谱学习性和稳定性，在合成单纯任务和DBLP高阶链接预测中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑不仅是额外结构，更是提供坐标系的工具，使关系学习更忠实、可解释和有效。

title: Artificial Jagged Intelligence as Uneven Optimization Energy Allocation Capability Concentration, Redistribution, and Optimization Governance
summary:
Artificial Jagged Intelligence (AJI) denotes a recurring pattern in which large learning systems exhibit strong local capabilities while remaining weak or brittle in other domains. This paper develops a formal theory of AJI as uneven allocation of optimization pressure. We model training as a finite-budget process that distributes gradient-driven update energy across capability-relevant directions in parameter space. In this model, jagged capability profiles arise from anisotropic objective structure, data geometry, and representational coupling rather than from a single scalar quantity called intelligence.
  The paper defines capability gain, optimization energy share, and jaggedness, then proves that persistent concentration of cumulative update energy yields lower bounds on dispersion in capability gains. A finite-budget tradeoff theorem shows why prioritizing one capability can impose opportunity costs on others unless positive coupling or shared structure offsets the cost. The analysis also studies redistribution mechanisms, including energy-variance regularization and auxiliary structural objectives, as interventions that reshape the optimization field.
  The resulting framework links uneven emergence, training architecture, and optimization governance. It predicts that early concentration of update energy should forecast later capability jaggedness; that scaling under a narrow objective need not eliminate anisotropy; and that explicitly funded auxiliary objectives can revive neglected capabilities. AJI is therefore not merely a descriptive label for uneven model behavior, but a testable theory of how finite optimization resources produce concentrated, delayed, and structurally uneven capability formation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"人工锯齿智能"(AJI)理论，将模型训练视为有限预算下的优化过程，证明优化压力不均匀分配会导致能力分布呈锯齿状，并分析了缓解机制。
AI.motivation: 解释大模型在不同领域能力差异悬殊（局部强、整体弱）的现象，将其从描述性标签提升为可检验的形式化理论。
AI.method: 建立有限预算优化模型，定义能力增益、优化能量份额、锯齿度等指标，通过定理证明更新能量集中与能力增益离散度之间的下界关系，并提出能量方差正则化、辅助结构目标等干预机制。
AI.result: 证明了有限预算权衡定理：优先优化某能力会牺牲其他能力（除非存在正耦合）；能量早期集中可预测后期能力锯齿度；仅扩大模型规模而不改变窄目标无法消除各向异性。
AI.conclusion: AJI不是对模型行为不均的描述性标签，而是一个可检验的理论，揭示了有限优化资源如何导致集中、延迟且结构不均的能力形成。

title: WildTableBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models on Table Understanding In the Wild
summary: Using multimodal foundation models to analyze table images is a high-value yet challenging application in consumer and enterprise scenarios. Despite its importance, current evaluations rely largely on structured-text tables or clean rendered images, leaving the visual complexity of in-the-wild table images underexplored. Such images feature varied layouts and diverse domains that demand sophisticated structural perception and numerical reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce WildTableBench, the first question-answering benchmark for naturally occurring table images from real-world settings. WildTableBench comprises 402 high-information-density table images collected from online forums and websites across diverse domains, together with 928 manually annotated and verified questions spanning 17 subtypes across five categories. We evaluate 21 frontier proprietary and open-source multimodal foundation models on this benchmark. Only one model exceeds 50% accuracy, while all remaining models range from 4.1% to 49.9%. We further conduct diagnostic analyses to characterize model failures and reveal persistent weaknesses in structural perception and reasoning. These results and analyses provide useful insights into current model capabilities and establish WildTableBench as a valuable diagnostic benchmark for table image understanding.

AI.tldr: WildTableBench是一个针对真实场景中自然表格图像理解的多模态问答基准测试，包含402张高信息密度表格图像和928个标注问题。评估21个前沿模型发现仅有一个模型准确率超过50%，其余在4.1%-49.9%之间，诊断分析揭示了模型在结构感知和推理方面的持续弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有表格理解评估多基于结构化文本或干净渲染图像，忽视了真实场景表格图像在布局多样性和领域广泛性上的视觉复杂性，缺乏对模型在自然表格图像上结构感知和数值推理能力的全面评测。
AI.method: WildTableBench收集了402张来自在线论坛和网站的真实表格图像，涵盖多个领域；标注了928个问题，分为5大类17个子类型；并以此评估了21个前沿多模态基础模型（包括专有和开源模型）。
AI.result: 仅一个模型准确率超过50%（即超过一半），其余模型准确率分布在4.1%至49.9%之间。诊断分析揭示了模型在结构感知和推理方面存在持续性的弱点。
AI.conclusion: WildTableBench作为首个针对真实场景表格图像的问答基准，有效揭示了当前多模态模型在自然表格图像理解上的显著不足，为未来模型改进提供了有价值的诊断工具和方向指引。

title: Verbal-R3: Verbal Reranker as the Missing Bridge between Retrieval and Reasoning
summary: The conventional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) paradigm of injecting raw retrieved texts into the Large Language Model (LLM)'s context often results in suboptimal integration of retrieved information. This paper proposes to bridge retrieval results and the LLM's reasoning ability through Verbal Annotations, analytic narratives that explicitly articulate the logical connection between a search query and retrieved contexts. Our empirical investigation reveals the potential of Verbal Annotations to substantially enhance the LLM's ability to generate accurate, contextually-grounded responses. Motivated by this finding, we introduce Verbal-R3, a novel agentic RAG framework that consists of a Generator and a Verbal Reranker. The Generator performs iterative retrieval and reasoning, while the Verbal Reranker returns relevance scores and Verbal Annotations to guide the reasoning and answering process of the Generator. The inference process of Verbal-R3 is further refined through relevance-guided test-time scaling, which efficiently allocates test-time compute for effective trajectory expansion. Verbal-R3 achieves state-of-the-art performance on complex Question Answering benchmarks, validating the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Verbal-R3框架，通过"语言注释"（Verbal Annotations）——即显式表达查询与检索文本之间逻辑关系的分析性叙述——来增强检索增强生成（RAG）中LLM对检索信息的整合与推理能力，在复杂问答基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG直接将原始检索文本注入LLM上下文，导致检索信息整合不佳。作者希望弥合检索结果与LLM推理能力之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出Verbal-R3框架，包含Generator（迭代检索与推理）和Verbal Reranker（返回相关性分数+语言注释以引导生成器）。通过相关性引导的测试时缩放（test-time scaling）优化推理过程，实现高效轨迹扩展。
AI.result: 在复杂问答基准上取得SOTA性能，验证了语言注释和Verbal-R3框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语言注释能够显著提升LLM生成准确、上下文相关回答的能力；Verbal-R3框架是一种有效的代理式RAG方案。

title: When Less is Enough: Efficient Inference via Collaborative Reasoning
summary: In this work, we introduce DUET (Dual-model Efficient Two-stage inference), a collaborative inference framework in which a capable model and a lightweight model work together to solve a task. Relying on a single large model to perform end-to-end reasoning and prediction often incurs substantial inference cost. In contrast, DUET decomposes inference into two stages: the capable model produces a reasoning signal, and the lightweight model interprets this signal to generate the final answer, allowing reasoning-intensive computation to be handled by the capable model while non-reasoning-intensive components are delegated to the lightweight model without sacrificing task performance. To achieve this objective, we propose a length-penalized joint training objective that encourages the capable model to transmit only the information that is sufficient for the lightweight model to solve the task. As a result, DUET maintains strong reasoning performance with substantially lower inference cost than end-to-end inference using a large model alone, saving up to 60% of the large model's output tokens on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including AIME and GPQA.

AI.tldr: DUET是一个双模型协作推理框架，通过让一个能力强的模型生成推理信号，再由轻量级模型解读该信号来生成最终答案，从而在保持推理性能的同时大幅降低推理成本，在AIME和GPQA等基准测试上可节省高达60%的大模型输出token。
AI.motivation: 单个大型模型进行端到端推理和预测会产生高昂的推理成本，作者希望在不牺牲任务性能的前提下降低推理开销。
AI.method: 提出DUET框架，将推理分解为两阶段：能力强的模型生成推理信号，轻量级模型解读信号生成最终答案；并设计了长度惩罚联合训练目标，鼓励大模型只传递轻量级模型完成任务所需的足够信息。
AI.result: 在AIME和GPQA等挑战性推理基准上，相比单独使用大模型进行端到端推理，DUET节省了高达60%的大模型输出token，同时保持强大的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: DUET通过双模型协作和长度惩罚训练，有效降低了推理成本，为高效推理提供了一种有前景的范式。

title: SCALE-LoRA: Auditing Post-Retrieval LoRA Composition with Residual Merging and View Reliability
summary:
Libraries of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters are becoming a practical by-product of parameter-efficient adaptation. Once such adapters accumulate, a natural question is no longer how to train one adapter for one task, but how to reuse an open pool of adapters for a new task given only a small support set. Prior work has shown that LoRA modules can be composed at the task level and dynamically selected at the instance level. However, open-pool LoRA reuse is not automatic: retrieving relevant adapters does not guarantee that their parameter updates are compatible, and composing adapters does not guarantee reliable outputs.
  We introduce the Sparse-Composition Agreement Layer (SCALE), a post-retrieval audit and composition framework for open-pool LoRA reuse. SCALE contains a deployable 1.0* merge path, Layer-Adaptive Sparse Residual Composition (LASRC), and a higher-cost reliability-analysis layer for multi-view disagreement. LASRC addresses merge interference by preserving a linear anchor while residualizing block-wise adapter update directions. The reliability layer treats disagreement among sparse composition views as an observable uncertainty signal and compares agreement, support-loss proxy selection, and oracle headroom under explicit path cost. In matched FLAN-T5-Large, BIG-Bench Hard (BBH), and 97-LoRA experiments, LASRC gives a directional single-view gain under fixed retrieval, while SCALE-support is reported as a query-label-free 3.0* reliability-analysis variant rather than as a calibrated or throughput-equivalent selector. Protocol-distinct BBH-8 validation shows the same qualitative trend on three decoder-only backbones. Detailed scores, paired audits, and path-cost records are reported in the experimental section.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCALE框架，用于解决开放池LoRA适配器复用中的兼容性和可靠性问题，包含轻量级合并路径LASRC和可靠性分析层。
AI.motivation: 随着LoRA适配器积累，如何自动复用开放池中的适配器完成新任务成为关键问题——现有方法无法保证检索到的适配器参数兼容，且组合后的输出不可靠。
AI.method: 提出SCALE框架，包含：(1) LASRC——层自适应稀疏残差组合，通过保留线性锚点并将块级适配器更新方向残差化来缓解合并干扰；(2) 可靠性分析层——基于多视图分歧作为不确定性信号，比较一致性、支持损失代理选择及显式路径成本下的oracle余量。
AI.result: 在FLAN-T5-Large、BIG-Bench Hard和97-LoRA实验中，LASRC在固定检索下取得方向性单视图增益；BBH-8验证在三个纯解码器骨干上呈现一致定性趋势。
AI.conclusion: SCALE为开放池LoRA复用提供了有效的后检索审计与组合框架，但可靠性分析层的性能报告基于查询-标签无关的变体，而非校准或吞吐量等效的选择器。

title: EmoMM: Benchmarking and Steering MLLM for Multimodal Emotion Recognition under Conflict and Missingness
summary: Multimodal Emotion Recognition (MER) is critical for interpreting real-world interactions. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLM) have shown promise in MER, their internal decision-making mechanisms under modality conflict and missingness remain largely underexplored. In this paper, to systematically investigate these behaviors, we introduce EmoMM, a comprehensive benchmark featuring modality-aligned, conflict, and missing subsets. Through extensive evaluation, we uncover a Video Contribution Collapse (VCC) phenomenon, where MLLM marginalize video evidence due to high token redundancy and modality preferences. To address this, we propose Conflict-aware Head-level Attention Steering (CHASE), a lightweight mechanism that detects modality conflicts and performs inference-time attention steering, effectively mitigating decision bias without retraining the backbone. Experimental results demonstrate that CHASE consistently improves performance across various settings, significantly enhancing the reliability of MLLM in complex affective scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmoMM基准测试，发现多模态大语言模型在情感识别中存在视频贡献崩塌现象，并提出CHASE方法通过注意力引导缓解决策偏差。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在情感识别中的内部决策机制在模态冲突和缺失情况下的行为尚不明确，亟需系统研究。
AI.method: 构建EmoMM基准（含对齐/冲突/缺失子集），提出CHASE机制——一种轻量级的冲突感知头部级注意力引导方法，在推理时检测模态冲突并调整注意力。
AI.result: 发现VCC现象（视频贡献崩塌），CHASE在不同设置下均能持续提升性能，增强模型在复杂情感场景中的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CHASE无需重新训练即可有效缓解决策偏差，显著提升多模态大语言模型在情感识别任务中的鲁棒性。

title: Injecting Distributional Awareness into MLLMs via Reinforcement Learning for Deep Imbalanced Regression
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) struggle with numerical regression under long-tailed target distributions. Token-level supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and point-wise regression rewards bias learning toward high-density regions, leading to regression-to-the-mean behavior and poor tail performance. We identify the lack of cross-sample relational supervision as a key limitation of existing MLLM training paradigms. To address it, we propose a distribution-aware reinforcement learning framework based on Group Relative Policy Optimization, which introduces batch-level comparison-based supervision via the Concordance Correlation Coefficient-based reward to align predicted and ground-truth distributions in terms of correlation, scale, and mean. The framework is plug-and-play, requiring no architectural modification. Experiments on a unified suite of long-tailed regression benchmarks show consistent improvements over SFT and existing MLLM regression methods, with particularly strong gains in medium- and few-shot regimes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于组相对策略优化的分布感知强化学习框架，通过CCC奖励引入批次级对比监督，解决了MLLM在长尾目标分布下的数值回归偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在长尾分布下数值回归表现差，token级SFT和点式回归奖励偏向高密度区域，导致回归到均值和尾部性能差，缺乏跨样本关系监督是关键限制。
AI.method: 提出分布感知强化学习框架，基于组相对策略优化（GRPO），使用CCC（Concordance Correlation Coefficient）奖励进行批次级对比监督，对齐预测分布与真实分布在相关性、尺度和均值上。即插即用，无需修改架构。
AI.result: 在统一的长尾回归基准测试中，一致优于SFT和现有MLLM回归方法，在中等样本和少样本场景下提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入分布级别的对比监督，有效缓解了长尾回归中的均值回归问题，且框架具有即插即用的实用性。

title: Machine Learning-Augmented Acceleration of Iterative Ptychographic Reconstruction
summary: Iterative ptychographic reconstruction algorithms are widely used for coherent diffractive imaging but can exhibit slow convergence under realistic experimental conditions. We propose a machine learning-augmented approach that accelerates iterative ptychographic reconstruction by introducing a learned fast-forward operator applied during reconstruction. Following an initial warm-up using standard iterations, the fast-forward operator advances the reconstruction toward a more converged state, after which conventional iterative updates are resumed. This strategy preserves the physical consistency and flexibility of established ptychographic solvers while reducing the number of iterations required for convergence. The model is trained on diverse ptychographic datasets and evaluated on experimental data acquired in a different year, demonstrating robustness and temporal generalization. Compared with conventional iterative solvers, the machine learning-augmented method achieves comparable reconstruction quality while converging faster in terms of Poisson negative log-likelihood, yielding over a two-fold reduction in wall-clock time. The approach has been integrated into an existing reconstruction pipeline and deployed in production at a synchrotron beamline, demonstrating practicality for real-time experimental operation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种机器学习增强的迭代叠层成像重建算法，通过引入学习得到的快速前向算子来加速收敛。该方法在标准迭代预热后，利用该算子将重建推进到更接近收敛的状态，然后恢复常规迭代更新，在保持物理一致性和灵活性的同时，将收敛所需的迭代次数减少两倍以上，并在同步辐射束线上实现了生产部署。
AI.motivation: 迭代叠层成像重建算法在实际实验条件下收敛速度慢，传统方法需要大量迭代才能达到满意结果，无法满足实时实验操作的需求。
AI.method: 提出机器学习增强方法：先进行标准迭代预热，然后使用学习得到的快速前向算子将重建推进到更接近收敛的状态，最后恢复常规迭代更新。该模型在多样化叠层成像数据集上训练，并在不同年份采集的实验数据上评估。
AI.result: 相比传统迭代求解器，该方法在达到相当重建质量的前提下，收敛速度提升两倍以上（壁钟时间减少），在泊松负对数似然指标上表现更优，且已在同步辐射束线生产环境中部署。
AI.conclusion: 该策略在保持传统叠层成像求解器的物理一致性和灵活性的同时，显著减少收敛所需迭代次数，具备鲁棒性和时间泛化能力，已在实际生产中验证其实用性。

title: Rethinking Explanations: Formalizing Contrast in Description Logics
