Trust can break when routing changes the cost, quality, or accountability of a response without the user being able to tell what happened. "Which model answered?" is only part of the audit question. The runtime path matters.
  Adaptive AI systems should produce a runtime transparency artifact called the route receipt. A route receipt is a compact record of the route that served a request. It should capture enough material facts for people relying on the output to reconstruct important routing decisions without exposing proprietary internals or hidden reasoning.
  Route transparency should be part of model documentation. Model cards describe trained model artifacts, while route receipts describe the runtime conditions under which a particular answer was produced. The paper introduces the route-receipt concept, a minimal schema and redaction model, and a documentation-based survey of selected platforms showing that receipt fragments already exist without a portable per-answer record.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AI系统应生成"路由收据"(route receipt)——一种轻量级的运行时透明度记录，用于记录每次请求经过的路由路径（如模型版本、服务层级、端点选择等），并将其纳入模型文档体系。
AI.motivation: AI路由过程（版本别名、服务层级、工具选择、区域端点等）影响成本、质量和可问责性，但用户无法感知这些变化。仅知道"哪个模型回答的"不足以支撑审计，运行时路径同样关键。
AI.method: 定义了路由收据（route receipt）概念，设计最小化schema和脱敏模型，并通过文档调研方式验证现有平台已存在碎片化的路由记录但缺少可移植的逐请求记录。
AI.result: 提出路由收据应与模型卡（model cards）互补：模型卡描述静态训练产物，路由收据描述动态运行时条件。现有平台已有路由收据的碎片信息，但缺乏统一的、可移植的逐请求记录格式。
AI.conclusion: 路由透明度应成为模型文档的一部分，路由收据是弥补当前AI系统可审计性和透明度缺失的关键设计。

title: Asymmetric Invertible Threat: Learning Reversible Privacy Defense for Face Recognition
summary: Face Recognition systems are widely deployed in real-world applications, but they also raise privacy concerns due to unauthorized collection and misuse of facial data. Existing adversarial privacy protection methods rely on input-space perturbations to obfuscate identity information, yet their protection can degrade when adversaries learn restoration or purification mappings that partially invert the transformation. We study this setting as an asymmetric adversarial attack, in which reverse manipulation becomes feasible because existing defense paradigms do not control reversibility. To address this problem, we propose Asymmetric Reversible Face Protection (ARFP), a restoration-aware extension of personalized face cloaking that integrates privacy protection, keyed recovery, and tamper indication in a single framework. ARFP consists of three components: Key-Conditioned Manifold Binding, which ties the protection transformation to a user-provided key; Adversarial Restoration-Aware Training, which introduces a surrogate restoration adversary during training to improve robustness against evaluated inverse purification attacks; and Authorized Reversible Restoration, which supports recovery with the correct key while providing nonce-based tamper indication. Extensive experiments under the threat models considered in this work show that ARFP improves resistance to the evaluated restoration attacks while preserving authorized recovery utility. These results provide empirical evidence of key-sensitive recovery behavior and tamper awareness in the tested settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种非对称可逆面部保护方法（ARFP），通过密钥控制、对抗性恢复感知训练和可逆恢复机制，在保护隐私的同时抵抗逆向攻击，并支持授权恢复与篡改检测。
AI.motivation: 现有面部对抗隐私保护方法仅依赖输入空间扰动，但攻击者可以通过学习恢复或纯化映射来部分逆转保护，导致保护失效。因此需要一种能控制可逆性的保护机制。
AI.method: ARFP包含三个组件：(1) 密钥条件流形绑定，将保护变换与用户密钥绑定；(2) 对抗性恢复感知训练，引入替代恢复攻击者提升鲁棒性；(3) 授权可逆恢复，支持正确密钥恢复并附带随机数篡改指示。
AI.result: 在设定的威胁模型下，ARFP有效提升了抵抗恢复攻击的能力，同时保持了授权恢复效用，并展示了密钥敏感的恢复行为和篡改感知能力。
AI.conclusion: ARFP通过非对称可逆设计，在隐私保护和可用性之间取得了更好平衡，为面部隐私保护提供了新的范式。

title: Prosa: Rubric-Based Evaluation of LLMs on Real User Chats in Brazilian Portuguese
summary: Rankings produced by holistic LLM-as-a-judge scoring are sensitive to the bias of the chosen judge model. We show that switching to binary rubric scoring with multi-judge filtering removes this sensitivity: decomposing the judgement matters more than the judge model itself. To support this claim, we introduce Prosa, the first real user multi-turn Brazilian Portuguese chat benchmark: 1,000 WildChat conversations scored by three judges from three model families on 16 models. Under filtered rubric scoring the three judges agree on every one of the 16 ranks, whereas under holistic scoring they agree on only 7 of 16. Additionally, the rubric filtering pipeline increases the average score gap between neighbouring models by 47%, thereby improving Prosa's discriminative power. Evaluating a new model on Prosa costs approximately $2.1 when using Gemini 3 Flash as the judge. We release the benchmark and the filtering code to ensure that future models can be assessed under identical conditions. These artifacts also make our rubric-based scoring method reusable beyond Prosa, supporting other open-ended evaluation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prosa基准测试，通过二进制评分标准和多裁判过滤方法，证明分解评判比选择裁判模型更重要，使不同裁判模型在16个模型排名上达成完全一致（而整体评分仅7个一致），并将相邻模型得分差距平均提升47%。
AI.motivation: 整体LLM-as-a-judge评分对裁判模型的选择敏感，不同裁判模型会产生有偏差的排名。作者希望消除这种敏感性，找到更稳健的评估方法。
AI.method: 采用二进制评分标准（rubric scoring）替代整体评分，结合多裁判过滤（multi-judge filtering）机制，在Prosa（首个真实用户多轮巴西葡萄牙语聊天基准）上使用来自3个模型家族的3个裁判对16个模型进行评估。
AI.result: 过滤后的评分标准下，3个裁判对16个模型排名完全一致；整体评分下仅7个一致。过滤流程使相邻模型得分差距平均提升47%，增强了区分能力。使用Gemini 3 Flash作为裁判时评估成本约2.1美元。
AI.conclusion: 分解评判比选择裁判模型更重要；二进制评分标准+多裁判过滤能显著提高评分的稳健性和区分度，且成本低廉，可推广到其他开放式评估场景。

title: Arbitrarily Conditioned Hierarchical Flows for Spatiotemporal Events
summary: Events in spatiotemporal systems are ubiquitous, yet modeling their complex distributions remains challenging. Existing point process models often rely on strong structural assumptions and are typically limited to autoregressive, event-by-event prediction. As a result, they struggle to support broader inference tasks such as inverse inference, trajectory reconstruction, and recovery of missing event locations. We introduce Arbitrarily Conditioned Hierarchical Flows (ARCH), a hierarchical flow matching framework for spatiotemporal event modeling. ARCH is expressive enough to capture complex event distributions while enabling tractable and accurate computation of conditional intensities, which quantify instantaneous event risk. Built on a history-encoder-generative-decoder architecture, ARCH introduces a hybrid masking strategy for flexible conditioning on arbitrary observed events. This enables a unified treatment of forecasting, inverse inference, and partial trajectory recovery within a single framework. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that ARCH consistently outperforms existing baselines across both prediction and conditional inference tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARCH框架，一种层次化流匹配方法，用于时空事件建模，能够灵活处理预测、逆向推理和轨迹恢复等多种推理任务，并在实验中优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有事件点过程模型通常依赖强结构假设，局限于自回归的逐事件预测，难以支持逆向推理、轨迹重建和缺失位置恢复等更广泛的推理任务。
AI.method: 提出层次化流匹配框架ARCH，采用历史编码器-生成解码器架构，引入混合掩码策略，实现对任意观测事件的条件建模，统一处理多种推理任务。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集上，ARCH在预测和条件推理任务中均一致优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ARCH框架克服了传统点过程模型的局限性，在保持表达能力的同时支持灵活的条件推理，为时空事件建模提供了统一且有效的解决方案。

title: Are LLMs More Skeptical of Entertainment News?
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Misinformation Detection in the Era of LLMs (MisD), co-located with ICWSM 2026, May 26, 2026, Los Angeles, CA, USA
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for automated news credibility assessment, yet it remains unclear whether they apply even-handed standards across journalistic genres. We examine whether zero-shot LLMs are more likely to misclassify legitimate entertainment news as fake than legitimate hard news, using a within-dataset design on GossipCop from FakeNewsNet. Across four frontier models, we find a clear but model-specific genre asymmetry: DeepSeek-V3.2 and GPT-5.2 show false-positive-rate gaps of 10.1 and 8.8 percentage points, respectively (both $p < .001$), whereas Claude Opus 4.6 and Gemini 3 Flash show no comparable difference. A style-swap experiment yields only limited and inconsistent changes, suggesting that the asymmetry is not reducible to stylistic register alone. Prompt-based mitigation is likewise possible but not generic: framing the model as an entertainment-news fact-checker reduces false positives for DeepSeek-V3.2 by about 50\% without detectable recall loss, but offers little improvement for GPT-5.2. Exploratory qualitative coding further suggests two recurring error patterns in sampled false positives: treating private-life claims as inherently unverifiable and discounting entertainment journalism as an epistemically weaker genre. Taken together, these findings show that aggregate performance metrics can obscure structured false positives within legitimate journalism. We argue that LLM-based credibility assessment may not only evaluate truth claims but also differentially recognize the legitimacy of journalistic genres, and that evaluation should therefore include genre-stratified false-positive analysis alongside overall accuracy.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在零样本评估新闻可信度时，对娱乐新闻的误判率显著高于严肃新闻，存在体裁不对称现象，且该偏差不能简单归因于文体风格差异，提示缓解策略也因模型而异。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM在新闻可信度评估中是否对不同新闻体裁（娱乐新闻 vs. 严肃新闻）应用了不一致的评判标准，即是否存在系统性偏差。
AI.method: 基于FakeNewsNet的GossipCop数据集进行within-dataset设计，使用四个前沿LLM（DeepSeek-V3.2、GPT-5.2、Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 3 Flash）进行零样本评估；通过风格互换实验、提示缓解策略和探索性定性编码分析偏差来源。
AI.result: DeepSeek-V3.2和GPT-5.2对娱乐新闻的误报率分别高出10.1和8.8个百分点（p<0.001），而Claude Opus 4.6和Gemini 3 Flash无显著差异；风格互换实验仅带来有限的、不一致的变化；提示缓解策略对DeepSeek有效但对GPT效果有限；定性分析发现两种错误模式：将私生活主张视为本质上不可验证，以及将娱乐新闻视为认识论上较弱的体裁。
AI.conclusion: LLM的可信度评估不仅评估事实主张，还会差异化地识别新闻体裁的合法性；评估时应包括按体裁分层的误报率分析，而非仅关注整体准确率。

title: Visual Implicit Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Visual Autoregressive Modeling (VAR) based on next-scale prediction achieves strong generation quality, but their explicit deep stacks fix the amount of computation per scale and inflate memory at high resolutions. We introduce Visual Implicit Autoregressive Modeling (VIAR), a next-scale autoregressive generator that embeds an implicit equilibrium layer between shallow pre/post blocks. The implicit layer is trained with Jacobian-Free Backpropagation, yielding constant training memory, while inference exposes a per-scale iteration knob that enables compute control. On ImageNet 256x256 benchmark, VIAR attains FID 2.16, and sFID 8.07 with only 38.4% parameters of VAR, matching or surpassing strong AR baselines and remaining competitive with large diffusion models. By controlling the per-scale knob, VIAR can reduce peak memory from 19.24 GB to 8.53 GB and doubles throughput from 15.16 to 32.08 images/s on a single RTX 4090, without retraining. Ablations show that fewer steps are sufficient for fixed-point iterations to converge and that VIAR consistently dominates VAR across quality efficiency operating points. In zero shot in-painting and class-conditional editing, VIAR produces sharper details and smoother boundaries while preserving global structure, validating the benefits of implicit equilibria and per-scale compute control for practical, deployable visual generation.

AI.tldr: VIAR基于隐式平衡层和逐尺度迭代控制，在ImageNet 256x256上达到FID 2.16，仅用VAR 38.4%的参数，且能动态降低峰值内存、提升吞吐量。
AI.motivation: VAR虽生成质量好，但显式深度堆叠导致每尺度计算量固定且高分辨率下内存膨胀。VIAR引入隐式平衡层替代深层堆叠，实现计算可控和内存高效。
AI.method: 在浅层pre/post块之间嵌入隐式平衡层（equilibrium layer），训练使用Jacobian-Free反向传播（JFB），推理时提供逐尺度迭代次数控制旋钮，实现计算量可调节。
AI.result: ImageNet 256x256上FID 2.16, sFID 8.07，参数仅为VAR的38.4%；峰值内存从19.24GB降至8.53GB，吞吐量从15.06提升至32.08 images/s（RTX 4090）。零样本修复和编辑任务中细节更清晰、边界更平滑。
AI.conclusion: 隐式平衡和逐尺度计算控制能有效提升视觉自回归生成的质量-效率权衡，为实际部署提供了更灵活、更高效的生成方案。

title: Beyond Perplexity: Character Distribution Signatures and the MDTA Benchmark for AI Text Detection
comment: 11 figures, 10 tables, 24 pages, Under Review at COLM 2026
summary: Training-free AI text detection methods primarily rely on model log-probabilities, achieving strong performance through approaches like Binoculars and DNA-DetectLLM. However, these methods face a fundamental ceiling as models are optimized through RLHF to produce human-like probability distributions. We introduce an alternative detection signal based on character distribution signatures. We provide theoretical foundations showing that AI models, trained on massive domain-balanced corpora, approximate global character patterns while humans exhibit domain-specialized distributions, creating a "Wall of Separation" where human-AI divergence significantly exceeds AI-AI divergence. To enable systematic evaluation, we construct the Models-Domains-Temperatures-Adversarials (MDTA) benchmark comprising 642,274 prompt-aligned samples across 4 models, 5 domains, 3 temperature settings, and 3 adversarial strategies, substantially expanding the HC3 dataset with modern model responses, temperature variation, and adversarial augmentation. We introduce the Letter Distribution Score (LD-Score), demonstrating low correlation (r = 0.08-0.13) with perplexity methods. When integrated with DNA-DetectLLM, Binoculars and FastDetectGPT via a non-linear classifier, LD-Score yields consistent improvements in AUROC and F1, with particularly pronounced gains in specialized domains where vocabulary constraints amplify the detection signal. The MDTA dataset can be accessed at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/nsp909/MDTA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于字符分布特征的AI文本检测方法LD-Score，从理论上证明人类与AI在字符分布上存在"分离墙"，并构建了包含64万样本的MDTA基准数据集。LD-Score与现有困惑度方法相关性低（r=0.08-0.13），集成后显著提升检测性能，尤其在专业领域效果更佳。
AI.motivation: 现有基于log概率的AI文本检测方法（如Binoculars、DNA-DetectLLM）存在根本性上限：模型通过RLHF优化后产生类似人类的概率分布，导致检测难度增加。作者旨在探索一种新的、与现有方法互补的检测信号——字符分布特征。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析：证明AI模型在领域均衡语料上训练会逼近全局字符模式，而人类呈现领域专业化分布，形成"分离墙"。2) 构建MDTA基准（642,274样本，涵盖4模型、5领域、3温度、3对抗策略）。3) 提出LD-Score（字母分布分数），通过非线性分类器集成到现有检测方法中。
AI.result: LD-Score与困惑度方法相关性极低（r=0.08-0.13）；集成到DNA-DetectLLM、Binoculars和FastDetectGPT后，AUROC和F1持续提升；在专业领域（词汇约束强）增益尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 字符分布信号是一种有效的、与现有概率方法互补的AI文本检测新范式，为突破RLHF优化带来的检测瓶颈提供了可行路径。MDTA数据集将推动该方向标准化评估。

title: Attention Sinks in Massively Multilingual Neural Machine Translation:Discovery, Analysis, and Mitigation
summary: Cross-attention patterns in neural machine translation (NMT) are widely used to study how multilingual models align linguistic structure. We report a systematic artifact in cross-attention analysis of NLLB-200 (600M): non-content tokens - primarily end-of-sequence tokens, language tags, and punctuation - capture 83 percent to 91 percent of total cross-attention mass. We term these "attention sinks," extending findings from LLMs [Xiao et al., 2023] to NMT cross-attention and identifying a causal mechanism rooted in vocabulary design rather than position bias. This artifact causes raw metrics to underestimate content-level similarity by nearly half (36.7 percent raw vs. 70.7 percent filtered), rendering uncorrected analyses unreliable. To address this, we validate a content-only filtering methodology that removes non-content tokens and renormalizes the distribution. Applying this to 1,000 parallel sentences across African languages (Swahili, Kikuyu, Somali, Luo) and non-African benchmarks (German, Turkish, Chinese, Hindi), we confirm the artifact is universal and recover masked linguistic signals: a 16.9 percentage-point gap between teacher-forcing and generation modes, clear language-family clustering in attention entropy, and a hidden Somali paradox linking SOV word order to monotonic alignment. We release our filtering toolkit and corrected datasets to support reproducible interpretability research on multilingual NMT.

AI.tldr: NLLB-200(600M)模型交叉注意力中83%-91%的注意力质量集中在非内容词（如结束符、语言标签、标点）上，导致原始指标低估内容相似度近一半。通过过滤非内容词并重新归一化，恢复了被掩盖的语言结构信号，并发现了16.9%的教师强制与生成模式差距、语言族聚类及索马里语悖论。
AI.motivation: 现有研究广泛使用交叉注意力模式分析多语言NMT中的语言结构对齐，但未注意到非内容词占据了绝大多数注意力质量，导致分析结果不可靠。作者旨在识别并量化这一系统性伪影，并提出修正方法以恢复可靠的语言学信号。
AI.method: 1) 识别NLLB-200(600M)交叉注意力中的非内容词注意力汇；2) 提出内容过滤方法——移除非内容词并重新归一化注意力分布；3) 在非洲语言（斯瓦希里语、基库尤语、索马里语、卢奥语）和非非洲语言（德语、土耳其语、中文、印地语）共1000个平行句上验证方法的普适性；4) 分析过滤前后注意力熵、对齐模式等语言学指标的变化。
AI.result: 非内容词占据83%-91%的注意力质量；原始内容相似度仅36.7%，过滤后升至70.7%；发现16.9%的教师强制与生成模式间注意力熵差距；语言族在注意力熵上呈现清晰聚类；揭示了索马里语SOV语序与单调对齐之间的隐藏矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 非内容词注意力汇是多语言NMT交叉注意力分析中的系统性伪影，起源于词汇设计而非位置偏差；内容过滤方法能有效恢复被掩盖的语言结构信号；发布了过滤工具和校正数据集以支持可复现的可解释性研究。

title: NH-CROP: Robust Pricing for Governed Language Data Assets under Cost Uncertainty
summary:
Language data are increasingly acquired and governed as assets, yet platforms often price candidate resources before knowing their true privacy or access costs. We study online pricing for governed language data assets under cost uncertainty. At each round, a platform observes an NLP task, a candidate asset, and a coarse cost estimate, may pay for a refined cost signal, posts a price, and receives safe net revenue.
  We introduce \textsc{NH-CROP}, a clipped robust pricing framework with a no-harm information-acquisition gate. The method compares direct pricing, risk-aware pricing, and verify-then-price, and acquires information only when its estimated decision value exceeds the best no-verification alternative. Across synthetic, real-proxy, and downstream-utility-grounded benchmarks, clipped \textsc{NH-CROP} variants improve or remain competitive with price-only and risk-aware baselines. Causal ablations show that paid verification is not the main source of gains in real-proxy and utility-grounded settings: the strongest learned policies often choose not to verify. Oracle and high-decision-value diagnostics show that refined cost information can still have substantial local value. Overall, governed language-data platforms should calibrate pricing under uncertain access costs first and verify only when information is cheap and decision-actionable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NH-CROP框架，研究语言数据资产在成本不确定下的在线定价问题。该框架包含无害信息获取门控，仅在验证的决策价值超过不验证的最优替代方案时才获取成本信息。实验表明，该框架在合成、真实代理和下游任务基准上表现优异，且付费验证并非主要收益来源。
AI.motivation: 语言数据平台在定价时面临成本不确定性（如隐私成本、访问成本），而平台往往在了解真实成本之前就需给出定价。现有方法未能有效处理这一在线定价与成本不确定性之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出NH-CROP（无伤害裁剪稳健定价框架），包含：1) 直接定价、风险感知定价、验证后定价三种策略的比较；2) 无害信息获取门控，仅在决策价值超过最佳无验证替代方案时才获取精确成本信号；3) 裁剪机制保证稳健性。
AI.result: 在合成数据、真实代理数据和下游任务效用基准上，裁剪版NH-CROP优于或持平于仅定价和风险感知基线。因果消融实验显示付费验证并非主要收益来源，最强策略往往选择不验证。但Oracle诊断表明精确成本信息仍具有显著局部价值。
AI.conclusion: 语言数据平台应首先在不确定访问成本下校准定价策略，仅在信息廉价且具有决策价值时才进行验证。

title: TT4D: A Pipeline and Dataset for Table Tennis 4D Reconstruction From Monocular Videos
summary: We present TT4D, a large-scale, high-fidelity table tennis dataset. It provides $140+$ hours of reconstructed singles and doubles gameplay from monocular broadcast videos, featuring multimodal annotations like high-quality camera calibrations, precise 3D ball positions, ball spin, time segmentation, and 3D human meshes over time. This rich data provides a new foundation for virtual replay, in-depth player analysis, and robot learning. The dataset's combination of scale and precision is achieved through a novel reconstruction pipeline. Prior methods first partition a game sequence into individual shot segments based on the 2D ball track, and only then attempt reconstruction. However, 2D-based time segmentation collapses under occlusion and varied camera viewpoints, preventing reliable reconstruction. We invert this paradigm by first lifting the entire unsegmented 2D ball track to 3D through a learned lifting network. This 3D trajectory then allows us to reliably perform time segmentation. The learned lifting network also infers the ball's spin, handles unreliable ball detections, and successfully reconstructs the ball trajectory in cases of high occlusion. This lift-first design is necessary, as our pipeline is the only method capable of reconstructing table tennis gameplay from general-view broadcast monocular videos. We demonstrate the dataset's fidelity through two downstream tasks: estimating the racket's pose \& velocity at impact, and training a generative model of competitive rallies.

AI.tldr: TT4D是一个大规模、高保真的乒乓球数据集，包含140+小时从单目广播视频重建的单打和双打比赛，提供相机标定、3D球位置、旋转、时间分割和3D人体网格等多模态标注。通过创新的"先提升后分割"重建流程，解决了传统方法基于2D分割在遮挡和多视角下失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法先根据2D球轨迹分割比赛序列为单个击球片段，再进行3D重建。但2D时间分割在遮挡和不同摄像机视角下会失效，导致重建不可靠。因此需要一种更鲁棒的重建方法。
AI.method: 提出"先提升后分割"（lift-first）范式：首先通过学习的提升网络将整个未分割的2D球轨迹提升到3D，然后基于3D轨迹进行可靠的时间分割。该网络还能推断球的旋转、处理不可靠的球检测，并在高遮挡情况下成功重建轨迹。
AI.result: 构建了TT4D数据集（140+小时，单打和双打），是目前唯一能从通用视角广播单目视频中重建乒乓球比赛的方法。通过两个下游任务（估计球拍在击球时的姿态与速度、训练比赛回合生成模型）验证了数据集的保真度。
AI.conclusion: TT4D为虚拟回放、深度球员分析和机器人学习提供了新基础。其"先提升后分割"的设计证明了在处理高遮挡和任意视角场景下的必要性。

title: MultiBreak: A Scalable and Diverse Multi-turn Jailbreak Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Safety
summary: We present MultiBreak, a scalable and diverse multi-turn jailbreak benchmark to evaluate large language model (LLM) safety. Multi-turn jailbreaks mimic natural conversational settings, making them easier to bypass safety-aligned LLM than single-turn jailbreaks. Existing multi-turn benchmarks are limited in size or rely heavily on templates, which restrict their diversity. To address this gap, we unify a wide range of harmful jailbreak intents, and introduce an active learning pipeline for expanding high-quality multi-turn adversarial prompts, where a generator is iteratively fine-tuned to produce stronger attack candidates, guided by uncertainty-based refinement. Our MultiBreak includes 10,389 multi-turn adversarial prompts, spans 2,665 distinct harmful intents, and covers the most diverse set of topics to date. Empirical evaluation shows that our benchmark achieves up to a 54.0 and 34.6 higher attack success rate (ASR)} than the second-best dataset on DeepSeek-R1-7B and GPT-4.1-mini, respectively. More importantly, safety evaluations suggest that diverse attack categories uncover fine-grained LLM vulnerabilities}, and categories that appear benign under single-turn can exhibit substantially higher adversarial effectiveness in multi-turn scenarios. These findings highlight persistent vulnerabilities of LLMs under realistic adversarial settings and establish MultiBreak as a scalable resource for advancing LLM safety.

AI.tldr: 提出了MultiBreak，一个大规模、多样化的多轮越狱基准测试集，包含10,389个多轮对抗提示，覆盖2,665种有害意图，在多个LLM上实现了比第二名数据集高54.0和34.6的攻击成功率，揭示了多轮对话下LLM的持续脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有单轮越狱容易被安全对齐的LLM防御，而多轮越狱更贴近真实对话场景，但已有的多轮基准测试规模小或依赖模板导致多样性不足。
AI.method: 统一了多种有害越狱意图，引入了一种主动学习流水线，通过迭代微调生成器并基于不确定性精炼来产生更强的多轮对抗攻击候选。
AI.result: MultiBreak包含10,389个多轮对抗提示、2,665种有害意图；在DeepSeek-R1-7B和GPT-4.1-mini上分别比第二名数据集高出54.0和34.6的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 多轮场景下LLM存在持续脆弱性，单轮看似安全的攻击类别在多轮中可能具有更高的对抗效力，MultiBreak可作为可扩展的资源推动LLM安全研究。

title: CombinationTS: A Modular Framework for Understanding Time-Series Forecasting Models
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026 main track. Code available at https://github.com/BenchCouncil/CombinationTS
summary: Recent progress in time-series forecasting has led to rapidly increasing architectural complexity, yet many reported State-of-the-Art gains are statistically fragile or misattributed. We argue that progress requires a shift from model selection to modular attribution, identifying which components truly drive performance. We propose CombinationTS, a self-contained probabilistic evaluation framework that decomposes forecasting models into orthogonal modules--Input Transformation, Embedding, Encoder, Decoder, and Output Transformation--and evaluates them under a shared evaluation condition space. By quantifying each component via marginalized performance ($μ$) and stability ($σ$), CombinationTS enables robust attribution beyond fragile point estimates. Through large-scale paired evaluation, we uncover the Identity Paradox: once the data view (Embedding) is well-designed, a parameter-free Identity Encoder often matches or outperforms complex backbones. We further show that explicit structural priors introduced via Input Transformations yield a more favorable performance-stability trade-off than increasing Encoder complexity, establishing a principled baseline for architectural necessity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CombinationTS框架，通过将时序预测模型分解为正交模块并进行归因分析，发现了一个"恒等悖论"：当数据视图（嵌入）设计良好时，无参数的恒等编码器往往能与复杂骨干网络媲美甚至更优。
AI.motivation: 现有时序预测模型架构日益复杂，但许多SOTA增益统计上脆弱或归因错误，亟需从模型选择转向模块归因，识别真正驱动性能的组件。
AI.method: 提出CombinationTS自包含概率评估框架，将预测模型分解为输入变换、嵌入、编码器、解码器和输出变换五个正交模块，在共享评估条件下通过边际性能（μ）和稳定性（σ）量化每个组件。
AI.result: 发现"恒等悖论"：嵌入模块设计良好时，无参数恒等编码器可匹配或超越复杂骨干；输入变换引入的结构先验比增加编码器复杂度能带来更优的性能-稳定性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 应建立架构必要性的原则性基线，优先优化数据视图（嵌入）和输入变换，而非盲目增加编码器复杂度。

title: Catching the Infection Before It Spreads: Foresight-Guided Defense in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large multimodal model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MASs) enable collaborative complex problem solving through specialized agents. However, MASs are vulnerable to infectious jailbreak, where compromising a single agent can spread to others, leading to widespread compromise. Existing defenses counter this by training a more contagious cure factor, biasing agents to retrieve it over virus adversarial examples (VirAEs). However, this homogenizes agent responses, providing only superficial suppression rather than true recovery. We revisit these defenses, which operate globally via a shared cure factor, while infectious jailbreak arise from localized interaction behaviors. This mismatch limits their effectiveness. To address this, we propose a training-free Foresight-Guided Local Purification (FLP) framework, where each agent reasons over future interactions to track behavioral evolution and eliminate infections. Specifically, each agent simulates future behavioral trajectories over subsequent chat rounds. To reflect diversity in MASs, we introduce a multi-persona simulation strategy for robust prediction across interaction contexts. We then use response diversity as a diagnostic signal to detect infection by analyzing inconsistencies across persona-based predictions at both retrieval-result and semantic levels. For infected agents, we apply localized purification: recent infections are mitigated via immediate album rollback, while long-term infections are handled using Recursive Binary Diagnosis (RBD), which recursively partitions the image album and applies the same diagnosis strategy to localize and eliminate VirAEs. Experiments show that FLP reduces the maximum cumulative infection rate from over 95% to below 5.47%. Moreover, retrieval and semantic metrics closely match benign baselines, indicating effective preservation of interaction diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的FLP框架，通过让每个智能体模拟未来交互轨迹并利用多角色策略检测感染，从而在多智能体系统中有效消除"传染性越狱"攻击，将最大累积感染率从95%以上降至5.47%以下。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型多智能体系统容易受到"传染性越狱"攻击——一个智能体被攻破后感染会传播给其他智能体。现有防御通过训练更强的'治疗因子'来对抗病毒对抗样本，但这会导致智能体响应同质化，只是表面压制而非真正恢复。作者指出，现有防御采用全局共享的'治疗因子'方式，而传染性越狱是局部交互行为，这种不匹配限制了防御效果。
AI.method: 提出Foresight-Guided Local Purification (FLP)框架：1）每个智能体模拟未来多轮对话的行为轨迹；2）引入多角色模拟策略来反映多智能体系统的多样性；3）利用响应多样性作为诊断信号，在检索-结果和语义两个层面分析不一致性来检测感染；4）对感染智能体进行局部净化：近期感染通过立即相册回滚缓解，长期感染通过递归二分诊断（RBD）递归划分图像相册并定位消除病毒对抗样本。
AI.result: FLP将最大累积感染率从超过95%降至5.47%以下，检索和语义指标接近良性基线，有效保留了交互多样性。
AI.conclusion: 局部化的、基于未来交互预测的净化方法相比全局共享的治疗因子更能有效对抗多智能体系统中的传染性越狱攻击，同时保持交互多样性。

title: Degradation-Aware Adaptive Context Gating for Unified Image Restoration
summary: Unified image restoration using a single model often faces task interference due to diverse degradations. To address this, we propose DACG-IR (Degradation-Aware Adaptive Context Gating), which enables explicit perception of degradation characteristics to dynamically modulate feature representations. Our method constructs degradation-aware contextual representations from the input to modulate attention distribution, frequency-domain features, and feature aggregation. Specifically, a lightweight multi-scale degradation-aware module extracts coarse degradation information and generates layer-wise prompts. These prompts guide attention temperature and output gating in encoder and decoder blocks for adaptive feature extraction. Additionally, a spatial-channel dual-gated adaptive fusion mechanism refines encoder features, suppressing noise propagation from shallow to deep layers. This design effectively suppresses degradation-induced noise while preserving informative structures. Experiments show DACG-IR outperforms state-of-the-art methods in single-task, all-in-one, adverse weather removal, and composite degradation settings. Code: https://github.com/HlHomes/DACG-IR-code

AI.tldr: 提出DACG-IR，一种通过显式感知退化特征来动态调制特征表示的统一图像修复模型，在多种修复任务中达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 统一图像修复模型中，不同类型退化（噪声、模糊、天气等）之间存在任务干扰，传统方法难以有效兼顾。
AI.method: 1）轻量级多尺度退化感知模块提取粗粒度退化信息并生成逐层提示；2）提示引导编码器/解码器中的注意力温度和输出门控，实现自适应特征提取；3）空间-通道双门控自适应融合机制优化编码器特征，抑制噪声从浅层向深层传播。
AI.result: 在单任务、全合一、恶劣天气去除及复合退化设置下均优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 退化感知的自适应上下文门控机制能够有效缓解任务干扰，提升统一图像修复模型的泛化能力和修复质量。

title: GRAVITY: Architecture-Agnostic Structured Anchoring for Long-Horizon Conversational Memory
summary: Long-horizon conversational agents rely on memory systems with increasingly sophisticated retrieval mechanisms. However, retrieved fragments are typically fed to the language model as unstructured text, lacking the relational, temporal, and thematic structures essential for complex reasoning. To bridge this reasoning gap, we introduce GRAVITY (\textbf{G}eneration-time \textbf{R}elational \textbf{A}nchoring \textbf{V}ia \textbf{I}njected \textbf{T}opological Memor\textbf{Y}), a plug-and-play structured memory module. GRAVITY extracts three complementary knowledge representations from raw conversational utterances: entity profiles grounded in relational graphs, temporal event tuples linked into causal traces, and cross-session topic summaries. At generation time, it injects these representations into the host system's prompt as structured anchoring contexts. This approach effectively synthesizes scattered evidence into a coherent, query-relevant context without requiring any architectural modifications to the host model. Extensive evaluations across five diverse memory systems on the LongMemEval and LoCoMo benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our approach. On average, GRAVITY improves LLM-judge accuracy by 7.5--10.1%. Gains are inversely correlated with baseline strength: the weakest host improves by 12.2% while the strongest still gains 3.8--5.7%. These findings establish structured context anchoring as a broadly effective, architecture-agnostic augmentation paradigm for long-horizon conversational memory.

AI.tldr: GRAVITY是一个即插即用的结构化记忆模块，通过提取实体图谱、时序因果链和跨会话主题摘要三种知识表示，在生成时注入提示词作为结构锚定上下文，无需修改模型架构即可显著提升长程对话记忆系统的推理能力（LLM评判准确率提升7.5-10.1%）。
AI.motivation: 现有长程对话系统的记忆检索机制通常以非结构化文本形式将检索片段喂给语言模型，缺乏关系、时间和主题等结构化信息，导致复杂推理能力不足。
AI.method: 提出GRAVITY模块，从原始对话中提取三种互补知识表示：基于关系图的实体档案、链接为因果轨迹的时间事件元组、跨会话主题摘要；在生成时将这些表示作为结构化锚定上下文注入宿主系统的提示词中。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval和LoCoMo基准上，GRAVITY使LLM评判准确率平均提升7.5-10.1%，且增益与基线强度呈负相关（最弱宿主提升12.2%，最强宿主仍获得3.8-5.7%提升）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化上下文锚定是一种广泛有效、架构无关的长程对话记忆增强范式。

title: Rhamba: Region-Aware Hybrid Attention-Mamba Framework for Self-Supervised Learning in Resting-State fMRI
summary: Self-supervised pretraining is promising for large-scale neuroimaging, yet the impact of region-aware masking and hybrid sequence modeling remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce Rhamba, a region-aware pretraining framework that integrates anatomically guided masking with hybrid Attention-Mamba architectures for resting state functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) analysis. Models were pretrained on the ABIDE dataset using region-aligned patch embeddings and three masking strategies (Any, Majority, and Pure) with increasing spatial specificity. We evaluated four architectural variants: a Mamba only model, an Alternate architecture with interleaved Mamba and Attention blocks, and two hybrid encoder-decoder configurations (Attention-Mamba (AM) and Mamba-Attention (MA)). The pretrained models were fine-tuned on downstream classification tasks using the COBRE and ADHD-200 datasets for schizophrenia and attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder discrimination. We employed Integrated Gradients, an explainable AI method, to identify the brain regions contributing to model predictions. Masking strategy strongly influenced reconstruction behavior, with reconstruction loss following a consistent ordering (Any > Majority > Pure). However, this trend did not directly translate into downstream performance, where differences were modest and dataset-dependent. The hybrid architecture with the MA configuration achieved the highest average AUROC across both datasets, and Rhamba outperformed state-of-the-art methods in comparative evaluation. Region-wise analysis showed that peak performance depends on the interaction between masking strategy and architecture rather than a single dominant configuration. Overall, Rhamba offers a flexible framework for balancing interpretability, scalability, and performance in large-scale fMRI representation learning.

AI.tldr: Rhamba是一个区域感知的自监督预训练框架，结合解剖引导掩码与混合Attention-Mamba架构用于fMRI分析。在ABIDE上预训练，在COBRE和ADHD-200上微调分类。混合MA架构表现最佳，掩码策略与架构的交互影响性能，整体优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 自监督预训练有望用于大规模神经影像分析，但区域感知掩码和混合序列建模的影响尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Rhamba框架，包含：1) 解剖引导的区域对齐补丁嵌入；2) 三种掩码策略（Any, Majority, Pure）逐步提高空间特异性；3) 四种架构变体（Mamba仅、交替式、两种混合编码器-解码器AM和MA）。在ABIDE上预训练，在COBRE和ADHD-200上微调分类。
AI.result: 1) 掩码策略影响重建损失：Any > Majority > Pure；2) 下游性能差异不大且依赖数据集；3) MA混合架构在两个数据集上平均AUROC最高；4) Rhamba优于现有方法；5) 最佳性能取决于掩码策略与架构的交互。
AI.conclusion: Rhamba为大规模fMRI表征学习提供了灵活框架，平衡了可解释性、可扩展性和性能。关键发现是掩码策略与架构的交互作用比单一配置更重要。

title: Runtime Evaluation of Procedural Content Generation in an Endless Runner Game Using Autonomous Agents
summary: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) enables game content to be created algorithmically without direct manual level-design effort, but it introduces a serious evaluation problem: generated content may become unbalanced, blocked, repetitive, or technically unsolvable. This paper presents Momentum, an endless-runner game that integrates runtime terrain generation, environment object spawning, and autonomous agent-based evaluation into a single gameplay loop. Ground tiles and environmental objects are generated dynamically as the player advances, object placement follows a constraint-driven mechanism inspired by Wave Function Collapse (WFC), and the runtime navigation surface is rebuilt asynchronously to remain consistent with the streamed environment. Two autonomous evaluation agents move ahead of the player and inspect the generated path: an aerial scanner that examines the corridor geometrically, and a ground-traversal agent that validates the same region from a navigational perspective. The evaluation pipeline combines ray casting, volumetric physics sweeps, obstacle-layer filtering, and structured crash reporting to identify problematic generated scenarios before they reach the player. The work demonstrates how generation and validation can be unified within the same runtime loop, rather than treating evaluation as a separate offline pass. Around this implementation, the paper formulates a measurable evaluation framework along the canonical PCG axes of playability, diversity, controllability, and runtime performance, derives a structural saturation bound on the spawner from its own placement constraints, and quantifies the per-segment scanning cost of the agents from first principles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Momentum，一款将程序化地形生成、物体放置与自主智能体评估集成在同一运行循环中的无尽跑酷游戏，通过结合波函数坍缩约束、异步导航重建及双智能体评估管道（空中扫描+地面遍历），实现了对生成内容的实时可玩性验证，并建立了涵盖可玩性、多样性、可控性和性能的量化评估框架。
AI.motivation: 解决PCG内容的评估难题——生成的内容可能出现不平衡、阻塞、重复或技术上不可解等问题，而传统评估方法通常是离线进行的，缺乏运行时的实时验证能力。
AI.method: 1) 动态地形生成与物体放置（基于WFC的约束驱动机制）；2) 异步导航表面重建以保持一致性；3) 双智能体评估：空中扫描器（几何通道检测）和地面遍历智能体（导航可行性验证）；4) 结合射线投射、体积物理扫描、障碍层过滤和结构化崩溃报告的评估管道。
AI.result: 展示了生成与验证可在同一运行循环中统一实现；推导了生成器的结构饱和边界；量化了每段扫描成本。
AI.conclusion: 将PCG评估从离线后处理转变为运行时闭环验证，为程序化内容生成提供了可量化的评估框架。

title: Exploring Prompt Alignment with Clinical Factors in Zero-Shot Segmentation VLMs for NSCLC Tumor Segmentation
summary: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) offer a promptable alternative to task-specific training for gross tumor volume (GTV) delineation in non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC), but the prompt dimensions that govern their spatial behavior remain poorly understood. We study this question by probing alignment directions in VoxTell on a held-out internal NSCLC tumor dataset through sub-prompt decomposition into diagnosis, demographic, staging, anatomical, generic, and irrelevant controls; attribute-wise perturbation robustness; specificity ladders; and cross-case prompt swaps, while benchmarking against fine-tuned and zero-shot baselines using the Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) with Wilcoxon signed-rank tests and Benjamini-Hochberg correction. Alignment analyses revealed that anatomical location is the dominant driver of VoxTell's spatial attention: 63.4 percent of location perturbations caused catastrophic drops, prompt specificity improved from generic to full descriptions except for diagnosis-only prompts, irrelevant prompts correctly yielded zero segmentation, and cross-case prompt swaps confirmed patient-specific conditioning (matched DSC 0.906 vs. mismatched 0.406). Histology and stage substitutions had minimal effect, indicating that the model prioritizes "where to look" over "what to look for." In this context, VoxTell, operating fully zero-shot, achieved a mean DSC of 0.613, statistically indistinguishable from nnUNet (0.690, adjusted p = 0.156) and Ahmed et al. (0.675, adjusted p = 0.679), while significantly outperforming all other zero-shot models. Together, these findings argue that segmentation VLMs should be evaluated not only by Dice, but also by the prompt dimensions to which they align.

AI.tldr: 本文通过子提示分解、属性扰动、特异性阶梯和跨病例提示交换等方法，系统研究了零样本视觉语言模型VoxTell在 NSCLC 肿瘤分割中的空间行为驱动因素。发现解剖位置是主导模型空间注意力的关键维度（63.4%的位置扰动导致灾难性下降），而组织学和分期影响甚微；VoxTell在零样本下达到平均DSC 0.613，与微调模型nnUNet无统计差异。结论认为分割VLM不仅应评估Dice系数，还应考察其对齐的提示维度。
AI.motivation: 理解零样本视觉语言模型在肿瘤分割任务中空间行为的驱动提示维度，揭示模型究竟关注“看哪里”还是“看什么”。
AI.method: 对VoxTell进行子提示分解（诊断、人口统计、分期、解剖、通用、无关对照）、属性扰动鲁棒性、特异性阶梯分析、跨病例提示交换实验，与微调和零样本基线对比，使用DSC、Wilcoxon符号秩检验和Benjamini-Hochberg校正。
AI.result: 解剖位置是主导因素：63.4%位置扰动导致灾难性下降；组织学和分期替换影响极小；无关提示正确输出零分割；跨病例交换显示患者特定条件匹配（匹配DSC 0.906 vs 不匹配0.406）。VoxTell零样本DSC 0.613，与nnUNet（0.690, p=0.156）无统计差异，显著优于其他零样本模型。
AI.conclusion: 分割VLM的评估不应仅依赖Dice系数，还需考察模型对齐的提示维度；解剖位置是最关键的语义控制维度，而组织学和分期等病理细节未被充分利用。

title: BIM Information Extraction Through LLM-based Adaptive Exploration
summary: BIM models provide structured representations of building geometry, semantics, and topology, yet extracting specific information from them remains remarkably difficult. Current approaches translate natural language into structured queries by assuming a fixed data organization (static approach), which BIM heterogeneity eventually invalidates. We address this with a new paradigm, adaptive exploration, where an LLM-based agent iteratively executes code to extract information from a BIM model, discovering its structure at runtime instead of assuming it. We evaluate this approach on ifc-bench v2, an open-source BIM question-answering benchmark introduced alongside this work, comprising 1,027 tasks across 37 IFC models from 21 projects. A factorial ablation across two LLM capability levels and four augmentation strategies shows that adaptive exploration significantly outperforms static query generation across all configurations, regardless of the augmentation strategy. These results indicate that BIM heterogeneity is best addressed at the paradigm level, not by further optimizing static approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应探索范式，让LLM智能体在运行时通过执行代码动态探索BIM模型结构，以替代传统的静态查询生成方法。在包含37个IFC模型、1027个任务的基准测试中，该范式在所有配置下均显著优于静态方法。
AI.motivation: BIM模型异构性强，传统静态方法假设固定数据组织方式，无法适应BIM模型的多样性，导致信息提取困难。
AI.method: 提出自适应探索范式：基于LLM的智能体在运行时通过迭代执行代码探索BIM模型结构，动态发现其组织方式，而非预先假设。
AI.result: 在ifc-bench v2基准（37个IFC模型、1027个任务）上，自适应探索在所有配置下均显著优于静态查询生成方法，且不受增强策略影响。
AI.conclusion: BIM异构性问题应在范式层面解决，而非继续优化静态方法。

title: Breaking the Computational Barrier: Provably Efficient Actor-Critic for Low-Rank MDPs
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a fundamental framework for sequential decision-making, in which an agent learns an optimal policy through interactions with an unknown environment. In settings with function approximation, many existing RL algorithms achieve favorable sample complexity, but often rely on computationally intractable oracles. In this paper, we use supervised learning as a computational proxy to establish a clear hierarchy of commonly adopted RL oracles under low-rank Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). This hierarchy shows that policy evaluation is the most computationally efficient oracle, provided that supervised learning can be efficiently solved. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel optimistic actor-critic algorithm that relies solely on the policy evaluation oracle. We prove that our algorithm outperforms the existing sample complexity guarantees for low-rank MDPs while avoiding computationally expensive planning or optimization oracles commonly assumed in prior works. We further extend our theoretical results to approximately low-rank MDPs and demonstrate that this setting captures a broad class of real-world environments. Finally, we validate our theoretical results with experiments on several standard Gym environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了低秩MDP下强化学习算法的计算复杂性与样本复杂度权衡，提出了一种仅依赖策略评估预言机（policy evaluation oracle）的乐观Actor-Critic算法，在避免昂贵规划/优化预言机的同时取得了更优的样本复杂度保证。
AI.motivation: 现有RL算法在函数近似下虽具有较好的样本复杂度，但往往依赖计算上难以实现（computationally intractable）的预言机。作者希望厘清不同RL预言机之间的层次关系，并设计一个既计算高效又样本高效的算法。
AI.method: (1) 建立了低秩MDP下策略评估、策略优化等预言机的计算复杂度层次结构；(2) 提出了一个仅依赖策略评估预言机的乐观Actor-Critic算法；(3) 将理论结果扩展到近似低秩MDP场景。
AI.result: 新算法在低秩MDP上取得了比现有方法更优的样本复杂度保证，且避免了计算昂贵的规划或优化预言机。在近似低秩MDP和标准Gym环境上的实验也验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 策略评估预言机是计算最高效的RL预言机（在监督学习可高效求解的前提下），基于此设计的乐观Actor-Critic算法实现了计算与样本复杂度的良好权衡，并能推广到更实际的近似低秩场景。

title: DataEvolver: Let Your Data Build and Improve Itself via Goal-Driven Loop Agents
summary: Constructing controllable visual data is a major bottleneck for image editing and multimodal understanding. Useful supervision is rarely produced by a single rendering pass; instead it emerges through iterative generation, inspection, correction, filtering, and export. We present DataEvolver, a closed-loop visual data engine that organizes this process around explicit goals, persistent artifacts, bounded corrective actions, and acceptance decisions. DataEvolver supports multiple artifact types, including RGB images, masks, depth maps, normal maps, meshes, poses, trajectories, and review traces. In the current release, the system operates through two coupled loops: generation-time self-correction within each sample and validation-time self-expansion across dataset rounds. We validate the framework on an image-level object-rotation setting. With a fixed Qwen-Edit LoRA probe, our final Ours+DualGate model outperforms both the unadapted base model and a public multi-angle LoRA on SpatialEdit and a held-out evaluation set. Ablations show a consistent improvement path from scene-aware generation to feedback-driven correction and dual-gated validation. Beyond the released rotation data, our main contribution is a reusable framework for building visual datasets through explicit goal tracking, review, correction, and acceptance loops.

AI.tldr: 提出了DataEvolver，一个闭环视觉数据引擎，通过显式目标追踪、审查、修正和接受循环来构建可控视觉数据集，在图像级物体旋转任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 构建可控视觉数据是图像编辑和多模态理解的瓶颈，有用的监督信号很少通过单次渲染产生，而是需要通过迭代生成、检查、纠正、过滤和导出的过程，因此需要一个系统化的框架来组织这一流程。
AI.method: 提出DataEvolver闭环视觉数据引擎，包含两个耦合循环：生成时的样本内自校正循环和验证时的跨数据集轮次自扩展循环。支持多种工件类型（RGB图像、掩码、深度图、法线图、网格、姿态、轨迹、审查痕迹），围绕显式目标、持久化工件、有界校正动作和接受决策来组织流程。
AI.result: 在图像级物体旋转任务上，使用固定Qwen-Edit LoRA探针，最终Ours+DualGate模型在SpatialEdit和保留评估集上均优于未适应的基模型和公开的多角度LoRA。消融实验显示了从场景感知生成到反馈驱动校正再到双门控验证的持续改进路径。
AI.conclusion: 主要贡献是一个可复用的视觉数据集构建框架，通过显式目标追踪、审查、校正和接受循环来生成高质量可控视觉数据。

title: GameScope: A Multi-Attribute, Multi-Codec Benchmark Dataset for Gaming Video Quality Assessment
summary: The development of video game streaming has grown rapidly, with major platforms such as YouTube and Twitch using different codecs. To support quality assessment models that work consistently across any codec, it is necessary to have access to large, diverse subjective gaming quality datasets. Currently, there are only a few available, each having limitations. To address this gap, we present the largest gaming video quality dataset to date, incorporating both user-generated content (UGC) and professional-generated content (PGC) with extensive visual diversity. Our dataset covers the most widely used codecs - H.264, H.265, and AV1 - and consists of 4,048 video samples, each annotated by an average of 37 mean opinion score (MOS) ratings. In addition to overall quality scores, we collect coarse-grained quality attributes, enabling a better understanding of perceptual factors. We study the performance of leading video quality assessment methods on this dataset, including a vision language model that outperforms all the benchmarks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first dataset that comprehensively addresses gaming video quality assessment across multiple codecs and content types with quality attributes. Our dataset is publicly available at https://rajeshsureddi.github.io/GameScope/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GameScope，目前最大的游戏视频质量数据集，包含4,048个视频样本，覆盖H.264、H.265和AV1三种主流编解码器，以及UGC和PGC内容类型。每个视频平均有37个MOS评分，并收集了粗粒度质量属性。实验表明，视觉语言模型在该数据集上优于所有现有基准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏视频质量评估数据集数量少且各有局限，缺乏覆盖多种编解码器和内容类型的大规模数据集，导致质量评估模型在不同编解码器上的一致性难以保证。
AI.method: 构建了包含4,048个视频样本的大规模数据集，覆盖H.264、H.265、AV1三种编解码器，以及UGC和PGC内容类型。每个样本由平均37人进行MOS评分，并额外收集了粗粒度质量属性标签。在此基础上评估了多种主流VQA方法，包括视觉语言模型。
AI.result: 视觉语言模型在该数据集上表现最优，超越了所有现有基准方法。该数据集是首个全面涵盖多种编解码器、内容类型以及质量属性的游戏视频质量评估数据集。
AI.conclusion: GameScope填补了游戏视频质量评估领域缺乏大规模多编解码器数据集的空白，为跨编解码器的一致性质量评估模型研究提供了重要资源。

title: The Reasoning Trap: An Information-Theoretic Bound on Closed-System Multi-Step LLM Reasoning
comment: 23 pages, 18 figures, 4 tables, 126 references. Subtitle: A Falsifiable Theorem, the Multi-Agent-Debate Instantiation, and a Triple Failure of Human Reliability
summary: When copies of the same language model are prompted to debate, they produce diverse phrasings of one perspective rather than diverse perspectives. Multi-agent debate (MAD), and more broadly closed-system reasoning where agents iteratively transform each other's outputs, tends to preserve answer accuracy while degrading the reasoning behind those answers. We name the multi-agent case the Debate Trap and the broader phenomenon the Reasoning Trap, offering a programmatic theory of evidence-grounded reasoning failure.The framework has three parts: (i) SFS (Supported Faithfulness Score), a claim-level metric verifying decomposed atomic claims against provided evidence (decomposer-invariant rankings: Spearman rho=1.0); (ii) EGSR (Evidence-Grounded Socratic Reasoning), replacing adversarial argumentation with evidence-grounded inquiry; (iii) Theorem 1 (DPI Bound): under standard MAD, the chain E -> O^0 -> O^1 -> ... is Markov, and the Data Processing Inequality implies E[I(E;O^{t+1})] <= E[I(E;O^t)]. Three companion results -- open-system recovery (Theorem 2), EGSR accumulation (Lemma 2), and vote-aggregation floor (Proposition 1) -- partition multi-step LLM reasoning by its information-theoretic relationship to E. Across 16 conditions on SciFact (300 claims) and FEVER (1,000 claims), DebateCV (C13) preserves 88% of baseline accuracy while SFS drops 43%; majority-vote MAD (C15) reduces SFS to 1.7% of baseline (p < 10^{-6}, d = -0.96); EGSR recovers 98%. An R6 cohort study (Korean n=10x30 FEVER; English n=3x200 SciFact) finds inter-rater Fleiss kappa <= +0.018 with 0.8-1.4 Likert intra-rater shifts across language and domain -- the human agreement that faithfulness metrics have been calibrated against is not itself stable. We offer one falsifiable conjecture: any closed-system reasoning protocol preserving Theorem 1's Markov structure is, in expectation, subject to the same DPI bound.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了多智能体辩论（MAD）的一个根本缺陷：模型之间看似“辩论”，实则只是同一立场的不同措辞，而非不同视角。作者提出了“辩论陷阱”和更广义的“推理陷阱”概念，通过信息论证明在封闭系统中推理会随轮次增加而退化。他们引入了证据扎根的苏格拉底推理（EGSR）作为替代方案，并发现人类对忠实度指标的一致性本身也不稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型多智能体辩论方法虽然声称能提升推理质量，但作者怀疑这种封闭系统中的迭代推理实际上只是让模型在同一个观点上反复措辞，而非真正产生多元视角。作者希望用信息论工具严格证明这种推理退化现象。
AI.method: (i) 提出SFS（Supported Faithfulness Score）指标，用于基于证据的原子声明级忠实度评估（分解器无关，Spearman rho=1.0）；(ii) 提出EGSR（Evidence-Grounded Socratic Reasoning），用证据扎根的探究替代对抗性辩论；(iii) 给出定理1（DPI界）：在标准MAD下，链E→O^0→O^1→...是马尔可夫的，数据处理不等式（DPI）保证互信息E[I(E;O^{t+1})] ≤ E[I(E;O^t)]。另有三个配套结论。在SciFact和FEVER数据集上进行了16种条件下的实验和R6队列研究。
AI.result: 在16种条件下，DebateCV保留88%的基线准确率但SFS下降43%；多数投票MAD的SFS降至基线的1.7%（p<10^{-6}, d=-0.96）；EGSR恢复98%的忠实度。人类评估显示Fleiss kappa ≤ +0.018，Likert评分存在0.8-1.4分的评分者内偏移，说明忠实度指标的校准基础本身不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 封闭系统推理（如MAD）会保持答案准确性但损害推理的忠实度，原因是其马尔可夫结构导致信息逐轮退化。EGSR作为开放系统替代方案能有效恢复推理质量。作者提出一个可证伪的猜想：任何保持定理1马尔可夫结构的封闭推理协议都会受到同样的DPI界约束。

title: S^3-R1: Learning to Retrieve and Answer Step-by-Step with Synthetic Data
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has enabled newer capabilities in models, such as agentic tool-use for search. However, these models struggle primarily due to limitations with sparse outcome-based rewards and a lack of training data that encapsulates questions of differing hardness, which results in models not performing deeper searches with tools to collect evidence for question-answering. To address these limitations, we introduce S^3-R1 (Synthetic data and stabilized Search R1), a framework that couples a data-centric approach with denser learning signals. We first develop a synthetic generation and curation pipeline that programmatically derives diverse, multi-hop questions from existing documents. This pipeline incorporates a retrieval-based verification step to specifically isolate questions of intermediate difficulty. We then pair this expanded training set with a reward structure that evaluates both intermediate search quality and the correctness of the final answer. This setup directly mitigates the credit assignment problems inherent to sparse rewards. Our evaluations show that S^3-R1 outperforms existing baselines by learning more effective search and synthesis strategies, yielding up to a 10% improvement in robust generalization on out-of-domain datasets.

AI.tldr: S^3-R1通过合成数据生成管道和稠密奖励结构，解决了强化学习后训练中模型在工具搜索和问答任务上的不足，在跨域数据集上实现了最高10%的鲁棒泛化提升。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练模型在处理工具搜索时因稀疏奖励和缺乏不同难度的训练数据而表现不佳，无法进行深度搜索收集证据来回答问题。
AI.method: 提出S^3-R1框架：1）合成数据生成与筛选管道，从文档中程序化派生出多样化的多跳问题，并通过检索验证步骤专门筛选中等难度问题；2）构建同时评估中间搜索质量和最终答案正确性的奖励结构，缓解稀疏奖励带来的信用分配问题。
AI.result: S^3-R1在跨域数据集上相比基线模型实现了高达10%的鲁棒泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据增强与稠密奖励信号相结合的方法，能够有效提升模型在工具搜索和问答任务上的学习效果与泛化能力。

title: Neural Decision-Propagation for Answer Set Programming
summary: Integration of Answer Set Programming (ASP) with neural networks has emerged as a promising tool in Neuro-symbolic AI. While existing approaches extend the capabilities of ASP to real world domains, their reasoning pipelines depend on classical solvers, which is a bottleneck for scalability. To tackle this problem, we propose a new method to compute stable models, called decision-propagation (DProp), which alternates falsity decisions and truth propagations. Successful DProp computations are shown to capture the stable model semantics. We then develop Neural DProp (NDProp), a differentiable extension of DProp with neural computation for decisions and fuzzy evaluation for propagations. We evaluate the capabilities of NDProp for learning decision heuristics as well as neuro-symbolic integration, and compare it with existing neuro-symbolic approaches. The results show that NDProp can learn to efficiently compute stable models, and it improves accuracy and scalability on neuro-symbolic benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出决策传播（DProp）算法及其可微扩展神经DProp（NDProp），将ASP与神经网络结合，通过学习决策启发式实现稳定模型的高效计算，在神经符号基准测试上提升了准确性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有ASP与神经网络的结合方法依赖经典求解器，成为可扩展性的瓶颈，需要更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出DProp算法，交替进行假性决策和真性传播；进一步开发NDProp，用神经网络进行决策、模糊逻辑进行评估，使其可微分。
AI.result: NDProp能够学习高效计算稳定模型，在准确性和可扩展性上优于现有神经符号方法。
AI.conclusion: DProp可捕捉稳定模型语义，NDProp为神经符号集成提供了可扩展且准确的新途径。

title: CNN-based Multi-In-Multi-Out Model for Efficient Spatiotemporal Prediction
summary: Recently, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) or Transformer architecture based models have been proposed to overcome the limitations of Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based models in spatiotemporal prediction. These models prevent the inefficiency of parallelization limitation due to the sequential properties and stacked error due to the recursive method, and show high performance. Novertheless, there are still some challengies. First, CNN based models have difficulty considering global information due to the local properties of the kernel, and their performance is limited. In addition, information is mixed because the time axis is combined with the channel axis of the image for processing. Models based on Transformer architecture have high complexity due to the self-attention calcuation and take a long training time. In this paper, we propose a new structure model called CNN-based Multi-In-Multi-Out model for Efficient Spatiotemporal Prediction (MIMO-ESP) to overcome these limitations. MIMO-ESP considers global information and significantly improves complexity by configuring a Transformer architecture based on CNN. In addition, it treats the time axis as an independent axis without combining it, and effectively considers spatiotemporal information together by applying dilation. This structure makes MIMO-ESP efficient and high performance. Extensive experiment results on three promising benchmark datasets which including video, traffic, and precipitation prediction tasks demonstrate that the usefulness of MIMO-ESP due to the achieved competitive efficiency while outperforming existing models. Furthermore, the ablation study results demonstrate the usefulness of the components of MIMO-ESP, emphasizing the potential of the proposed approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于CNN的新型多输入多输出时空预测模型MIMO-ESP，通过结合Transformer架构思想（但基于CNN实现）来同时考虑全局信息并降低复杂度，将时间轴作为独立维度处理，在视频、交通和降水预测三个基准数据集上实现了高效且优越的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RNN模型存在并行化限制和递归误差累积问题；CNN模型难以捕捉全局信息且将时间轴与通道轴混合处理；Transformer模型复杂度高、训练时间长。因此需要一种能兼顾全局信息、高效且性能优越的时空预测模型。
AI.method: 提出MIMO-ESP模型，核心思路是基于CNN构建Transformer风格架构（利用CNN实现自注意力机制），从而在考虑全局信息的同时显著降低复杂度；将时间轴作为独立维度处理（不与通道轴混合），并引入膨胀（dilation）操作以有效融合时空信息。
AI.result: 在视频预测、交通预测和降水预测三个基准数据集上，MIMO-ESP在保持竞争性效率的同时，性能超越了现有模型。消融实验验证了各模块组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MIMO-ESP通过创新的CNN-Transformer混合架构设计，成功解决了现有模型在全局信息捕捉、复杂度和时空信息融合方面的局限性，为高效时空预测提供了一种有前景的方案。

title: TCDA: Thread-Constrained Discourse-Aware Modeling for Conversational Sentiment Quadruple Analysis
summary: Conversational Aspect-based Sentiment Quadruple Analysis (DiaASQ) needs to capture the complex interrelationships in multiple rounds of dialogues. Existing methods usually employ simple Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN), which introduce structural noise and fail to consider the temporal sequence of the dialogues, or use standard RoPE, which implicitly captures relative distances in a flat sequence but cannot clearly separate the token-level syntactic order from the utterance-level progression, and may suffer from the Distance Dilution problem. To address these issues, we propose a new framework that combines Thread-Constrained Directed Acyclic Graph (TC-DAG) and Discourse-Aware Rotary Position Embedding (D-RoPE). Specifically, TC-DAG filters out cross-thread noise based on thread constraints, maintains global connectivity through root anchoring, and incorporates the temporal sequence of the dialogues. D-RoPE aligns multi-layer semantics using dual-stream projection and multi-scale frequency signals, captures thread dependencies using tree-like distances, and alleviates the token-level Distance Dilution problem by incorporating utterance-level progressions. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 针对对话式方面级情感四元组分析（DiaASQ）中现有方法存在结构噪声、忽略时序、距离稀释等问题，本文提出TC-DAG（线程约束有向无环图）结合D-RoPE（语篇感知旋转位置编码）框架，在双基准数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有DiaASQ方法使用简单GCN引入结构噪声且忽视对话时序，而标准RoPE无法清晰区分词级句法顺序与话语级推进，且存在距离稀释问题。
AI.method: 1) TC-DAG：通过线程约束过滤跨线程噪声，利用根锚点保持全局连通性，并融入对话时序。2) D-RoPE：采用双流投影与多尺度频率信号对齐多层语义，用树状距离捕获线程依赖，融入话语级进展缓解词级距离稀释。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: TC-DAG与D-RoPE能有效解决结构噪声与距离稀释问题，提升DiaASQ性能。

title: Activation Compression in LLMs: Theoretical Analysis and Efficient Algorithm
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) is highly memory-intensive, as training must store not only weights and optimizer states but also intermediate activations for backpropagation. While existing memory-efficient methods largely focus on gradients and optimizer states, activation compression is less well established due to the lack of LLM-tailored theory and guarantees. In this work, we develop a theoretical framework showing that activation compression is safe for linear operators when activation compression is unbiased, but problematic for nonlinear ones. We further derive gradient variance bound and establish convergence guarantees for applying activation compression to all linear operators under the standard $L$-smoothness assumption, showing that it does not change the convergence rate. Guided by the theory, we propose an activation-gradient co-compression method that reuses low-rank activation factors to compress linear-layer gradients without extra computation or additional gradient error. We conduct extensive experiments on Qwen and LLaMA models using a pretraining benchmark and multiple fine-tuning benchmarks to validate our theory and demonstrate competitive performance of our method in both accuracy and compression efficiency. We provide our code in the supplementary material for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个理论框架，证明对线性算子进行无偏激活压缩是安全的，但非线性算子存在问题。基于此理论，作者提出了一种激活-梯度协同压缩方法，在不增加额外计算的情况下压缩线性层梯度，并在Qwen和LLaMA模型上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 训练大语言模型内存开销巨大，现有方法多关注梯度和优化器状态压缩，但激活压缩缺乏理论保障。作者希望建立LLM专用的激活压缩理论框架，并据此设计高效的内存压缩方法。
AI.method: 首先从理论上证明：无偏激活压缩对线性算子安全（不会改变收敛率），但对非线性算子存在问题。然后推导梯度方差界，在标准L-光滑假设下建立收敛保证。基于理论，提出激活-梯度协同压缩方法，通过重用低秩激活因子来压缩线性层梯度，无需额外计算或引入额外梯度误差。
AI.result: 在Qwen和LLaMA模型上的预训练和微调实验中，该方法在准确率和压缩效率方面均表现出竞争力，验证了理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 激活压缩对线性算子安全且有理论保证，提出的协同压缩方法能在不牺牲性能的前提下有效减少训练内存开销。

title: NeuroState-Bench: A Human-Calibrated Benchmark for Commitment Integrity in LLM Agent Profiles
summary: Outcome-only evaluation under-specifies whether an evaluated agent profile preserves the commitments required to solve a multi-turn task coherently. NeuroState-Bench is a human-calibrated benchmark that operationalizes commitment integrity through benchmark-defined side-query probes rather than inferred hidden activations. The released inventory contains 144 deterministic tasks and 306 benchmark-defined side-query probes spanning eight cognitively motivated failure families, paired clean and distractor variants, and three difficulty bands. The main 32-profile evaluation contains a fixed 16-profile local subset and a matched 16-profile hosted large-model subset evaluated through the same benchmark pipeline. Human calibration uses the final merged reporting scope: 104 sampled task units, 216 raw annotations, and 108 adjudicated task rows, with weighted kappa = 0.977 and ICC(2,1) = 0.977. Empirically, task success and commitment integrity diverge across this expanded grid: the success leader is not the integrity leader, 31 of 32 profiles change rank when integrity replaces task success, and integrity rankings are more stable under distractor perturbation. The primary confidence-free score HCCIS-CORE reaches 0.8469 AUC and 0.6992 PR-AUC for post-probe diagnostic discrimination of terminal task failure; the legacy full heuristic variant HCCIS-FULL reaches 0.7997 AUC and 0.6410 PR-AUC. Probe accuracy and state drift achieve slightly higher ROC-AUC, 0.8587, and better Brier/ECE, while HCCIS-CORE has substantially higher point-estimate PR-AUC and remains more closely tied to the benchmark's intended construct. The exploratory neural-augmented variant HCCIS+N is weaker overall, and a randomized subspace control approaches chance. NeuroState-Bench therefore contributes a calibrated evaluation axis for exposing commitment failures over a broader model grid than the original local-only subset.

AI.tldr: NeuroState-Bench是一个人类校准的基准测试，通过基准定义的侧查询探针来评估多轮任务中的承诺完整性。实验发现任务成功与承诺完整性存在显著分歧，32个评估配置中有31个在两种指标下排名不同，HCCIS-CORE在诊断终端任务失败方面达到0.8469 AUC和0.6992 PR-AUC。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅基于任务结果（outcome-only evaluation）无法充分说明智能体在多轮任务中是否保持了一致解决任务所需的承诺（commitments），存在评估不充分的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含144个确定性任务和306个侧查询探针的基准测试，涵盖8种认知失败类型、干净与干扰变体及3个难度等级。采用32个配置评估（16个本地+16个托管大模型），通过Human calibration（104个任务单元、216个原始标注、108个裁决行）确保可靠性，并提出HCCIS-CORE等指标。
AI.result: 任务成功与承诺完整性排名显著分歧：31/32配置改变排名；HCCIS-CORE AUC=0.8469, PR-AUC=0.6992；HCCIS-FULL AUC=0.7997, PR-AUC=0.6410；探针准确率与状态漂移ROC-AUC达0.8587；HCCIS+N效果较弱；随机子空间接近随机水平。
AI.conclusion: NeuroState-Bench贡献了一个经过校准的评估维度，能够在更广泛的模型网格上暴露承诺失败，弥补了原有仅基于任务结果评估的不足。

title: Developing a Strong Pre-Trained Base Model for Plant Leaf Disease Classification
summary: Plants, crops and their yields are essential to our very existence, but diseases and pests cause large losses every year. As such it is vital to ensure that diseases can be spotted early and treated accordingly and stopping the spread while still possible. Manual and traditional methods require personal to walk through the field and check for symptoms 'by hand'. This is very laborious and very time consuming, so ML methods have been applied as a result and they have garnered promising results. CNN models are especially efficient as they can automatically extract features from images without any manual feature construction before then feeding the features to a classifier. Datasets are largely influential to the final performance of the model. Despite the importance that datasets pose to the field, there still seems to be somewhat of a discrepancy between what is publicly available for use and what would be required to sufficiently train fully capable models. To overcome these shortcomings, as part of this thesis open datasets for the field of plant leaf disease classification have been identified as well as models that can be trained on them and extensive benchmarks have been carried out to identify their suitability. Then a new dataset was constructed based on those findings as well as on the findings of a augmentation applicability study, which will be used to train a new Base Model based on the DenseNet201 architecture, which managed to outperform the baseline model on said new dataset as well as outperforming it on plant leaf disease classification domain specific Transfer-Learning experiments on another new dataset. This new model manages to train models through Transfer-Learning (TL) faster, more robust, more stable, and with less data than general model would, overcoming a large number of issues that the field still suffers from.

AI.tldr: 本文针对植物叶片病害分类中数据集不足的问题，构建了新数据集并基于DenseNet201训练出更优的Base Model，该模型通过迁移学习能更快、更稳定、更鲁棒地训练，且所需数据更少。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测植物病害费时费力，虽已有CNN方法取得不错效果，但现有公开数据集不足以训练出完全胜任的模型，存在数据集与实际需求之间的差距。
AI.method: 首先识别并基准测试现有开放数据集和可训练模型；然后基于测试结果和数据增强适用性研究，构建新数据集；最后基于DenseNet201架构训练新的Base Model，并用于迁移学习实验。
AI.result: 新Base Model在新数据集上优于基线模型；在植物叶片病害分类领域的迁移学习实验中，该模型在另一个新数据集上也表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过迁移学习训练更快、更鲁棒、更稳定，且所需数据更少，克服了该领域诸多现有问题。

title: EGAD: Entropy-Guided Adaptive Distillation for Token-Level Knowledge Transfer
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their enormous computational and memory requirements hinder deployment in resource-constrained environments. Knowledge distillation offers a promising solution by transferring knowledge from a large teacher model to a smaller student model. However, existing distillation methods typically treat all tokens equally, ignoring the fact that different tokens contribute unequally to model decisions. This can lead to inefficient knowledge transfer and reduced learning effectiveness. To address this limitation, we propose an entropy-based adaptive distillation strategy that dynamically adjusts the training process at the token level. Our method leverages the teacher's output entropy to guide three aspects of distillation. Specifically, we introduce a token-level curriculum by dynamically shifting focus from low- to high-entropy tokens during training. We further adjust the distillation temperature based on token entropy to better capture teacher confidence patterns. Moreover, we employ a dual-branch architecture for efficient logits-only distillation on easy tokens and deeper feature-based distillation on difficult tokens. Extensive experiments validate the soundness and effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于熵的适应性知识蒸馏策略，通过动态调整token级别的训练过程（包括课程学习、温度调整、双分支架构），提高了大模型蒸馏的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法对所有token一视同仁，忽略了不同token对模型决策贡献不均的问题，导致知识迁移效率低、学习效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出熵驱动的适应性蒸馏策略，包含三个关键设计：(1) token级别的课程学习，从低熵token逐步过渡到高熵token；(2) 根据token熵调整蒸馏温度；(3) 双分支架构：对简单token进行logits蒸馏，对困难token进行深层特征蒸馏。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了该方法在知识蒸馏任务上的有效性和合理性。
AI.conclusion: 基于熵的token级自适应蒸馏策略能够显著提升知识迁移效率，优于传统等权蒸馏方法。

title: Continuous Temporal Representations of Event-Based Signals via Interference-Based Wave Modeling
summary:
Spatio-temporal signals arising from event-driven biological processes, such as surface electromyography (sEMG), exhibit asynchronous and highly structured activation patterns that are challenging to model using conventional discrete or purely real-valued representations.
  In this work, we propose a continuous temporal modeling framework based on interference-based wave representations. The approach maps event-like input signals into a complex-valued latent wave field, where temporal structure is encoded through phase modulation and interactions between latent components.
  By projecting the resulting wave field onto an energy domain, the model induces structured activation patterns that capture both temporal localization and relational dependencies within finite observation windows, without relying on explicit recurrence or causal state propagation.
  The proposed formulation is particularly suited for event-driven biosignals, where continuous representations enable efficient gradient-based optimization and robust feature extraction. In particular, the method is designed to support learning from sEMG data for downstream control tasks in biomechanical systems, such as prosthetic devices and exoskeletons.
  Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed interference-based wave model provides improved representation quality compared to purely real-valued representations, while maintaining computational efficiency suitable for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于干涉波表示的连续时间建模框架，用于处理表面肌电图等事件驱动生物信号。该框架将事件输入映射为复数波场，通过相位调制编码时间结构，并在能量域中投影产生结构化激活模式。实验表明，该方法相比纯实值表示在表征质量上更优，且计算效率适合实际部署（如假肢和外骨骼控制）。
AI.motivation: 表面肌电图等事件驱动生物信号具有异步、高度结构化的激活模式，传统离散或纯实值表示难以有效建模。因此，需要一种能够捕捉连续时间结构的表征方法。
AI.method: 提出干涉波建模框架：1) 将事件输入映射为复数潜波场；2) 通过相位调制编码时间结构；3) 在有限观测窗口内，将波场投影到能量域，诱导出结构化的激活模式，无需显式循环或因果状态传播。
AI.result: 实验表明，干涉波模型相比纯实值表示获得了更好的表征质量，同时保持计算效率，适合实际部署。
AI.conclusion: 该连续波表示框架为事件驱动生物信号（如sEMG）提供了一种有效的建模方式，在表征质量和计算效率之间取得了良好平衡，适用于假肢和外骨骼等生物力学系统的下游控制任务。

title: Sheaf-Theoretic Planning: A Categorical Foundation for Resilient Multi-Agent Autonomous Systems
summary: The challenge of engineering autonomous agents capable of navigating the stochastic and adversarial nature of the physical world has historically resided at the intersection of symbolic logic and control theory. Traditional multi-agent system (MAS) frameworks have relied heavily on monolithic logical models -- primarily variations of the event calculus and situation calculus -- to represent action, change, and temporal persistence. While these classical systems provide robust solutions to the frame problem through mechanisms like circumscription and successor state axioms, they are inherently limited by a closed-world assumption that fails in the face of unobserved agent interventions, plan interruptions, and divergent belief-reality states. The paradigm of Sheaf-Theoretic Planning (STP) emerges as a transformative alternative, grounding the problem of multi-agent coordination under the mathematical structures of topos theory and sheaf semantics. This report provides an exhaustive analysis, justification, and extension of the STP framework, exploring its categorical foundations, implementation feasibility, and role in the future of resilient autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于层论规划（STP）框架，作为一种替代传统符号逻辑与多智能体系统的 transformative 方法，利用拓扑斯理论和层语义来处理物理世界中的随机性与对抗性，解决封闭世界假设的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体系统依赖经典逻辑模型（如事件演算、情境演算），受限于封闭世界假设，无法有效处理未观测到的智能体干预、计划中断以及信念-现实状态不一致等问题。
AI.method: 提出Sheaf-Theoretic Planning (STP) 框架，基于拓扑斯理论和层语义的数学结构，对多智能体协作问题进行形式化重构。
AI.result: STP框架在理论的范畴基础、实现可行性以及弹性自主系统的未来角色方面得到了详尽的分析、论证和扩展。
AI.conclusion: STP作为传统符号逻辑与控制理论的 transformative 替代方案，有望解决经典方法在开放、对抗性环境中的根本性局限。

title: Chain of Evidence: Pixel-Level Visual Attribution for Iterative Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Iterative Retrieval-Augmented Generation (iRAG) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for answering complex multi-hop questions by progressively retrieving and reasoning over external documents. However, current systems predominantly operate on parsed text, which creates two critical bottlenecks: (1) \textit{Coarse-grained attribution}, where users are burdened with manually locating evidence within lengthy documents based on vague text-level citations; and (2) \textit{Visual semantic loss}, where the conversion of visually rich documents (e.g., slides, PDFs with charts) into text discards spatial logic and layout cues essential for reasoning. To bridge this gap, we present \textbf{Chain of Evidence (CoE)}, a retriever-agnostic visual attribution framework that leverages Vision-Language Models to reason directly over screenshots of retrieved document candidates. CoE eliminates format-specific parsing and outputs precise bounding boxes, visualizing the complete reasoning chain within the retrieved candidate set. We evaluate CoE on two distinct benchmarks: \textbf{Wiki-CoE}, a large-scale dataset of structured web pages derived from 2WikiMultiHopQA, and \textbf{SlideVQA}, a challenging dataset of presentation slides featuring complex diagrams and free-form layouts. Experiments demonstrate that fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct achieves robust performance, significantly outperforming text-based baselines in scenarios requiring visual layout understanding, while establishing a retriever-agnostic solution for pixel-level interpretable iRAG. Our code is available at https://github.com/PeiYangLiu/CoE.git.

AI.tldr: 提出Chain of Evidence (CoE)框架，利用视觉语言模型直接对检索文档截图进行推理，通过精确边界框实现像素级可解释的迭代检索增强生成，消除格式依赖解析，在Wiki-CoE和SlideVQA基准上显著优于基于文本的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有iRAG系统在处理多跳问答时存在两个瓶颈：(1)粗粒度归因，用户需在冗长文档中手动定位证据；(2)视觉语义丢失，将视觉丰富文档转为纯文本会丢弃空间逻辑和布局线索。
AI.method: 提出CoE框架，一种检索器无关的视觉归因方法，直接使用VLM对检索文档截图进行推理，输出精确边界框，可视化完整推理链，无需特定格式解析。
AI.result: 在Wiki-CoE（结构化网页）和SlideVQA（复杂幻灯片）两个基准上，微调的Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct显著优于基于文本的基线，尤其在需要视觉布局理解的场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: CoE提供了检索器无关、像素级可解释的iRAG方案，有效解决了粗粒度归因和视觉语义丢失问题，为多模态问答系统开辟了新方向。

title: Less is More: Geometric Unlearning for LLMs with Minimal Data Disclosure
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world systems, they must support post-hoc removal of specific content to meet privacy and governance requirements. This motivates selective unlearning, which suppresses information about a particular entity or topic while preserving the LLM's general utility. However, most existing LLM unlearning methods require access to the original training corpus and rely on output-level refusal tuning or broad gradient updates, creating a tension among unlearning strength, non-target preservation, and data availability. We propose Geometric Unlearning (GU), an approach that operates directly on the model's prompt-time planning states without access to the original training corpus. GU distills a compact, low-rank geometry of desired safe behavior from a small set of safe reference prompts, and uses lightweight anchor-in-context synthetic prompts to trigger localized, projection-based alignment of hidden planning representations to this safe geometry. A teacher-distillation regularizer on synthetic non-target anchors further reduces collateral drift. Across privacy-oriented unlearning benchmarks (ToFU and UnlearnPII), GU achieves strong target suppression with minimal impact on non-target performance, demonstrating that effective unlearning can be achieved with minimal synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 提出几何遗忘（GU）方法，通过操作LLM的规划状态实现选择性遗忘，无需原始训练数据，仅需少量合成提示即可在隐私基准上实现强目标抑制和低副作用。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法依赖原始训练数据，且在遗忘强度、非目标保留和数据可用性之间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 从少量安全参考提示中蒸馏紧凑低维的安全行为几何结构，通过轻量锚点上下文合成提示触发隐藏规划表示的局部投影对齐，并用教师蒸馏正则化减少非目标漂移。
AI.result: 在ToFU和UnlearnPII基准上，GU实现了强目标抑制，同时对非目标性能影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 仅需最小合成数据即可实现有效的选择性遗忘，无需原始训练语料。

title: A Theory of Saddle Escape in Deep Nonlinear Networks
summary: In deep networks with small initialization, training exhibits long plateaus separated by sharp feature-acquisition transitions. Whereas shallow nonlinear networks and deep linear networks are well studied, extending these analyses to deep nonlinear networks remains challenging. We derive an exact identity for the imbalance of Frobenius norms of layer weight matrices that holds for any smooth activation and any differentiable loss and use this to classify activation functions into four universality classes. On the permutation-symmetric submanifold, the identity combines with an approximate balance law to reduce the full matrix flow to a scalar ODE, giving a critical-depth escape time law $τ_\star = Θ(\varepsilon^{-(r-2)})$ governed by the number $r$ of layers at the bottleneck scale rather than the total depth $L$. We find that this same $r-2$ exponent is recovered under He-normal initialization with $r$ bottleneck layers rescaled by $\varepsilon$, where the symmetry manifold is preserved by the flow but not attracting. We find close agreement between our theory and numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度非线性网络在小平坦初始化下的训练动力学，发现了由瓶颈层数量而非总深度决定的临界深度逃逸时间标度律 τ_⋆ = Θ(ε^{-(r-2)})，并通过Frobenius范数不平衡恒等式将激活函数分为四个普适类。
AI.motivation: 尽管浅层非线性网络和深层线性网络已被充分研究，但深层非线性网络的分析仍然具有挑战性。本文旨在填补这一空白，深入理解深度非线性网络在小平坦初始化下的训练动力学，特别是长期平台期和特征获取转变现象。
AI.method: 推导了一个适用于任意光滑激活函数和可微损失函数的Frobenius范数不平衡恒等式，据此将激活函数划分为四个普适类。在置换对称子流形上，结合近似平衡律将全矩阵流约化为标量ODE，推导出临界深度逃逸时间律。
AI.result: 发现了逃逸时间标度律 τ_⋆ = Θ(ε^{-(r-2)})，其中r是瓶颈尺度上的层数而非总深度L。该标度在He-normal初始化下同样成立，并且理论与数值模拟高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 深度非线性网络的动力学关键由瓶颈层数量决定，这一发现深化了对深度网络训练中平台期和转变现象的理解，为激活函数的分类提供了新的理论视角。

title: CyberAId: AI-Driven Cybersecurity for Financial Service Providers
summary: European financial institutions face mounting regulatory pressure while their security operations centres remain constrained not by data or staffing but by reasoning capacity: enterprise SIEMs cover only a fraction of MITRE ATT&CK techniques, two thirds of SOC teams cannot keep pace with alert volumes, and the majority of breaches are preceded by alerts that are generated but never investigated. Frontier large language models now achieve state-of-the-art results on isolated cybersecurity tasks (one-day vulnerability exploitation, code-level patching, intrusion detection) yet no narrow win constitutes a platform that can compose across functions, persist multi-tenant state, map findings to regulatory regimes and survive an audit. This position paper argues that the right unit of construction is a hybrid multi-agent system in which specialised LLM subagents reason over classical SIEM/XDR telemetry rather than replacing it, share accumulated agent state across institutions through privacy-preserving federation, and can connect to complementary capability packs such as quantum-based authentication, digital twins for adversarial validation, and eBPF-based kernel telemetry. We present CyberAId, a model-agnostic, on-premise-deployable platform in which a Main Agent coordination layer, a Reporting capability, and specialist subagents operate within a shared runtime under bounded human-in-the-loop autonomy, organised around four falsifiable design principles, and aligned with relevant regulations. CyberAId will be validated at four representative financial use cases (client impersonation, anti-money-laundering for payment service providers, retail-banking incident response, and high-frequency-trading resilience) and propose skill-based agent adaptation as the most promising research direction for turning each deployment into a contribution to a continuously refined collective defence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CyberAId，一个混合多智能体系统平台，通过专用 LLM 子代理增强而非替代传统 SIEM/XDR 遥测，以隐私保护联邦方式跨机构共享状态，并连接量子认证、数字孪生等能力包，旨在解决欧洲金融机构 SOC 在推理能力上的瓶颈，并在四个金融用例中验证。
AI.motivation: 欧洲金融机构面临监管压力，而 SOC 的瓶颈不在于数据或人员，而在于推理能力：SIEM 仅覆盖部分 MITRE ATT&CK 技术、2/3 SOC 团队无法跟上告警量、大多数入侵前已有未调查的告警。现有前沿 LLM 在孤立任务上表现优异，但单一功能无法构成可跨职能组合、持久化多租户状态、映射监管要求并经受审计的平台。
AI.method: 提出一个模型无关、可本地部署的混合多智能体系统 CyberAId，包含：主代理协调层、报告能力、专业子代理，在共享运行时下运行，具有有限的人机回环自主权。系统基于四个可证伪的设计原则，支持隐私保护联邦学习，并可连接量子认证、数字孪生、eBPF 内核遥测等互补能力包。
AI.result: 将在四个代表性金融用例（客户冒充、PSP 反洗钱、零售银行事件响应、高频交易弹性）中验证 CyberAId，并提出基于技能的代理自适应作为最有前景的研究方向，使每次部署都能为持续精化的集体防御做出贡献。
AI.conclusion: 关键主张：正确的构建单元是混合多智能体系统——专用 LLM 子代理推理于经典 SIEM/XDR 遥测之上（而非替代），通过隐私保护联邦跨机构共享累积状态，并可连接补充能力包。这为将分散的 LLM 安全能力整合为可审计、可合规的平台级解决方案提供了路径。

title: SIFT-VTON: Geometric Correspondence Supervision on Cross-Attention for Virtual Try-On
summary: Diffusion-based virtual try-on methods achieve photorealistic synthesis through cross-attention mechanisms that transfer garment features to target body regions. However, these approaches rely on implicit learning of spatial correspondences, struggling to preserve fine details such as text and illustrations. We propose a novel approach, which we call SIFT-VTON, that utilizes SIFT keypoint matching to provide explicit geometric guidance for diffusion-based virtual try-on. Our method applies domain-specific filtering to SIFT keypoint matches between garment and person images, then converts these correspondences into spatial probability distributions that supervise cross-attention layers during training. This explicit supervision guides the model to learn precise spatial alignment, concentrating attention on geometrically consistent garment regions. Experiments on the VITON-HD dataset demonstrate significant improvements on unpaired metrics while maintaining competitive paired reconstruction metrics. Qualitative comparisons show superior preservation of text clarity and pattern alignment. Attention visualizations confirm that our method produces sharply focused attention on relevant garment details. This work demonstrates that classical geometric correspondence methods can effectively enhance modern diffusion models for conditional synthesis tasks. The source code will be available at https://github.com/takesukeDS/SIFT-VTON.

AI.tldr: 提出SIFT-VTON方法，将SIFT关键点匹配作为显式几何引导融入扩散模型的交叉注意力机制，通过空间概率分布监督提升虚拟试装中文字和图案等细节的保留效果。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型虚拟试装方法依赖隐式学习空间对应关系，难以保留文字和图案等精细细节。
AI.method: 对服装与人像图像进行SIFT关键点匹配，经领域特定过滤后转换为空间概率分布，用于监督扩散模型交叉注意力层的训练，实现显式几何引导的空间对齐。
AI.result: 在VITON-HD数据集上，非配对指标显著提升，配对重建指标保持竞争力；文字清晰度和图案对齐优于现有方法；注意力可视化显示关注区域更聚焦。
AI.conclusion: 经典几何对应方法可有效增强现代扩散模型在条件合成任务中的表现。

title: Only Say What You Know: Calibration-Aware Generation for Long-Form Factuality
summary: Large Reasoning Models achieve strong performance on complex tasks but remain prone to hallucinations, particularly in long-form generation where errors compound across reasoning steps. Existing approaches to improving factuality, including abstention and factuality-driven optimization, follow a \emph{coupled exploration-commitment} paradigm, in which intermediate reasoning is unconditionally propagated to the final output, limiting fine-grained control over information selection and integration. In this paper, we propose an \textbf{Exploration-Commitment Decoupling} paradigm that disentangles knowledge exploration from final commitment, enabling models to explore with awareness while answering cautiously. We instantiate the paradigm with \textbf{Calibration-Aware Generation (CAG)}, a framework that equips models with end-to-end, calibration-aware generation capabilities, by augmenting intermediate reasoning with calibrated reliability estimates and prioritizing reliable content in final outputs. Across five long-form factuality benchmarks and multiple model families, CAG improves factuality by up to 13%, while reducing decoding time by up to 37%.
