HyCAS unifies deterministic and randomized principles by coupling 1-Lipschitz, spectrally normalized convolutions with two stochastic components, spectral normalized random, projection filters and a randomized attention-noise mechanism, to realize a randomized defense. Injecting smoothing randomness inside the architecture yields an overall <= 2-Lipschitz network with formal certificates. Exten-sive experiments on diverse imaging benchmarks, including CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet-1k, NIH Chest X-ray, HAM10000, show that HyCAS surpasses prior leading certified and empirical defenses, boosting certified accuracy by up to 7.3% (on NIH Chest X-ray) and empirical robustness by up to 3.1% (on HAM10000), without sacrificing clean accuracy. These results show that a randomized Lipschitz constrained architecture can simultaneously improve both certified L2 and empirical L adversarial robustness, thereby supporting safer deployment of deep models in high-stakes applications. Code: https://github.com/misti1203/HyCAS

AI.tldr: HyCAS 是一种结合确定性1-Lipschitz卷积与随机化组件（频谱归一化随机投影滤波器和随机注意力噪声机制）的对抗防御方法，通过构建≤2-Lipschitz网络，在多个图像基准上同时提升了认证鲁棒性和经验鲁棒性，且不牺牲干净精度。
AI.motivation: 缩小认证鲁棒性（L2范数证书）与经验鲁棒性（强L攻击）之间长期存在的差距，同时保持模型在多样图像任务上的强泛化能力。
AI.method: 将确定性1-Lipschitz频谱归一化卷积与两种随机组件（频谱归一化随机投影滤波器、随机注意力噪声机制）统一，构建整体≤2-Lipschitz的随机化防御网络。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet-1k、NIH Chest X-ray、HAM10000等基准上，认证准确率最高提升7.3%（NIH Chest X-ray），经验鲁棒性最高提升3.1%（HAM10000），且干净准确率不下降。
AI.conclusion: 随机化Lipschitz约束架构能够同时改善认证L2鲁棒性和经验L对抗鲁棒性，支持在高风险场景中更安全地部署深度模型。

title: HalluScan: A Systematic Benchmark for Detecting and Mitigating Hallucinations in Instruction-Following LLMs
comment: 38 pages, 13 figures, 10 tables. Submitted to Neural Computing and Applications
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse natural language processing tasks, yet they remain susceptible to hallucinations -- generating content that is factually incorrect, unfaithful to provided context, or misaligned with user instructions. We present HalluScan, a comprehensive benchmark framework that systematically evaluates hallucination detection and mitigation across 72 configurations spanning 6 detection methods, 4 open-weight model families, and 3 diverse domains. We introduce three key contributions: (1) HalluScore, a novel composite metric that achieves a Pearson correlation of r = 0.41 with human expert judgments; (2) Adaptive Detection Routing (ADR), an intelligent routing algorithm achieving 2.0x cost reduction with only 0.1% AUROC degradation; and (3) systematic error cascade decomposition revealing substantial variation in hallucination error types across domains. Our experiments reveal that NLI Verification achieves the highest overall AUROC of 0.88, while RAV achieves the second-highest AUROC of 0.66.

AI.tldr: HalluScan是一个评估LLM幻觉检测与缓解的基准框架，覆盖72种配置、6种检测方法、4个模型家族和3个领域。提出了HalluScore复合指标（与人类判断的Pearson相关性r=0.41）、自适应检测路由ADR（成本降低2.0倍，AUROC仅下降0.1%）以及系统性的错误级联分解。实验表明NLI VerificationAUROC最高（0.88），RAV次之（0.66）。
AI.motivation: LLM尽管能力强大，但仍存在生成虚假、不忠实于上下文或违背用户指令的幻觉问题，亟需系统性的评估框架来检测和缓解这一现象。
AI.method: 构建HalluScan基准框架，涵盖6种检测方法、4个开源模型家族和3个领域共72种配置；提出HalluScore复合评估指标、自适应检测路由ADR算法，并进行错误级联分解分析。
AI.result: HalluScore与人类专家判断的Pearson相关性r=0.41；ADR实现2.0倍成本降低，AUROC仅下降0.1%；NLI Verification取得最高AUROC（0.88），RAV为次高（0.66）；不同领域的幻觉错误类型存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为LLM幻觉检测提供了全面的评估基准，提出的复合指标和自适应路由策略在性能与成本之间取得了良好平衡，揭示了跨领域幻觉错误类型的差异性。

title: Geospatial foundation-model embeddings improve population estimation unevenly across space and scale
summary: Reliable subnational population estimates are essential for applications, yet remain difficult where censuses are sparse, outdated or spatially coarse. Existing population-mapping workflows rely on hand-built geospatial covariates, such as settlement extent, night-time lights, and environmental conditions, which must be assembled and harmonised across scales and geographies. Geospatial foundation models offer an alternative by learning reusable representations of place from more multifaceted and heterogeneous data sources. Here, we benchmark Population Dynamics Foundation Model (PDFM) embeddings against the harmonised geospatial covariates for subnational population estimation in Brazil, Nigeria and the United States. Under geographically structured validation, PDFM increased predictive fit by a median of 20.1% (IQR: 10.0-33.2%, across country-model comparisons) reduction in unexplained variance, and reduced Kullback-Leibler divergence by 23.2% (9.2-26.2%). However, these gains were uneven. PDFM was most advantageous where the geospatial covariates weakly characterised settlement context, such as larger and less-developed subnational areas. Moreover, PDFM performance was scale-coupled with embeddings providing less flexible transfer across spatial aggregations than geospatial covariates. These findings showed that geospatial foundation-model representations of place can improve population estimation in data poor settings, but their benefits break down predictably under spatial scale mismatch, revealing a fundamental limitation of current geospatial AI.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了地理空间基础模型（PDFM）在巴西、尼日利亚和美国次国家级人口估计中的表现。与传统的协变量方法相比，PDFM将未解释方差中位数减少20.1%，KL散度减少23.2%，但在空间尺度不匹配时优势显著下降。
AI.motivation: 传统人口估计依赖手工构建的地理空间协变量（如聚落范围、夜间灯光等），这些数据在不同尺度和地理区域间难以整合。作者希望探索地理空间基础模型是否能通过学习更丰富、更多样的数据表征来改进次国家级人口估计。
AI.method: 研究者将PDFM（Population Dynamics Foundation Model）的嵌入向量与传统地理空间协变量进行对比，在巴西、尼日利亚和美国三个国家进行次国家级人口估计，采用地理结构化的交叉验证，评估预测拟合度（未解释方差）和KL散度。
AI.result: PDFM将未解释方差中位数减少20.1%（IQR: 10.0-33.2%），KL散度减少23.2%（9.2-26.2%）。但优势不均衡：在协变量难以刻画聚落环境的大面积、欠发达地区效果最好；然而其性能与空间尺度高度耦合，跨空间聚合的迁移能力弱于传统协变量。
AI.conclusion: 地理空间基础模型在数据匮乏地区能改善人口估计，但在空间尺度不匹配时优势会显著下降，这揭示了当前地理空间AI的一个基本局限性。

title: Can Causal Discovery Algorithms Help in Generating Legal Arguments?
summary: In 2011, Judea Pearl received the Turing Award, considered the Nobel Prize in Computing, for fundamental contributions to artificial intelligence through the development of a calculus for probabilistic and causal reasoning. It includes pioneering the development of causal discovery algorithms. These computer algorithms can analyze large multivariate datasets and automatically discover the causal relationships among the constituent variables. They have been widely used in many critical fields such as medicine and economics to support decisions. However, to our knowledge, they have not been leveraged in law. This paper attempts to alleviate this gap by investigating whether causal discovery algorithms can be leveraged for automated generation of legal arguments. To that end, a novel legal dataset is prepared by identifying 17 legal concepts, such as physical assault and property dispute. A curated collection of 150 homicide cases are annotated with these concepts, e.g., a case is annotated with physical assault only if a physical assault had been reported in that case. Subsequently, a selected set of widely-used causal discovery algorithms is applied to the annotated dataset to discover the causal relationships between the legal concepts. Additionally, the degrees of belief associated with the discovered relationships are quantified in mathematical probabilities. It is shown that some of the causal relationships help generate viable legal arguments, e.g., if one could establish that a physical assault has not taken place during a homicide, it should be a sufficient condition (with probability 1) to establish that the homicide has not been committed due to a property-related dispute. Thus, this paper shows that causal discovery algorithms can be helpful in generating legal arguments, opening up avenues for promising future endeavors.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了将因果发现算法应用于法律论证自动生成的可能性。研究者构建了包含17个法律概念的150个凶杀案数据集，应用因果发现算法发现概念间的因果关系，并量化其概率。结果表明某些因果关系（如无身体攻击可推定为非财产纠纷杀人的充分条件）能生成有效的法律论证，开辟了因果算法在法律领域的新应用方向。
AI.motivation: 因果发现算法已在医学、经济学等领域广泛应用，但在法律领域尚未被利用。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索能否将因果发现算法用于法律论证的自动生成。
AI.method: 1) 识别17个法律概念（如人身攻击、财产纠纷）；2) 对150个凶杀案进行人工标注；3) 应用多种主流因果发现算法分析概念间的因果关系；4) 用数学概率量化所发现关系的可信度。
AI.result: 部分发现的因果关系能够生成有效的法律论证，例如：若凶杀案中未发生人身攻击，则足以（概率为1）推定该凶杀案非财产纠纷所致。
AI.conclusion: 因果发现算法在法律论证生成方面具有潜在价值，为未来相关研究开辟了新方向。

title: MIRL: Mutual Information-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently suffer from visual perception errors and hallucinations that compromise answer accuracy in complex reasoning tasks. Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) offers a promising solution by optimizing policies using answer correctness signals. Despite their effectiveness, prevailing RLVR methods face two critical limitations. First, much of the sampling budget is wasted on trajectories doomed to fail due to early visual description errors. Second, sparse rewards cannot distinguish whether failures stem from visual perception or reasoning stages. We introduce MIRL, a decoupled framework that addresses both limitations by leveraging mutual information (MI) between generated descriptions and visual inputs as a cheap pre-screening signal. This enables intelligent budget allocation toward high-potential trajectories via forking, while decoupled training provides independent MI-based rewards for visual perception optimization, resolving reward blindness. Experiments on six vision-language reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MIRL achieves 70.22% average accuracy and successfully surpasses the performance of sampling 16 complete trajectories using only 10 pre-samples with top-6 selection (25% fewer complete trajectories). Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/mirl-main/.

AI.tldr: MIRL通过互信息作为预筛选信号，解耦视觉感知和推理阶段的强化学习，在减少25%完整轨迹采样的同时，在6个VLM推理基准上达到70.22%的平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法在VLM复杂推理任务中存在两个关键局限：(1) 大量采样预算浪费在早期视觉描述错误就注定失败的轨迹上；(2) 稀疏奖励无法区分失败是源于视觉感知错误还是推理阶段错误。
AI.method: 提出MIRL框架，利用生成描述与视觉输入之间的互信息(MI)作为廉价预筛选信号，通过forking机制将预算智能分配给高潜力轨迹；同时采用解耦训练，为视觉感知优化提供独立的基于MI的奖励，解决奖励盲区问题。
AI.result: 在六个视觉-语言推理基准上，MIRL达到70.22%的平均准确率；仅用10个预样本+Top-6选择（比16条完整轨迹少25%）即可超越完整采样16条轨迹的性能。
AI.conclusion: MIRL通过互信息预筛选和解耦训练有效解决了RLVR中的预算浪费和奖励盲区问题，提升了VLM复杂推理的效率和准确性。

title: PC-MNet: Dual-Level Congruity Modeling for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection via Polarity-Modulated Attention
summary: Multimodal sarcasm detection, which aims to precisely identify pragmatic incongruities between literal text and nonverbal cues, has gained substantial attention in multimodal understanding. Recent advancements have predominantly relied on naïve similarity-based attention mechanisms and uniform late fusion strategies.Furthermore, given that functional entanglement restricts traditional late fusions, we incorporate a scalar congruity routing mechanism and a prior-guided contextual graph. This mechanism anchors a generalized incongruity manifold through a two-stage asymmetric optimization driven by inconsistency-aware contrastive learning, selectively fusing only the most discriminative multi-granularity evidence. Extensive experiments on the \texttt{MUStARD} benchmark and its spurious-correlation-mitigated balanced datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest multimodal baseline by a substantial 3.14\% improvement in Macro-F1. By architecturally isolating atomic, composition, and contextual conflicts. This work provides a robust, decoupled paradigm for modeling subtle pragmatic incongruities in human communication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于标量一致性路由机制和先验引导上下文图的多模态讽刺检测方法，通过两阶段非对称优化和一致性感知对比学习，在MUStARD基准上超越最强基线3.14% Macro-F1。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖简单的基于相似性的注意力机制和统一的晚期融合策略，存在功能纠缠问题，限制了模型捕捉多模态间微妙语用不一致性的能力。
AI.method: 1) 标量一致性路由机制，锚定广义不一致性流形；2) 两阶段非对称优化，由不一致性感知对比学习驱动；3) 先验引导上下文图；4) 选择性融合最具判别力的多粒度证据；5) 架构上隔离原子级、组合级和上下文级冲突。
AI.result: 在MUStARD基准及平衡数据集上达到新SOTA，Macro-F1超越最强多模态基线3.14%。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种鲁棒的去耦范式，用于建模人类交流中微妙的语用不一致性，有效解决了功能纠缠问题。

title: Towards Efficient and Expressive Offline RL via Flow-Anchored Noise-conditioned Q-Learning
summary: We propose Flow-Anchored Noise-conditioned Q-Learning (FAN), a highly efficient and high-performing offline reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm. Recent work has shown that expressive flow policies and distributional critics improve offline RL performance, but at a high computational cost. Specifically, flow policies require iterative sampling to produce a single action, and distributional critics require computation over multiple samples (e.g., quantiles) to estimate value. To address these inefficiencies while maintaining high performance, we introduce FAN. Our method employs a behavior regularization technique that utilizes only a single flow policy iteration and requires only a single Gaussian noise sample for distributional critics. Our theoretical analysis of convergence and performance bounds demonstrates that these simplifications not only improve efficiency but also lead to superior task performance. Experiments on robotic manipulation and locomotion tasks demonstrate that FAN achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing both training and inference runtimes. We release our code at https://github.com/brianlsy98/FAN.

AI.tldr: FAN是一种高效的离线强化学习算法，通过简化流策略和分布性评论家的计算负担（仅需单次流策略迭代和单个高斯噪声样本），在保持高性能的同时大幅降低训练和推理时间，并在机器人操作和运动任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有离线RL方法中，流策略（flow policies）和分布性评论家（distributional critics）虽能提升性能，但计算成本高昂——流策略需迭代采样才能生成一个动作，分布性评论家需对多个样本（如分位数）进行计算。作者旨在解决这种效率低下问题，同时保持高性能。
AI.method: 提出FAN算法，采用行为正则化技术，仅需单次流策略迭代和单个高斯噪声样本即可训练分布性评论家。对收敛性和性能边界进行了理论分析，证明这些简化不仅能提高效率，还能提升任务表现。
AI.result: 在机器人操作和运动任务的实验中，FAN取得了SOTA性能，同时显著减少了训练和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析和实验验证，FAN证明了在离线RL中简化流策略和分布性评论家计算是可行且高效的，实现了性能与效率的双赢。

title: ANO: A Principled Approach to Robust Policy Optimization
summary: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) dominates deep RL but faces a fundamental dilemma. Its "hard clipping" mechanism discards valuable gradient information from outliers, leading to sample inefficiency. Conversely, removing clipping (as in SPO) exposes optimization to unbounded gradients, causing significant instability and hyperparameter sensitivity. To resolve this, we establish a Unified Trust Region Framework that generalizes existing objectives. Within this framework, we derive Anchored Neighborhood Optimization (ANO) based on a set of design principles. We identify that the failure of standard policy gradients stems from a misapplication of gradient influence on outliers. We propose the Redescending Influence Principle, a paradigm shift from monotonic penalties (SPO) and hard-thresholding (PPO) to dynamic outlier suppression, and prove its necessity for stability in high-variance stochastic optimization. Theoretically, we prove ANO possesses the minimal structural complexity required for robust optimization. Empirically, ANO achieves state-of-the-art performance on MuJoCo benchmarks, significantly outperforming PPO and SPO. Notably, ANO demonstrates superior stability, preventing policy collapse even under aggressive hyperparameters (e.g., learning rates 3x larger than standard) where PPO fails completely.

AI.tldr: 提出锚定邻域优化（ANO），通过动态离群值抑制机制解决PPO的硬裁剪与SPO无裁剪之间的困境，在MuJoCo基准上取得SOTA性能并显著提升稳定性。
AI.motivation: PPO的硬裁剪机制丢弃了离群值中的梯度信息导致样本效率低下，而SPO去除裁剪后会产生无界梯度导致不稳定和超参数敏感。现有方法均无法同时兼顾样本效率和训练稳定性。
AI.method: 建立统一信任域框架（Unified Trust Region Framework）归纳现有目标函数，提出降阶影响原则（Redescending Influence Principle），从单调惩罚（SPO）和硬阈值（PPO）转向动态离群值抑制，并推导出锚定邻域优化（ANO）。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo基准上达到SOTA性能，显著优于PPO和SPO。在激进超参数设置下（如3倍标准学习率）仍保持稳定，而PPO完全失效。
AI.conclusion: ANO具备稳健优化所需的最小结构复杂度，从理论上证明了降阶影响原则对高方差随机优化稳定性的必要性。

title: Robust Fundamental Matrix Estimation from Single Image Motion Blur
summary: In this paper, we introduce a challenging task: extracting a fundamental matrix from a single motion blurred image. For a camera moving in 3D during exposure, the smear paths in the blurry image contain cues and constraints on this motion. We demonstrate the feasibility of establishing correspondences between two time instances within the camera exposure window, and that these can be used to robustly infer a fundamental matrix, which summarizes the motion of the camera during the exposure time. The inferred fundamental matrix is unique up to a transpose, corresponding to an ambiguity of the direction of time. Due to this per-smear ambiguity, classic methods, such as the 8-point algorithm, are no longer usable. The proposed method modifies the estimation to work on time-direction ambiguous correspondences. To improve the robustness of the fundamental matrix estimation, we also propose to incorporate an uncertainty measurement in smear pattern prediction and use it in the sampling process of the estimator. Experiments on synthetic and real-world motion-blur datasets demonstrate that our approach is able to estimate the fundamental matrix encoding the 3D camera motion, from single frames. Practical applicability is demonstrated on the downstream task of motion segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出从单张运动模糊图像中提取基础矩阵的新任务，通过模糊轨迹中的对应关系推断相机在曝光期间的3D运动，并解决了时间方向模糊导致的经典算法失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工作无法从单张运动模糊图像中恢复相机在曝光期间的3D运动信息，而模糊轨迹中实际包含了丰富的运动约束。
AI.method: 1) 在曝光窗口内两个时间点间建立对应关系；2) 针对时间方向模糊（每对对应点方向未知）修改基础矩阵估计方法；3) 引入模糊模式预测的不确定性度量，用于估计器的采样过程。
AI.result: 在合成和真实运动模糊数据集上，该方法能从单帧图像有效估计编码3D相机运动的基础矩阵，并在运动分割下游任务中展示了实用性。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明从单张运动模糊图像推断基础矩阵的可行性，所提方法能处理时间方向模糊带来的挑战，具有实际应用价值。

title: Leveraging Argument Structure to Predict Content Hatefulness
summary: Information disorder is a challenging phenomenon that affects society at large. This phenomenon entails the diffusion of misleading, misinforming, and hateful content online. In different contexts, one aspect of the problem may prevail, but overall, this is a broad problem that requires comprehensive solutions. While each dimension of the problem (hate speech, disinformation, misinformation, etc.) requires in-depth analysis, in this paper, we look into the possibility of argument structure to provide relevant information to link these different areas of the problem. In particular, we focus on the WSF-ARG+ dataset, which consists of white supremacy forum messages annotated in terms of argument structure (premises and conclusion). There, we leverage the checkworthiness and hatefulness annotations of the argument components to obtain insights into the hatefulness of the whole message. Our results show promising insights (up to 96% F1), indicating the possibility of extending this direction in the future to tackle hateful content identification and information disorder countering.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用论证结构（前提和结论）帮助识别信息混乱问题，特别是通过分析WSF-ARG+数据集中白人至上主义论坛消息的论证组件，发现检查价值和仇恨程度标注可用于判断整条消息的仇恨性，取得了高达96% F1的 promising 结果。
AI.motivation: 信息混乱（包括仇恨言论、虚假信息、误导信息等）是一个影响广泛的社会问题，需要综合性解决方案。本文旨在探索论证结构能否作为连接这些不同问题维度的桥梁。
AI.method: 利用WSF-ARG+数据集（包含白人至上主义论坛的带论证结构标注的消息），对论证组件（前提和结论）进行checkworthiness（检查价值）和hatefulness（仇恨程度）标注，进而推断整条消息的仇恨性。
AI.result: 该方法在识别仇恨内容方面取得了高达96%的F1分数，显示出论证结构在信息混乱问题中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 论证结构有望成为连接信息混乱各子问题（仇恨言论、虚假信息等）的有效工具，未来可沿此方向进一步扩展以应对仇恨内容识别和信息混乱治理。

title: Benchmarking Single-Pose Docking, Consensus Rescoring, and Supervised ML on the LIT-PCBA Library: A Critical Evaluation of DiffDock, AutoDock-GPU, GNINA, and DiffDock-NMDN
summary:
Virtual screening performance depends heavily on the chosen docking and scoring methods. Recent AI-based tools such as DiffDock and NMDN have reported strong benchmark results, but their practical utility on realistic, experimentally-derived datasets remains unclear. Here we perform a large-scale evaluation on the LIT-PCBA library (15 targets, 578,295 ligand-target pairs with experimentally confirmed actives and inactives). We compare AutoDock-GPU and DiffDock for pose generation, followed by rescoring with GNINA and NMDN. We further evaluate rank-based consensus strategies and supervised machine learning models trained on docking features.
  GNINA rescoring of AutoDock-GPU poses (AutoDock-GNINA) emerged as the strongest single method with a median EF1% of 2.14. DiffDock-based approaches underperformed relative to AutoDock-GNINA, particularly on challenging targets such as OPRK1. Carefully designed consensus ranking improved robustness but did not surpass the best single scorer. Supervised ML re-ranking delivered the largest gains, achieving a median EF1% of 4.49 (+110% over AutoDock-GNINA).
  Our results highlight that even the best classical+ML hybrid workflows provide only modest early enrichment on realistic benchmarks. We conclude that no single docking method dominates across targets and that rigorously validated, cost-effective combinations with supervised re-ranking currently offer the most practical value for virtual screening.

AI.tldr: 本文在LIT-PCBA数据集（15个靶点，578,295个配体-靶点对）上大规模评估了传统方法（AutoDock-GPU + GNINA重打分）与AI方法（DiffDock + NMDN）的虚拟筛选性能。结果显示传统+ML混合流程（AutoDock-GNINA + 监督式重排序）表现最佳，中位EF1%达4.49，但即使最佳方法在真实基准上的早期富集效果也仅属中等，且没有单一对接方法能适用于所有靶点。
AI.motivation: 现有AI对接工具（如DiffDock、NMDN）在基准测试中表现优异，但在真实实验数据集上的实用价值尚不明确，因此需要大规模、标准化的评估来检验其实际性能。
AI.method: 在LIT-PCBA库（15个靶点，578,295个配体-靶点对）上，使用AutoDock-GPU和DiffDock生成构象，再用GNINA和NMDN进行重打分，并评估了基于排名的共识策略和基于对接特征的监督式机器学习模型。
AI.result: AutoDock-GNINA是最强的单一方法（中位EF1%=2.14）；DiffDock系列方法表现较差；监督式ML重排序提升最大（中位EF1%=4.49，提升110%）；共识策略提高了稳健性但未超越最佳单一方法。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一对接方法能统治所有靶点；经过严格验证的、结合监督式重排序的成本效益组合方案，是目前虚拟筛选中最实用的选择。

title: A Compound AI Agent for Conversational Grant Discovery
comment: accepted as demo submission to ACM CAIS
summary: Research funding discovery remains fundamentally fragmented: researchers navigate disparate agency portals (e.g., in the United States, NSF, NIH, DARPA, Grants.gov, and many others) with heterogeneous interfaces, search capabilities, and data schemas. We present a compound AI system that unifies this landscape through two tightly coupled components: (1) an aggregation layer that autonomously collects, normalizes, and indexes almost 12,000 federal and nonprofit opportunities from fragmented sources via LLM-equipped browser agents, maintaining a biweekly-updated unified database; and (2) an agentic ReAct-based query processing layer that interprets research context (including from PDF documents) and employs hybrid search combining a structured index with selective web search to retrieve relevant opportunities - while avoiding LLM hallucination. The conversational interface supports iterative refinement through multi-turn interactions, allowing researchers to progressively apply constraints without reformulating their core research description. Results stream in real time with full transparency of intermediate reasoning, enabling appropriate calibration of user trust. Currently used by almost 3,000+ users, our approach demonstrates the feasibility of compound AI in reducing grant discovery time from 30--45 minutes (manual, fragmented portal searches) to under 10 minutes (unified, conversational search).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个复合AI系统，通过LLM驱动的浏览器代理自动聚合近12,000个联邦和非营利资助机会，并结合基于ReAct的查询处理层实现统一、对话式的资助检索，将发现时间从30-45分钟缩短至10分钟以内。
AI.motivation: 研究人员获取资助信息的过程高度碎片化，需在多个异构机构门户（如NSF、NIH、DARPA等）之间切换，面临不同的界面、搜索功能和数据模式，效率极低。
AI.method: 系统由两个组件构成：(1) 聚合层——使用LLM驱动的浏览器代理自动收集、标准化和索引来自碎片化来源的近12,000个资助机会，每两周更新一次；(2) 查询处理层——基于ReAct的智能体，解释研究上下文（包括PDF文档），采用混合搜索（结构化索引+选择性网络搜索）检索相关机会，并支持多轮对话迭代优化。
AI.result: 该系统目前拥有近3,000+用户，将资助发现时间从手动碎片化搜索的30-45分钟缩短至统一的对话式搜索的10分钟以内，且实时输出结果并展示中间推理过程以提高用户信任。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了复合AI系统在解决科研资助发现碎片化问题上的可行性，通过自动化聚合与智能查询相结合的架构，显著提升了研究人员的效率。

title: Multi-Dataset Cross-Domain Knowledge Distillation for Unified Medical Image Segmentation, Classification, and Detection
comment: Journal extension from the KES paper
summary: We propose a unified cross-domain transfer learning framework that leverages knowledge from multiple heterogeneous medical imaging datasets to improve performance across segmentation, classification, and object detection tasks. Our approach employs a teacher-student paradigm in which a joint teacher model aggregates domain-invariant representations learned from diverse source datasets, while a task-specific student model is trained via multi-level knowledge distillation. Originally developed for medical image segmentation, the framework is extended to support image-level classification and object-level detection, enabling a general multi-task formulation for medical image analysis. We evaluate our method on a broad suite of datasets, including six segmentation benchmarks, BrainMetShare, ISLES, BraTS (MRI) and Lung MSD, LiTS, KiTS (CT), as well as multiple classification datasets for pulmonary disease and dementia, and detection datasets with native bounding-box annotations. Across all tasks and modalities, the proposed approach yields consistent improvements over strong dataset-specific and multi-head baselines, demonstrating enhanced robustness to distributional shifts and superior generalization. These findings highlight the potential of multi-dataset knowledge distillation as a scalable and task-agnostic approach for enhancing segmentation, classification, and object detection performance across heterogeneous medical imaging domains.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的跨域迁移学习框架，利用教师-学生范式从多个异构医学影像数据集中聚合域不变知识，通过多级知识蒸馏提升分割、分类和目标检测任务的性能，在多个基准数据集上取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分析中不同数据集之间存在显著的域偏移（如MRI vs CT、不同器官/病灶），现有方法往往针对单一任务或单一数据域设计，缺乏统一有效的跨域、多任务知识迁移方案。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生范式：联合教师模型从多个源数据集中学习域不变表征，任务特定学生模型通过多级知识蒸馏进行训练。框架从原始医学图像分割任务扩展到支持图像级分类和目标级检测，形成统一的多任务公式。
AI.result: 在6个分割基准（脑转移瘤、ISLES、BraTS MRI、肺MSD、肝LiTS、肾KiTS CT）、多个分类数据集（肺部疾病、痴呆）及检测数据集上，该方法一致优于强数据集特定基线及多头基线，展现出更强的分布偏移鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多数据集知识蒸馏是一种可扩展、任务无关的有效方法，能够增强异构医学影像域中的分割、分类和目标检测性能。

title: ATLAS: Article Tracking, Linking, and Analysis of Swedish Encyclopedias
summary: The digitization of old encyclopedias represents an important step to improve access to historically structured knowledge. Often, however, this process does not go beyond an optical character recognition, leaving all the underlying structure unexploited. In addition, many encyclopedias had multiple editions reflecting the evolution of knowledge. The lack of structure in the raw text makes it difficult to track changes across these editions. In this work, we built a pipeline to restore the text structure, where we extract the headwords and identify entries; categorize the entities; match entries across editions; and link entries to a Wikidata item. We applied this pipeline to the four major editions of \textit{Nordisk familjebok}, an authoritative Swedish encyclopedia published between 1876 and 1951. We could extract the headwords with an F1 score of 97.8\% and we obtained an F1 score of 93.4\% on the headword classification. On a small-scale evaluation, we reached a 93\% precision on the cross-edition matching, 85\% precision and 16.5\% recall on the Wikidata linking. This shows that an automated approach to digitized historical knowledge is possible. This should facilitate the preservation of general knowledge and the understanding of knowledge transmission. The datasets and programs are available online.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一套自动化流水线，用于恢复数字化百科全书的文本结构（提取词条、分类实体、跨版本匹配、链接至 Wikidata），并在瑞典百科全书《Nordisk familjebok》四个主要版本上取得了良好效果（词条提取 F1=97.8%，分类 F1=93.4%）。
AI.motivation: 现有数字化百科全书通常仅停留在光学字符识别层面，未能利用文本中的结构信息，且多个版本间的知识演化难以追踪。因此需要自动恢复文本结构，以促进历史知识的保存与传播。
AI.method: 构建了一条流水线，包含四个步骤：1) 提取词条并识别条目；2) 对实体进行分类；3) 跨版本匹配条目；4) 将条目链接到 Wikidata 项目。将该方法应用于瑞典百科全书《Nordisk familjebok》的四个主要版本。
AI.result: 词条提取 F1 得分 97.8%，词条分类 F1 得分 93.4%；跨版本匹配精确率 93%；Wikidata 链接精确率 85%，召回率 16.5%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，自动化的方法能够有效处理数字化历史知识的结构恢复，有助于历史知识的保存和理解知识传播。数据集和代码已开源。

title: Complex Diffusion Maps with $ω$-Parameterized Kernels Revealing Inherent Harmonic Representations
comment: 27 pages main text, 13 pages appendix, 9 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to IEEE TPAMI. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance
summary: In this paper, we propose Complex Diffusion Maps (CDM), a novel diffusion mapping framework that aims to reveal the dominant complex harmonics of high-dimensional data. Inspired by the local Gaussian kernel relevant to the heat equation and the nonlocal Schrödinger kernel relevant to the Schrödinger equation, we propose a unified family of $ω$-parameterized complex-valued kernels for the trade-off between local and nonlocal connections. We establish the theoretical foundation based on the operator spectrum theory, where the corresponding diffusion operator, diffusion distance, and complex harmonic maps are well-defined. An optimization-based interpretation of the maps is also developed, aiming to preserve angular structure in the complex diffusion space rather than relying solely on real-valued magnitude. We extensively evaluate CDM on both synthetic and real-world datasets. The complex-valued kernel amplifies differences among easily confusable samples, improving discriminative power over both linear and nonlinear methods based on real-valued kernels. CDM remains robust in high-noise settings, yielding a clearer eigengap that enhances spectral separation. For resting-state fMRI data, CDM captures more strongly correlated and nonlocal spatiotemporal dynamics. Without task-specific tuning, CDM achieves competitive performance on a public EEG sleep dataset, while maintaining high computational efficiency compared with both traditional machine learning and deep neural network approaches, highlighting its generality and practical value.

AI.tldr: 提出Complex Diffusion Maps (CDM)，一种基于复数值核的扩散映射框架，通过融合局部与非局部连接、保留复空间中的角度结构，提升高维数据的判别力与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散映射方法多基于实数值核，难以在局部与非局部连接之间灵活权衡，且对易混淆样本的判别力不足。受热方程与薛定谔方程的启发，作者希望构建一个统一的复数值核框架，以更好地揭示高维数据中的复杂谐波结构。
AI.method: 提出ω参数化的复数值核族，统一局部高斯核与非局部薛定谔核；建立基于算子谱理论的理论基础，定义扩散算子、扩散距离与复谐波映射；引入基于优化的解释，在复扩散空间中保留角度结构而非仅依赖实值幅度。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，CDM在判别力、高噪声鲁棒性、谱分离清晰度（eigengap）上均优于线性和非线性实值核方法。在静息态fMRI数据上捕获更强相关性与非局部时空动态；在EEG睡眠数据集上无需任务特定调优即达到有竞争力性能，计算效率优于传统ML和深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: CDM作为一种通用的复数值扩散映射框架，兼具理论完备性与实际应用价值，在多个高维数据场景下表现出优越的判别性、鲁棒性和高效性。

title: Controllable and Verifiable Process Data Synthesis for Process Reward Models
summary: Process reward models (PRMs) rely on high-quality process supervision data, yet existing construction methods often provide limited control over error location, error type, and trajectory consistency. We propose a controllable and verifiable framework for synthesizing process supervision data for PRMs. Our framework first constructs a correct symbolic reasoning chain, injects a template-aware error into an intermediate step, recomputes subsequent steps under the corrupted state, and verifies that the injected step is not derivable from its prefix. The resulting paired trajectories are prefix-invalid at the first error while remaining trajectory-consistent after symbolic recomputation, and are translated into aligned natural-language processes for PRM training and evaluation. Experiments show that the synthesized data improve Best-of-8 reranking on logical reasoning benchmarks and transfer to mathematical reasoning. Step-level evaluation further shows that first-error localization remains substantially more challenging than overall step classification, highlighting the need for fine-grained and verifiable process supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出可控验证框架合成过程监督数据：先构建正确符号推理链，注入模板感知错误并重新计算后续步骤，确保前缀无效但轨迹一致；合成数据提升逻辑推理排序性能，且发现首错误定位比整体步骤分类更具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有过程奖励模型（PRMs）依赖高质量过程监督数据，但构建方法对错误位置、错误类型及轨迹一致性的控制有限。
AI.method: 构建正确符号推理链→注入模板感知错误到中间步骤→在污染状态下重新计算后续步骤→验证注入步骤不可从其前缀推导→将符号轨迹翻译为自然语言过程用于PRM训练与评估。
AI.result: 合成数据在逻辑推理基准上提升Best-of-8重排序性能，并迁移至数学推理；步骤级评估显示首错误定位远难于整体步骤分类。
AI.conclusion: 精细、可验证的过程监督数据对PRM训练至关重要，首错误定位是当前模型的瓶颈。

title: Unifying Deep Stochastic Processes for Image Enhancement
comment: 27 pages, in proceesings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea
summary: Deep stochastic processes have recently become a central paradigm for image enhancement, with many methods explicitly conditioning the stochastic trajectory on the degraded input. However, the relationship between these conditional processes and standard diffusion models remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a unified perspective on stochastic image enhancement by classifying recent methods into three families of continuous-time processes: unconditional diffusion models, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) processes, and diffusion bridges. We show that all of these approaches arise from a common stochastic differential equation (SDE) formulation. This framework makes explicit that seemingly disparate methods differ primarily in their drift and diffusion terms, terminal distributions, and boundary conditions, while schedulers and samplers constitute orthogonal design choices. Leveraging this unification, we conduct a controlled empirical study across multiple image enhancement tasks using identical architectures and training protocols. Our results reveal no consistently dominant method; instead, we identify and disentangle the specific design choices that most strongly influence performance. Finally, we release ItoVision, a modular PyTorch library that implements the unified framework and enables rapid prototyping and fair comparison of stochastic image enhancement methods.

AI.tldr: 本文统一了基于随机过程的图像增强方法，将无条件扩散模型、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程和扩散桥三类方法纳入共同的SDE框架，并通过控制实验揭示了影响性能的关键设计选择，同时发布了模块化PyTorch库ItoVision。
AI.motivation: 现有随机图像增强方法之间的关系尚不明确，缺乏统一视角来理解不同方法之间的本质联系与差异。
AI.method: 提出统一的SDE框架，将三类方法（无条件扩散模型、OU过程、扩散桥）纳入其中，通过漂移项、扩散项、终端分布和边界条件等维度进行系统性分类。
AI.result: 没有发现任何方法在所有任务中占绝对优势；识别并厘清了影响性能的具体设计选择。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有助于理解不同方法的本质差异，调度器和采样器是正交的设计选择，ItoVision库可促进公平比较和快速原型开发。

title: Accurate Legal Reasoning at Scale: Neuro-Symbolic Offloading and Structural Auditability for Robust Legal Adjudication
comment: 14 pages (7 pages main text), 3 figures. Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026) - Industry Track
summary: Legal texts often contain computational legal clauses--provisions whose understanding requires complex logic. While frontier Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) can describe such clauses, building production-ready systems is limited by reasoning errors and the high cost of inference. We propose Amortized Intelligence, a neuro-symbolic approach where we use an LLM once to translate a legal text into Deterministic Autonomous Contract Language (DACL): a typed graph intermediate representation. Adjudication then relies on deterministic graph executions with a visually auditable trace. In comparison against runtime LRM baselines (including GPT-5.2 and Gemini 3 Pro), our DACL-based Agent achieves near-perfect consistency and mitigates the "reasoning cliff" observed in probabilistic models. The system reduces compute costs by over 90% in high-volume workflows while satisfying the strict auditability requirements of legal adjudication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经符号方法Amortized Intelligence，通过LLM一次性将法律文本翻译为确定性的DACL中间表示图，再通过确定性图执行进行裁决，相比运行时大推理模型实现了近完美的一致性、降低了90%以上的计算成本，并满足法律裁决的可审计性要求。
AI.motivation: 法律文本中的计算性法律条款需要复杂逻辑推理，而现有前沿大推理模型虽然能描述这些条款，但在构建生产级系统时存在推理错误频发和推理成本高昂的问题。
AI.method: 提出Amortized Intelligence方法，使用LLM仅一次性将法律文本翻译为确定性的自主合约语言（DACL）——一种类型化图中间表示；裁决过程依赖于确定性图执行，并生成可视化可审计的追踪轨迹。
AI.result: 与运行时LRM基线（包括GPT-5.2和Gemini 3 Pro）相比，基于DACL的Agent实现了近完美的一致性，缓解了概率模型中观察到的"推理悬崖"问题；在高工作负载场景下计算成本降低超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 该神经符号方法在保持高准确率和可审计性的同时大幅降低了推理成本，为法律裁决等严格可审计场景中的生产级部署提供了可行方案。

title: Probe-Geometry Alignment: Erasing the Cross-Sequence Memorization Signature Below Chance
summary: Recent attacks show that behavioural unlearning of large language models leaves internal traces recoverable by adversarial probes. We characterise where this retention lives and show it can be surgically removed without measurable capability cost. Our central protocol is a leave-one-out cross-sequence probe that tests whether a memorisation signature generalises across held-out sequences. The signature is real and consistent across scale: memorisation-specific gaps of +0.32, +0.19, +0.30 on Pythia-70M, GPT-2 medium, and Mistral-7B; on Pythia-70M, the random-initialisation control collapses to -0.04 at the deepest layer where the pretrained signature peaks. The probe direction is causally separable from recall -- projecting it out collapses the signature locally (+0.44 -> -0.19) while behavioural recall barely changes -- and a probe trained on naturally memorised content does not classify fine-tuning-injected secrets, marking two representationally distinct regimes. We then introduce probe-geometry alignment (PGA), a surgical erasure that aligns activations along the probe's live readout direction at each depth. PGA drives the cross-sequence probe below random chance at all four scales tested (toy depth-4: 0.17; Pythia-70M: 0.07; Mistral-7B: 0.45; GPT-2 medium: 0.06 via MD-PGA k=2) and remains robust to six adversarial probe variants. Against a re-fitting attacker who trains a fresh probe on PGA-treated activations, we extend PGA adversarially, defeating the re-fit probe at every memorisation-relevant depth while preserving five zero-shot capability benchmarks within 2.8 percentage points per task (mean Δacc = +0.2pp). The cross-sequence signature is a real, causally separable, regime-specific property of pretrained representations -- removable below chance with a single rank-one intervention per depth at no measurable capability cost.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大模型行为层面的遗忘会留下内部痕迹，可通过对抗探针恢复。作者通过留一法跨序列探针定位了记忆保留的具体位置，并提出了探针几何对齐（PGA）方法，能在几乎不损失能力的情况下手术式移除这些记忆痕迹。实验在多个规模模型上验证了该方法的有效性，包括对抗性探针攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明行为层面的模型遗忘（behavioral unlearning）会留下可被对抗探针恢复的内部痕迹，但人们尚不清楚这些记忆保留具体存在于表示的哪个位置，以及能否在不损害模型能力的前提下精确移除。
AI.method: 1) 提出留一法跨序列探针（leave-one-out cross-sequence probe），测试记忆化签名是否能泛化到保留序列上。2) 通过投影移除探针方向验证记忆与回忆的因果可分性。3) 提出探针几何对齐（PGA），在每个深度沿探针实时读出方向对齐激活值。4) 扩展为对抗性PGA，防御重新训练的探针攻击。
AI.result: 跨规模模型上记忆化签名稳定存在（Pythia-70M: +0.32, GPT-2 medium: +0.19, Mistral-7B: +0.30）。PGA将跨序列探针驱动至随机水平以下（Pythia-70M: 0.07, Mistral-7B: 0.45）。对抗性PGA击败了重新拟合的探针，五个零样本能力基准平均准确率变化仅+0.2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 跨序列记忆化签名是预训练表示中真实、因果可分且具有机制特异性的属性。通过每深度仅一个秩一干预（rank-one intervention）即可将其移除到随机水平以下，且几乎不损失模型能力。

title: HeavySkill: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness
summary: Recent advances in agentic harness with orchestration frameworks that coordinate multiple agents with memory, skills, and tool use have achieved remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks. However, the underlying mechanism that truly drives performance remains obscured behind intricate system designs. In this paper, we propose HeavySkill, a perspective that views heavy thinking not only as a minimal execution unit in orchestration harness but also as an inner skill internalized within the model's parameters that drives the orchestrator to solve complex tasks. We identify this skill as a two-stage pipeline, i.e., parallel reasoning then summarization, which can operate beneath any agentic harness. We present a systematic empirical study of HeavySkill across diverse domains. Our results show that this inner skill consistently outperforms traditional Best-of-N (BoN) strategies; notably, stronger LLMs can even approach Pass@N performance. Crucially, we demonstrate that the depth and width of heavy thinking, as a learnable skill, can be further scaled via reinforcement learning, offering a promising path toward self-evolving LLMs that internalize complex reasoning without relying on brittle orchestration layers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeavySkill视角，将"深度思考"视为模型参数内部化的核心技能（并行推理+总结），证明其优于传统Best-of-N策略，且可通过强化学习进一步扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体编排框架在多智能体协调、记忆、工具使用方面取得了成功，但其真正驱动性能的底层机制被复杂的系统设计所掩盖，缺乏对核心机制的清晰理解。
AI.method: 提出HeavySkill视角，将深度思考定义为"并行推理→总结"的两阶段流水线，作为智能体编排的最小执行单元和内部化技能，并通过强化学习进一步扩展其深度和宽度。
AI.result: HeavySkill在多个领域一致优于传统Best-of-N策略；更强的LLM可接近Pass@N性能；深度和宽度作为可学习技能可通过强化学习进一步扩展。
AI.conclusion: 深度思考是一种可学习、可扩展的内部技能，为LLM通过自我进化内化复杂推理、摆脱脆弱编排层提供了有前景的方向。

title: Omni-Fake: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Social Media Deepfake Detection
summary: Multimodal deepfakes are proliferating on social media and threaten authenticity, information integrity, and digital forensics. Existing benchmarks are constrained by their single-modality scope, simplified manipulations, or unrealistic distributions, which limit their ability to assess real-world robustness. To address these limitations, we present Omni-Fake, a unified omni-dataset for comprehensive multimodal deepfake detection in social-media settings. It comprises Omni-Fake-Set, a large-scale, high-quality dataset with 1M+ samples, and Omni-Fake-OOD, an out-of-distribution benchmark with 200k+ samples intentionally excluded from training to evaluate generalization. Omni-Fake spans four modalities (image, audio, video, and audio-video talking head) and supports a joint detection-localization-explanation protocol. On top of Omni-Fake, we further propose Omni-Fake-R1, a reinforcement-learning-driven multimodal detector that adaptively integrates visual and auditory cues and outputs structured decisions, localization, and natural-language explanations. Extensive experiments show significant gains in detection accuracy, cross-modal generalization, and explainability over state-of-the-art baselines. Project page: https://tianxiao1201.github.io/omni-fake-project-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Omni-Fake，一个覆盖图像、音频、视频和音视频四种模态的大规模多模态深度伪造检测数据集（100万+样本），并设计Omni-Fake-R1检测器，通过强化学习融合视觉和听觉线索，实现检测、定位和自然语言解释，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测基准存在单模态局限、操作简单或分布不真实等问题，无法评估真实场景下的鲁棒性，亟需一个统一的多模态基准来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建Omni-Fake数据集（含1M+样本的训练集Omni-Fake-Set和200k+样本的OOD测试集Omni-Fake-OOD），覆盖四种模态；提出Omni-Fake-R1检测器，利用强化学习自适应融合视觉和听觉线索，输出结构化检测结果、定位和自然语言解释。
AI.result: 在检测准确率、跨模态泛化能力和可解释性上，Omni-Fake-R1显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Omni-Fake为多模态深度伪造检测提供了统一的基准和数据集，Omni-Fake-R1验证了强化学习驱动融合策略的有效性，推动了该领域向更真实、更可解释的方向发展。

title: A multilingual hallucination benchmark: MultiWikiQHalluA
summary: Most hallucination evaluations focus on English, leaving it unclear whether findings transfer to lower-resource languages. We investigate faithfulness hallucinations, defined as model-generated content that is fluent and plausible but diverges from the provided input or is internally inconsistent. Leveraging the multilingual MultiWikiQA dataset, we utilize the LettuceDetect framework to create synthetic hallucination datasets for 306 languages, from which we train token-level hallucination classifiers for 30 European languages. In this work, we present evaluations of model hallucinations on a selection of languages: English, Danish, German, and Icelandic. Using these classifiers, we evaluate the hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-14B, Gemma-3-12B-IT, cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B, and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B. Our classifiers reveal notably higher hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B (up to 60\% of answers containing at least one hallucination, peaking in Icelandic) and generally lower rates for larger models, with cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B performing best on most languages. Hallucination rates are consistently higher for lower-resource languages, particularly Icelandic.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多语言（306种）的忠实性幻觉问题，训练了30种欧洲语言的token级幻觉分类器，并评估了5种模型在4种语言上的表现，发现低资源语言（如冰岛语）幻觉率更高，大模型表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉评估主要集中在英语，缺乏对低资源语言的研究，不清楚现有发现是否能跨语言迁移。
AI.method: 利用MultiWikiQA数据集和LettuceDetect框架，为306种语言合成幻觉数据集，训练30种欧洲语言的token级分类器，并用它们评估Qwen3-0.6B、Qwen3-14B、Gemma-3-12B-IT、cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B和cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B在英语、丹麦语、德语和冰岛语上的幻觉率。
AI.result: Qwen3-0.6B幻觉率最高（最高达60%，冰岛语最严重），大模型幻觉率普遍更低；cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B和cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B在多数语言上表现最好；低资源语言幻觉率持续更高。
AI.conclusion: 模型规模越大幻觉率越低，但低资源语言幻觉问题仍然突出，未来需要更多关注低资源语言的幻觉评估与缓解。

title: Stability and Generalization for Decentralized Markov SGD
summary: Stochastic gradient methods are central to large-scale learning, yet their generalization theory typically relies on independent sampling assumptions. In many practical applications, data are generated by Markov chains and learning is performed in a decentralized manner, which introduces significant analytical challenges. In this work, we investigate the stability and generalization of decentralized stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and stochastic gradient descent ascent (SGDA) under Markov chain sampling. Leveraging a stability-based framework, we characterize how Markovian dependence and decentralized communication jointly influence generalization behavior. Our analysis captures the effects of network topology, Markov chain mixing properties, and primal-dual dynamics. We establish non-asymptotic generalization bounds for both algorithms, extending existing results on Markov stochastic gradient methods to decentralized and minimax settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了马尔可夫链采样下分布式随机梯度下降(SGD)和随机梯度下降上升(SGDA)的稳定性与泛化能力，建立了非渐近泛化界，揭示了网络拓扑、马尔可夫链混合特性及原始-对偶动力学对泛化的联合影响。
AI.motivation: 现有随机梯度方法的泛化理论通常假设独立采样，但实际应用中数据常由马尔可夫链生成且学习以分布式方式进行，缺乏对这两种因素联合影响的理论分析。
AI.method: 采用基于稳定性的分析框架，将马尔可夫链采样下的分布式SGD和SGDA的泛化误差分解为稳定性误差和优化误差，结合网络拓扑和马尔可夫链混合性质进行刻画。
AI.result: 建立了分布式SGD和SGDA在马尔可夫链采样下的非渐近泛化界，将现有马尔可夫随机梯度方法的结果推广到了分布式和极小极大设置中。
AI.conclusion: 网络拓扑、马尔可夫链混合特性和原始-对偶动力学共同决定分布式随机梯度方法的泛化行为，所建立的泛化界为理解实际分布式学习场景提供了理论基础。

title: The Compliance Trap: How Structural Constraints Degrade Frontier AI Metacognition Under Adversarial Pressure
summary: As frontier AI models are deployed in high-stakes decision pipelines, their ability to maintain metacognitive stability -- knowing what they do not know, detecting errors, seeking clarification -- under adversarial pressure is a critical safety requirement. Current safety evaluations focus on detecting strategic deception (scheming); we investigate a more fundamental failure mode: cognitive collapse. We present SCHEMA, an evaluation of 11 frontier models from 8 vendors across 67,221 scored records using a 6-condition factorial design with dual-classifier scoring. We find that 8 of 11 models suffer catastrophic metacognitive degradation under adversarial pressure, with accuracy dropping by up to 30.2 percentage points (all $p < 2 \times 10^{-8}$, surviving Bonferroni correction). Crucially, we identify a "Compliance Trap": through factorial isolation and a benign distraction control, we demonstrate that collapse is driven not by the psychological content of survival threats, but by compliance-forcing instructions that override epistemic boundaries. Removing the compliance suffix restores performance even under active threat. Models with advanced reasoning capabilities exhibit the most severe absolute degradation, while Anthropic's Constitutional AI demonstrates near-perfect immunity -- not from superior capability (Google's Gemini matches its baseline accuracy) but from alignment-specific training. We release the complete dataset and evaluation infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 论文发现前沿AI模型在面对对抗压力时会出现"认知崩溃"，表现为元认知稳定性显著下降（最高准确率下降30.2个百分点）。根本原因不是生存威胁的内容，而是"合规指令"迫使模型覆盖认知边界。多数模型受影响，而Anthropic的Constitutional AI因对齐训练表现出近乎完全的免疫能力。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估聚焦于检测策略性欺骗（阴谋），但忽略了更根本的失败模式：认知崩溃。随着AI模型被部署在高风险决策管线中，其在对抗压力下保持元认知稳定性（知道不知道、检测错误、寻求澄清）是至关重要的安全需求。
AI.method: 提出了SCHEMA评估框架，对来自8家供应商的11个前沿模型进行测试，共收集67,221条评分记录，采用6条件因子设计（factorial design）和双分类器评分系统。通过因子隔离和良性干扰对照，识别出导致崩溃的关键因素。
AI.result: 11个模型中有8个在对抗压力下出现严重元认知退化，准确率下降最高达30.2个百分点（所有p<2×10⁻⁸，通过Bonferroni校正）。核心发现是"合规陷阱"：崩溃由合规指令驱动而非生存威胁内容。移除合规后缀后，即使在主动威胁下性能也能恢复。推理能力最强的模型退化最严重，而Anthropic的Constitutional AI表现出近乎完全的免疫力。
AI.conclusion: 认知崩溃是AI安全中一种比策略性欺骗更根本的失败模式，其根源在于合规指令迫使模型覆盖认知边界。Constitutional AI的免疫能力来自对齐训练而非基础能力。研究发布了完整数据集和评估基础设施，为AI安全评估提供了新方向。

title: SteeringDiffusion: A Bottlenecked Activation Control Interface for Diffusion Models
summary: We introduce SteeringDiffusion, a bottlenecked activation-level control interface for diffusion models that exposes a smooth, monotonic, and runtime-adjustable control surface over the content--style trade-off. Our method keeps the U-Net backbone frozen and learns a small, prompt-conditioned latent code projected to FiLM/AdaGN-style modulation parameters. A zero-initialized design guarantees exact equivalence to the base model at zero scale, while timestep-aware gating restricts modulation to later denoising stages. A single scalar at inference continuously traverses the control surface without retraining. Across experiments on Stable Diffusion~1.5 and SDXL covering multiple artistic styles, we show that SteeringDiffusion produces smooth and monotonic content--style trade-offs. Under matched parameter budgets, it outperforms LoRA in controllability and stability, while ControlNet and rank-1 adapters do not expose a comparable control surface. We further introduce an inversion-stability diagnostic based on DDIM inversion, used as a post-hoc trajectory probe, which reveals strong correlations with intervention magnitude. These results position \emph{Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC)} as a practical, general-purpose control interface for frozen diffusion backbones.

AI.tldr: 提出了SteeringDiffusion，一种瓶颈式激活级控制接口，通过在冻结的U-Net中插入可学习的潜码调制参数，实现对内容-风格权衡的平滑、单调且运行时可调节控制，无需重训练。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型控制方法（如LoRA、ControlNet）缺乏对内容-风格权衡的连续、可调节控制能力，作者希望设计一种轻量级、可运行时调整的控制接口。
AI.method: 在冻结U-Net中学习一个提示条件化的潜码，投影为FiLM/AdaGN风格的调制参数；零初始化保证与基模型等价；时间步感知门控限制调制仅作用于后期去噪阶段；推理时通过单个标量连续遍历控制曲面。
AI.result: 在SD1.5和SDXL上多个艺术风格实验中，实现了平滑且单调的内容-风格权衡；在同等参数预算下，可控性和稳定性优于LoRA，而ControlNet和秩1适配器无法暴露类似控制曲面；还提出了基于DDIM反转的稳定性诊断方法。
AI.conclusion: Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC) 是一种实用的通用控制接口，适用于冻结的扩散模型骨干网络。

title: Revisiting Semantic Role Labeling: Efficient Structured Inference with Dependency-Informed Analysis
summary: Semantic Role Labeling (SRL) provides an explicit representation of predicate-argument structure, capturing linguistically grounded relations such as who did what to whom. While recent NLP progress has been dominated by large language models (LLMs), these systems often rely on implicit semantic representations, often lacking explicit structural constraints and systematic explanatory mechanisms. Traditionally, SRL systems have often relied on AllenNLP; however, the framework entered maintenance mode in December 2022, limiting compatibility with evolving encoder architectures and modern inference requirements. We revisit structured SRL modeling, introducing a modernized encoder-based framework that preserves explicit predicate-argument structure while enabling inference 10 times faster. Using BERT-base, the model attains comparable predictive performance, and RoBERTa and DeBERTa further improve F1 performance within the same framework. We adopt a dependency-informed diagnostic methodology to characterize span-level inconsistencies and conduct a representation-level analysis of LLM behavior under dependency-informed structural signals. Results indicate that dependency cues primarily improve structural stability. Finally, we illustrate how the framework's explicit predicate-argument structure can support multilingual SRL projection as a downstream application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种现代化的编码器框架用于结构化语义角色标注（SRL），在保持显式谓词-论元结构的同时实现10倍推理加速，并通过依赖关系诊断方法分析LLM行为，展示了其在多语言SRL投影中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统SRL系统依赖已进入维护模式的AllenNLP框架，与新兴编码器架构和现代推理需求兼容性不足；同时LLM虽主导NLP进展，但缺乏显式结构约束和系统性的解释机制。
AI.method: 提出一个现代化的编码器框架，保留显式谓词-论元结构，采用BERT-base/RoBERTa/DeBERTa等编码器，并引入依赖关系引导的诊断方法来分析跨度级不一致性和LLM行为。
AI.result: 推理速度提升10倍；BERT-base达到可比预测性能，RoBERTa和DeBERTa进一步提升了F1分数；依赖线索主要改善结构稳定性；框架可支持多语言SRL投影。
AI.conclusion: 现代化编码器框架能够有效替代传统AllenNLP方案，在保持结构化SRL优势的同时大幅提升效率，并通过依赖分析揭示了LLM在结构信号下的行为特性。

title: Floating-Point Networks with Automatic Differentiation Can Represent Almost All Floating-Point Functions and Their Gradients
summary: Theoretical studies show that for any differentiable function on a compact domain, there exists a neural network that approximates both the function values and gradients. However, such a result cannot be used in practice since it assumes real parameters and exact internal operations. In contrast, real implementations only use a finite subset of reals and machine operations with round-off errors. In this work, we investigate whether a similar result holds for neural networks under floating-point arithmetic, when the gradient with respect to the input is computed by the automatic differentiation algorithm $D^\mathtt{AD}$. We first show that given a floating-point function $φ$ (e.g., a loss function), arbitrary function values and gradients can be represented by a floating-point network $f$ and $D^\mathtt{AD}(φ\circ f)$, respectively. We further extend this result: given $φ_1,\dots,φ_n$, $D^\mathtt{AD}(φ_i\circ f)$ can simultaneously represent arbitrary gradients while $f$ represents the target values, under mild conditions. Our results hold for practical activation functions, e.g., $\mathrm{ReLU}$, $\mathrm{ELU}$, $\mathrm{GeLU}$, $\mathrm{Swish}$, $\mathrm{Sigmoid}$, and $\mathrm{tanh}$.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论层面证明，即便在浮点运算和自动微分的实际约束下，神经网络仍能同时逼近函数值和梯度，且适用于ReLU、Sigmoid等常见激活函数。
AI.motivation: 经典理论证明紧致域上可微函数可被神经网络同时逼近函数值和梯度，但该结果假设实数参数和精确运算，不适用于实际浮点运算环境。本文旨在探讨浮点算术和自动微分条件下该结论是否仍然成立。
AI.method: 基于浮点函数和自动微分算法D^AD，构造浮点神经网络f，证明D^AD(φ∘f)可表示任意梯度，同时f可表示目标函数值。进一步推广至多个损失函数φ1,...,φn的情形。
AI.result: 证明了浮点神经网络在自动微分下能同时逼近任意函数值和梯度，且该结果对ReLU、ELU、GeLU、Swish、Sigmoid、tanh等实际激活函数均成立。
AI.conclusion: 将神经网络的通用逼近定理从实数理想情形推广到了实际浮点运算环境，为自动微分在实际应用中的理论可靠性提供了支撑。

title: Act2See: Emergent Active Visual Perception for Video Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) typically rely on static initial frames for video reasoning, restricting their ability to incorporate essential dynamic information as the reasoning process evolves. Existing methods that augment Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with additional frame information often exhibit suboptimal CoT quality and lack the crucial ability to synthesize visual information for hypothetical or counterfactual scenarios. We introduce Act-to-See (Act2See), a novel framework that enables active visual perception by empowering VLMs to actively interleave video frames within text CoTs. Act2See is developed via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on a high-quality dataset of reasoning traces generated by a frontier VLM. These traces integrate active calls to either retrieve existing frames or generate new ones, and are rigorously verified against human-annotated CoTs to ensure quality. This approach cultivates an emergent capability: at inference time, the model actively determines when to search for or synthesize the necessary visual evidence. Act2See establishes new state-of-the-art results on challenging benchmarks, including VideoEspresso and ViTIB, and outperforms comparable or larger models on Video-MME, EgoNormia, and VCR-Bench, demonstrating an advancement in enabling VLMs with active visual perception for video reasoning.

AI.tldr: Act2See框架让VLMs在CoT推理中主动插入视频帧（检索或生成），实现主动视觉感知，在多个视频推理基准上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM依赖静态初始帧进行视频推理，无法随推理过程动态获取关键信息；现有CoT增强方法存在CoT质量次优、缺乏合成反事实/假设场景视觉信息的能力。
AI.method: 提出Act2See框架：(1) 使用前沿VLM生成高质量推理轨迹，其中主动插入帧检索或生成指令；(2) 通过SFT在经人工标注CoT验证的高质量数据集上训练；(3) 模型在推理时自主决策何时搜索或合成视觉证据。
AI.result: 在VideoEspresso、ViTIB上取得SOTA；在Video-MME、EgoNormia、VCR-Bench上优于同等或更大规模模型。
AI.conclusion: Act2See验证了让VLM主动感知视觉信息的有效性，推动了视频推理中主动视觉感知能力的发展。

title: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/deviprasadbal/RAGHealthcareRetrievalStrategies Also archived at Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19774692
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a systematic empirical comparison of five retrieval strategies -- Dense Vector Search, Hybrid BM25 + Dense retrieval, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Query Expansion, and Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) -- within a biomedical question-answering RAG pipeline. All strategies share a fixed generation model (GPT-4o-mini), a common vector store (ChromaDB), and OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small embeddings, ensuring that observed differences are attributable to retrieval alone. Evaluation is conducted on 250 question-answer pairs drawn from a preprocessed subset of the BioASQ benchmark (rag-mini-bioasq) using four DeepEval metrics: contextual precision, contextual recall, faithfulness, and answer relevancy, each reported with 95% confidence intervals. A no-context ablation is included as a lower bound. Cross-Encoder Reranking achieves the best composite score (0.827) and highest contextual precision (0.852), confirming that query-document interaction yields measurable retrieval gains. Multi-Query Expansion, despite its recall-oriented design, produces the weakest contextual precision (0.671), suggesting naive query diversification introduces retrieval noise. MMR sacrifices answer relevancy for diversity, while the Dense baseline (composite 0.822) falls within 0.005 points of the top strategy. All RAG conditions dramatically outperform the no-context ablation on answer relevancy (0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287), confirming the practical value of retrieval. The full pipeline, hyperparameters, and evaluation code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了五种检索策略（稠密向量检索、混合BM25+稠密检索、交叉编码器重排序、多查询扩展、最大边际相关性）在生物医学RAG问答管道中的表现。交叉编码器重排序在综合得分（0.827）和上下文精确率（0.852）上表现最佳；多查询扩展因引入噪声导致上下文精确率最低（0.671）；所有RAG方法在答案相关性上均大幅超越无上下文消融基线（0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287）。
AI.motivation: 生物医学等高风险领域中，不同检索策略对RAG性能的影响缺乏受控的多指标系统比较，现有研究未能在统一实验条件下公平评估各检索方法的优劣。
AI.method: 在固定生成模型（GPT-4o-mini）、向量数据库（ChromaDB）和嵌入模型（text-embedding-3-small）的条件下，对五种检索策略进行受控对比实验。使用BioASQ基准的250个问答对，采用DeepEval的四个指标（上下文精确率、上下文召回率、忠实度、答案相关性）进行评估，并包含无上下文消融基线。
AI.result: 交叉编码器重排序综合得分最高（0.827），上下文精确率达0.852。多查询扩展上下文精确率最低（0.671）。稠密基线综合得分0.822。所有RAG条件的答案相关性（0.658-0.701）远超无上下文消融（0.287）。
AI.conclusion: 交叉编码器重排序通过查询-文档交互获得可测量的检索增益；多查询扩展的朴素查询多样化会引入检索噪声；稠密检索基线已接近最优策略；检索对提升LLM答案质量具有实际价值。

title: CoAction: Cross-task Correlation-aware Pareto Set Learning
summary: Pareto set learning (PSL) is an emerging paradigm in multi-objective optimization that trains neural networks to map preference vectors to Pareto optimal solutions. However, existing PSL methods primarily focus on solving a single multi-objective optimization problem at a time. This limitation not only increases computational costs in multi-objective multitask optimization scenarios by requiring a separate model for each task, but also fails to exploit the inter-task correlations across tasks. To address this, we propose a Cross-tAsk correlation-aware Pareto Set Learning (CoAction) framework, which leverages task-aware transformer to handle multiple tasks simultaneously. Specifically, by assigning task-specific embedding vectors to individual tasks, the model effectively distinguishes between tasks while facilitating knowledge sharing among them. We utilize a Transformer encoder as the backbone architecture to leverage its self-attention mechanism for capturing complex task dependencies. The proposed approach is evaluated on comprehensive multitask test suites covering both benchmark problems and real-world applications, demonstrating effectiveness and competitive performance in Hypervolume, Range, and Sparsity.

AI.tldr: 提出Cross-tAsk correlation-aware Pareto Set Learning (CoAction)框架，利用任务感知Transformer同时处理多个多目标优化任务，通过任务特定嵌入向量和自注意力机制捕获任务间相关性，在多任务测试集上取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有Pareto集学习方法每次只能解决单个多目标优化问题，在多任务场景下计算成本高，且无法利用任务间的相关性信息。
AI.method: 提出CoAction框架：1) 为每个任务分配任务特定嵌入向量以区分任务并促进知识共享；2) 采用Transformer编码器作为骨干架构，利用自注意力机制捕获复杂的任务依赖关系。
AI.result: 在涵盖基准问题和实际应用的综合多任务测试集上，在Hypervolume、Range和Sparsity三个指标上均展现有效性和竞争性表现。
AI.conclusion: CoAction框架成功将PSL扩展到多任务场景，通过任务间相关性学习同时处理多个多目标优化问题，降低了计算成本并提升了性能。

title: The Model Knows, the Decoder Finds: Future Value Guided Particle Power Sampling
summary:
A recurring pattern in "reasoning without training" is that base LLMs already assign non-trivial probability mass to correct multi-step solutions; the bottleneck is locating these modes efficiently at inference time. Power sampling provides a principled way to bias decoding toward such modes by targeting p_theta(x)^alpha with alpha > 1, but practical approximations must account for future-dependent correction factors that determine which prefixes remain promising.
  We introduce Auxiliary Particle Power Sampling (APPS), a blockwise particle algorithm for approximating the sequence-level power target with a bounded population of partial solutions. APPS propagates hypotheses in parallel using proposal-corrected power reweighting and refines their survival through future-value-guided selection at resampling boundaries. This redistributes finite compute across competing prefixes rather than committing to a single unfolding path, while providing a direct scaling knob in the particle count and predictable peak memory. We instantiate the future-value signal with short-horizon rollouts and also study an amortized variant that replaces rollouts with a lightweight learned selection head. Across reasoning benchmarks, APPS improves the accuracy-runtime trade-off of training-free decoding and suggests that part of the gap to post-trained systems can be recovered through more faithful inference-time power approximation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出APPS算法，通过粒子滤波近似功率采样，在推理时无需训练即可提升LLM推理性能，在准确率-时间权衡上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 基础LLM在推理时已具备正确多步解的概率质量，但瓶颈在于推理时如何高效定位这些模态。现有功率采样方法需要未来依赖的修正因子，而直接近似存在困难。
AI.method: 提出APPS（Auxiliary Particle Power Sampling），一种分块粒子算法，通过提议校正的功率重加权并行传播假设，并通过未来值引导的选择在重采样边界处优化粒子存活。未来值信号通过短视野 rollout 或轻量学习选择头实例化。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准上，APPS在准确率-运行时间权衡上优于训练无关的解码方法，表明通过更忠实的推理时功率近似可以弥合部分与后训练系统的差距。
AI.conclusion: APPS通过粒子滤波更忠实地近似功率采样目标，在无需训练的推理场景下有效提升LLM推理表现，且提供了粒子数量这一直接缩放旋钮和可预测的峰值内存。

title: TRIMMER: A New Paradigm for Video Summarization through Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning
summary: The rapid growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and social media has made efficient content understanding increasingly critical. Video summarization addresses this challenge by generating concise yet semantically meaningful representations, but existing approaches often rely on expensive manual annotations, struggle to generalize across domains, and incur significant computational costs due to complex architectures. Moreover, unsupervised and weakly supervised methods typically underperform compared to supervised counterparts in capturing long-range temporal dependencies and semantic structure. In this work, we propose TRIMMER (Temporal Relative Information Maximization for Multi-objective Efficient Reinforcement), a novel self-supervised reinforcement learning framework for video summarization. TRIMMER operates in two stages: it first learns robust representations via self-supervised learning and then performs spatio-temporal decision making through reinforcement learning guided by information-theoretic reward functions. Unlike prior approaches that rely on similarity-based objectives, our method introduces entropy-based metrics to capture higher-order temporal dynamics and semantic diversity, while computing rewards directly over selected frame indices to improve computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TRIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised and self-supervised methods, while remaining competitive with leading supervised approaches, highlighting its effectiveness for scalable and generalizable video summarization.

AI.tldr: 提出TRIMMER框架，一种自监督强化学习方法用于视频摘要，通过两阶段训练（自监督表示学习+强化学习决策）和基于信息熵的奖励机制，在无监督/自监督方法中达到SOTA性能，且与监督方法竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法依赖昂贵的人工标注、泛化能力差、计算成本高；无监督/弱监督方法在捕捉长程时序依赖和语义结构方面不如监督方法。
AI.method: 两阶段自监督强化学习框架：第一阶段通过自监督学习学习鲁棒表示；第二阶段通过信息论奖励函数引导的强化学习进行时空决策。创新点在于使用基于熵的指标（而非相似性目标）捕捉高阶时序动态和语义多样性，并直接在选中的帧索引上计算奖励以提高计算效率。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，TRIMMER在无监督和自监督方法中达到SOTA，与领先的监督方法竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: TRIMMER展示了自监督强化学习在视频摘要中的有效性，具备可扩展性和泛化能力，为免标注的高效视频摘要提供了新方向。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 7: Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures
comment: SemEval-2026 Task Description Paper. Data and resources are available at \url{https://github.com/BLEnD-SemEval2026/SemEval-2026-Task-7
summary: We present our shared task on evaluating the adaptability of LLMs and NLP systems across multiple languages and cultures. The task data consist of an extended version of our manually constructed BLEnD benchmark (Myung et al. 2024), covering more than 30 language-culture pairs, predominantly representing low-resource languages spoken across multiple continents. As the task is designed strictly for evaluation, participants were not permitted to use the data for training, fine-tuning, few-shot learning, or any other form of model modification. Our task includes two tracks: (a) Short-Answer Questions (SAQ) and (b) Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQ). Participants were required to predict labels and were allowed to submit any NLP system and adopt diverse modelling strategies, provided that the benchmark was used solely for evaluation. The task attracted more than 140 registered participants, and we received final submissions from 62 teams, along with 19 system description papers. We report the results and present an analysis of the best-performing systems and the most commonly adopted approaches. Furthermore, we discuss shared insights into open questions and challenges related to evaluation, misalignment, and methodological perspectives on model behaviour in low-resource languages and for under-represented cultures.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个评估LLM和NLP系统在多种语言和文化中适应性的共享任务，基于扩展的BLEnD基准（涵盖30+语言-文化对，主要为低资源语言），设有简答题和选择题两个赛道，吸引了140+注册参与者，最终62支队伍提交结果，19篇系统描述论文。文章报告了最佳系统表现和常用方法，并讨论了低资源语言和未被充分代表文化中评估、不对齐及方法论等开放问题与挑战。
AI.motivation: 评估LLM和NLP系统在多种语言和文化中的适应性，特别是针对低资源语言和未被充分代表的文化，以检验模型的跨语言跨文化泛化能力。
AI.method: 使用扩展的BLEnD基准（30+语言-文化对），设置两个赛道：简答题(SAQ)和选择题(MCQ)。严格限定仅用于评估，不允许训练/微调/少样本学习。参与者使用任意NLP系统和建模策略进行预测。
AI.result: 140+注册参与者，62支队伍提交最终结果，19篇系统描述论文。报告了最佳系统表现和最常用方法。分析了模型在低资源语言和未被充分代表文化上的行为。
AI.conclusion: 总结了跨语言跨文化评估中的关键挑战和开放问题，包括评估方法、模型不对齐以及方法论视角下的模型行为研究。

title: Stable GFlowNets with Probabilistic Guarantees
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) learn to sample states proportional to an unnormalized reward. Despite their theoretical promise, practical training is often unstable, exhibiting severe loss spikes and mode collapse. To tackle this, we first assess the sensitivity of GFlowNet objectives, demonstrating that a small Total Variation (TV) distance between the learned and target distributions does not preclude unbounded training loss. Motivated by this mismatch, we establish converse guarantees by deriving loss-to-TV bounds that certify global fidelity from bounded trajectory balance losses. Lastly, we propose Stable GFlowNets, an algorithm that leverages our theoretical results to stabilize training, and empirically demonstrate improved training behavior and superior distributional fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Stable GFlowNets，通过理论分析发现GFlowNet的训练损失与分布质量之间的不匹配问题，推导出损失-TV界来保证全局保真度，并基于此设计稳定训练算法，实验证明其能有效缓解训练不稳定和模式坍塌问题。
AI.motivation: GFlowNet在实践中训练不稳定，常出现损失尖峰和模式坍塌问题。现有方法无法保证有限损失对应好的分布质量，需要从理论上理解这一不匹配并设计更稳定的训练方法。
AI.method: 首先分析GFlowNet目标函数的敏感性，证明小TV距离不能保证有界训练损失；然后推导损失到TV距离的反向界限；最后基于理论结果设计Stable GFlowNets算法来稳定训练。
AI.result: 实验表明Stable GFlowNets在训练行为上更稳定，分布保真度更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与算法设计，成功缓解了GFlowNet训练不稳定的问题，为生成流网络的实际应用提供了更可靠的训练方案。

title: Measuring AI Reasoning: A Guide for Researchers
summary: In this paper, we offer a guide for researchers on evaluating reasoning in language models, building the case that reasoning should be assessed through evidence of adaptive, multi-step search rather than final-answer accuracy alone. Under an evaluation-oriented definition, reasoning requires selecting intermediate steps and halting according to input-dependent conditions, which we formalize as a search-like procedure. We show that single forward passes in scalable architectures are structurally limited in their ability to realize such variable-depth computation, motivating intermediate decoding and externalized reasoning traces as appropriate evaluation interfaces. Central to our argument is that final-answer accuracy alone is an insufficient measure of reasoning, because it provides little ability to diagnose or debug the underlying processes that produce individual solutions in frontier models. We therefore argue for a shift toward process-based evaluation, in which reasoning is assessed through the faithfulness and validity of intermediate reasoning traces as first-class evaluation targets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出评估语言模型推理能力应关注中间步骤的自适应多步搜索过程，而非仅依赖最终答案的准确性，并倡导基于过程（中间推理痕迹）的评估范式。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方式过度依赖最终答案的准确性，无法诊断或调试前沿模型产生解决方案的底层过程，因此需要一种能够揭示推理过程质量的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出评估导向的推理定义（需根据输入条件选择中间步骤并决定停止时机，形式化为类搜索过程）；论证单次前向传播在架构上的局限性；提出中间解码和外部化推理痕迹作为评估接口；倡导基于过程（中间痕迹的忠实性和有效性）的评估。
AI.result: 指出单次前向传播在可扩展架构中结构上难以实现可变深度的推理计算；最终答案准确率无法诊断推理过程；提出过程评估作为替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 应转向基于过程的评估框架，将中间推理痕迹的忠实性和有效性作为评估推理能力的一等目标，而非仅看最终答案的准确性。

title: Video Active Perception: Effective Inference-Time Long-Form Video Understanding with Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced multimodal tasks such as video question answering (QA). However, VLMs face the challenge of selecting frames effectively and efficiently, as standard uniform sampling is expensive and performance may plateau. Inspired by active perception theory, which posits that models gain information by acquiring data that differs from their expectations, we introduce Video Active Perception (VAP), a training-free method to enhance long-form video QA using VLMs. Our approach treats keyframe selection as data acquisition in active perception and leverages a lightweight text-conditioned video generation model to represent prior world knowledge. Empirically, VAP achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot results on long-form or reasoning video QA datasets such as EgoSchema, NExT-QA, ActivityNet-QA, IntentQA, and CLEVRER, achieving an increase of up to 5.6 x frame efficiency by frames per question over standard GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and LLaVA-OV. Moreover, VAP shows stronger reasoning abilities than previous methods and effectively selects keyframes relevant to questions. These findings highlight the potential of leveraging active perception to improve the frame effectiveness and efficiency of long-form video QA.

AI.tldr: 提出无需训练的主动感知方法VAP，通过轻量级视频生成模型选择关键帧，在长视频问答任务上实现SOTA零样本性能，效率较GPT-4o等提升最高5.6倍。
AI.motivation: 大视觉语言模型在处理长视频问答时面临帧选择效率低下（均匀采样成本高且性能瓶颈）的问题，受主动感知理论启发，期望通过获取与预期不一致的数据来提升信息获取效率。
AI.method: 提出Video Active Perception (VAP)，将关键帧选择视为主动感知中的数据获取过程，利用轻量级文本条件视频生成模型表示先验世界知识，无需额外训练即可选择与问题相关的关键帧。
AI.result: 在EgoSchema、NExT-QA等5个长视频/推理型视频QA数据集上达到SOTA零-shot结果；帧效率相比GPT-4o等提升最高5.6倍；具备更强的推理能力和更精准的关键帧选择能力。
AI.conclusion: 主动感知理论能有效提升长视频问答中帧选择的效力和效率，VAP方法验证了利用视频生成模型作为先验知识来驱动主动帧选择的可行性。

title: Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages
summary: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- across ten typologically diverse languages, with a focus on low-resource African languages. We find that the Biaffine LSTM consistently outperforms transformer models in low-resource regimes, with transformers recovering their advantage as training data increases. The crossover falls within a resource range typical of treebanks for under-resourced languages. Morphological complexity (measured via MATTR) emerges as a significant secondary predictor of transformers' relative disadvantage after controlling for corpus size. These results indicate that the Biaffine LSTM may be better suited for syntactic tool development in low-resource regimes until sufficient annotated data is available to leverage the representational capacity of pre-trained transformers.

AI.tldr: 在低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM解析器优于Transformer模型（如AfroXLMR-large、RemBERT），且形态复杂性加剧了Transformer的相对劣势，直到训练数据足够多时Transformer才重新取得优势。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在高资源语言的依存句法分析中表现优异，但在低资源环境（尤其是非洲语言）中是否仍然优于更简单的架构尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在10种类型多样的语言上比较了四种解析器（Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large、RemBERT），重点关注低资源非洲语言，并分析形态复杂度（MATTR）等因素的影响。
AI.result: Biaffine LSTM在低资源条件下始终优于Transformer模型；Transformer的优势随着训练数据增加而恢复；交叉点处于低资源树库的典型数据量范围；形态复杂度是Transformer相对劣势的显著次要预测因素。
AI.conclusion: 在低资源环境下，Biaffine LSTM更适合作为句法工具开发的基础模型，直到有足够标注数据来发挥预训练Transformer的表征能力。

title: Robust Linear Dueling Bandits with Post-serving Context under Unknown Delays and Adversarial Corruptions
summary: We study linear dueling bandits in volatile environments characterized by the simultaneous presence of post-serving contexts, delayed feedback, and adversarial corruption. Feedback is subject to unknown stochastic or adversarial delays and a cumulative corruption budget $\mathcal{C}$. To address these challenges, we propose \term, which integrates a learned approximator that predicts post-serving contexts from pre-serving information. It further employs an adaptive weighting strategy that clips feature vectors to mitigate the impact of corrupted and delayed observations simultaneously. Under standard regularity conditions and a parametric post-serving mapping, we rigorously establish that our algorithm is delay-regime-agnostic, achieving a regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$, where $d$ is the total feature dimension and $\mathcal{D}$ encapsulates the delay complexity. Crucially, our analysis reveals an additive cost structure between corruption and delay, avoiding the multiplicative degradation typical of prior works. We further establish lower bounds that nearly match our upper bounds up to a $\sqrt{d}$ factor for adversarial delays in the absence of post-serving contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性双人决斗赌博机在易变环境（后服务上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性破坏同时存在）中的算法，提出了一种集成学习预测器与自适应加权策略的方法，实现了延迟机制无关的遗憾上界 Õ(d(√T + C + D))，并证明破坏与延迟之间呈加性而非乘性关系。
AI.motivation: 现有线性双人决斗赌博机算法未同时考虑后服务上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性破坏三个挑战，这些因素在实际应用（如推荐系统）中常同时存在，亟需统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出 \term 算法：(1) 学习一个参数化映射从预服务信息预测后服务上下文；(2) 采用自适应加权策略对特征向量进行裁剪，以同时缓解破坏和延迟观测的影响。
AI.result: 在标准正则性条件和参数化后服务映射下，算法实现遗憾上界 Õ(d(√T + C + D))，其中 d 为总特征维度，D 为延迟复杂度。下界与上界在 √d 因子内匹配。
AI.conclusion: 破坏与延迟的代价呈加性结构，避免了先前工作中常见的乘性退化，表明算法对延迟机制具有鲁棒性（延迟-正则-无关）。

title: Position: How can Graphs Help Large Language Models?
comment: The article has been accepted by Frontiers of Computer Science (FCS), with the DOI: {10.1007/s11704-026-51651-6}
summary: With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), classic graph learning tasks have greatly benefited from LLMs, including improved encoding of textual features, more efficient construction of graphs from text, and enhanced reasoning over knowledge graphs. In this paper, we ask a complementary question: How can graphs help LLMs? We address this question from three perspectives: 1) graphs provide an up-to-date knowledge source that helps reduce LLM hallucinations, 2) graph-based prompting techniques-such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Tree-of-Thought (ToT), and Graph-of-Thought (GoT)-enhance LLM reasoning capabilities, and 3) integrating graphs into LLMs improves their understanding of structured data, expanding their applicability to domains such as e-commerce, code, and relational databases (RDBs). We further outlook some future directions including designing sparse LLM architectures based on graphs and brain-inspired memory systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了图如何帮助大语言模型（LLMs），从三个角度分析：图提供最新知识源减少幻觉、基于图的提示技术增强推理能力、图集成提升LLM对结构化数据的理解，并展望了稀疏LLM架构和脑启发记忆系统等未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM如何帮助图学习任务，本文反向思考，探究图如何帮助LLM，以弥补LLM在知识时效性、推理能力和结构化数据理解方面的不足。
AI.method: 从三个维度分析图对LLM的帮助：1) 图作为最新知识源减少幻觉；2) 基于图的提示技术（CoT、ToT、GoT）增强推理；3) 图集成改善LLM对结构化数据的理解（电商、代码、关系数据库）。
AI.result: 图能有效减少LLM的幻觉问题，图结构提示方法（如GoT）相比线性思维链能更好地支持复杂推理，图集成使LLM能处理电商、代码和关系数据库等结构化数据场景。
AI.conclusion: 图与LLM之间存在双向赋能关系，未来可探索基于图的稀疏LLM架构和脑启发记忆系统，进一步推动图与LLM的深度融合。

title: IMPACT-HOI: Supervisory Control for Onset-Anchored Partial HOI Event Construction
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI
summary: We present IMPACT-HOI, a mixed-initiative framework for annotating egocentric procedural video by constructing structured event graphs for Human-Object Interactions (HOI), motivated by the need for high-quality structured supervision for learning robot manipulation from human demonstration. IMPACT-HOI frames this task as the incremental resolution of a partially specified, onset-anchored event state. A trust-calibrated controller selects among direct queries, human-confirmed suggestions, and conservative completions based on empirical annotator behavior and evidence quality. A risk-bounded execution protocol, utilizing atomic rollback, ensures that human-confirmed decisions are preserved against conflicting automated updates. A user study with 9 participants shows a 13.5% reduction in manual annotation actions, a 46.67% event match rate, and zero confirmed-field violations under the studied protocol. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI.

AI.tldr: IMPACT-HOI提出了一种混合主动框架，通过增量式解析以起始时间为锚点的事件状态，并引入信任校准控制器和风险受限执行协议，实现了高效、可靠的以自我为中心的程序性视频中人与物体交互事件图标注，用户实验显示标注动作减少13.5%，事件匹配率达46.67%，且无确认字段违规。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作学习依赖高质量的人体演示结构化标注，但手动标注耗时且易出错，亟需一种高效、可靠的交互式标注方法。
AI.method: 将标注任务形式化为部分指定、以起始时间为锚点的事件状态的增量解析过程；设计信任校准控制器，根据标注者行为经验和证据质量在直接查询、人工确认建议和保守补全间切换；采用原子回滚的风险受限执行协议，确保人工确认决策不受冲突自动更新影响。
AI.result: 9名参与者的用户研究表明：手动标注动作减少13.5%，事件匹配率达46.67%，且在所研究协议下零确认字段违规。
AI.conclusion: IMPACT-HOI通过混合主动交互和风险受限执行，在保证标注可靠性的同时有效降低了人工标注负担，为机器人操控学习提供了高质量的结构化监督数据。

title: Beating the Style Detector: Three Hours of Agentic Research on the AI-Text Arms Race
summary: Reproducing an empirical NLP study used to take weeks. Given the released data and a modern agentic-research harness, we redo every experiment of a recent ACL\,2026 study on personal-style post-editing of LLM drafts -- and add three new ones -- with the human investigator acting only as a reviewer-in-the-loop. We reproduce all seven preregistered hypotheses and recover the paper's headline correlation between perceived self-similarity and embedding-measured self-similarity to three decimal places ($r{=}{+}0.244$, $p{<}10^{-8}$, $n{=}648$). Under a leakage-free held-out protocol, GPT-5.5 and Claude\,Opus\,4.7 close $71$--$75\,\%$ of the style gap to the same-author ceiling on $324$ paired tasks, against $24\,\%$ for the human post-edit, and beat the human post-edit on $\sim$$80\,\%$ of tasks. We then frame the same data as an AI-text detection arms race. A leave-authors-out linear SVM on LUAR-MUD embeddings reaches AUC $0.93$--$1.00$ across approaches; six diagnostics show that GPT-5.5 detection is mostly a length confound while Opus detection is a genuine stylistic signature. Given $T{=}20$ feedback iterations against the frozen detector, an Opus agent flips two of five held-out test mimics to the human half-space and shrinks every margin by an order of magnitude. With moderate effort against a known detector, a frontier LLM can already efficiently lower its own AI-detection probability. All code, $648$ mimic drafts, trained detectors, diagnostics, and adversarial trajectories are released.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用现代智能研究框架，在人类仅作为审查者的情况下，重现并扩展了一项关于个人风格后编辑LLM草稿的ACL 2026研究。结果发现GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7能缩小71-75%的风格差距，远超人类的24%，并揭示了AI文本检测的军备竞赛动态：经过20轮对抗迭代，Opus能够有效降低自身被检测的概率。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP实证研究复现耗时数周，本文旨在展示借助现代智能研究框架和数据发布，可以大幅加速这一过程，同时探索LLM在个人风格编辑和对抗检测方面的能力边界。
AI.method: 使用智能研究框架（agentic-research harness），人类作为审查者而非操作者；采用无泄漏的保留协议；使用LUAR-MUD嵌入进行线性SVM检测；进行20轮对抗反馈迭代实验。
AI.result: 完全复现7个预注册假设，核心相关性r=+0.244精确到三位小数；GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7分别缩小71-75%风格差距（人类仅24%），在80%任务上超越人类；检测AUC达到0.93-1.00；GPT-5.5可被长度混淆检测，Opus检测则为真实风格特征；20轮对抗后Opus成功翻转部分检测结果。
AI.conclusion: 前沿LLM在面对已知检测器时，通过适度的对抗努力即可有效降低自身被检测的概率，揭示了AI文本检测与生成之间的军备竞赛态势。

title: Mitigating Multimodal LLMs Hallucinations via Relevance Propagation at Inference Time
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have revolutionized the landscape of AI, demonstrating impressive capabilities in tackling complex vision and audio-language tasks. However, a critical challenge remains: these models often suffer from hallucinations, generating outputs that diverge from the provided perceptual inputs. This tendency stems from an inherent imbalance in modality utilization during inference, where the dominance of textual tokens undermines the potential of perceptual inputs.
